---
title: "Missouri Works"
author: "Nicholas Ilvento"
date: "2024-12-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
package_updater=function(){
  #CRAN mirror (no prompts)
  options(repos=c(CRAN="https://cloud.r-project.org"))
  #Target library (first lib path)
  lib=.libPaths()[1]
  dir.create(lib,recursive=TRUE,showWarnings=FALSE)
  #Safe installer (binary-first, quiet, stable)
  safe_install=function(pkg,lib){
    tryCatch({
      message("Installing ",pkg," (binary)")
      install.packages(pkg,lib=lib,repos=getOption("repos"),dependencies=TRUE,type="binary",quiet=TRUE)
    },error=function(e){
      stop("Failed to install package: ",pkg,"\n",conditionMessage(e))
    })
  }
  #Required packages
  required_packages=c("readxl","dplyr","tidyr","stringr","stringi","janitor","tibble","lubridate","openxlsx",
                      "writexl","purrr","scales","tools","stringdist","pdftools","base64enc","glue","httr","magrittr",
                      "reticulate","fs","qpdf","emayili","blastula","rvest","jsonlite","xml2","curl","shiny",
                      "htmltools","zip","later","shinyjs")
  #Install missing packages
  installed=installed.packages(lib.loc=lib)[,"Package"]
  missing=setdiff(required_packages,installed)
  if(length(missing)){
    for(pkg in missing){
      safe_install(pkg,lib)
    }
  }
  #Critical package validation
  critical=c("stringi","pdftools","qpdf","shiny")
  for(pkg in critical){
    if(!requireNamespace(pkg,quietly=TRUE)){
      stop("Critical package failed to install: ",pkg)
    }
  }
  #Load packages quietly
  for(pkg in required_packages){
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pkg,character.only=TRUE,quietly=TRUE))
  }
  #Diagnostics: package versions
  package_versions=sapply(required_packages,function(pkg) as.character(packageVersion(pkg)))
  cat("\nLoaded package versions:\n")
  print(package_versions)
  #RDCOMClient (OmegaHat source)
  if(!requireNamespace("RDCOMClient",quietly=TRUE)){
    message("Installing RDCOMClient from OmegaHat...")
    install.packages("RDCOMClient",repos="http://www.omegahat.net/R",type="source")
  } else{
    message("RDCOMClient is already installed.")
  }
  library(RDCOMClient)
  invisible(TRUE)
}
convert_to_date=function(x){
  if(inherits(x,"Date")) return(x)
  #Handle factors
  if(is.factor(x)) x=as.character(x)
  #Handle character input
  if(is.character(x)){
    x_trimmed=trimws(x)
    #Replace non-date placeholders with NA
    x_trimmed[x_trimmed %in% c("00/00/0000","","NA","N/A","NaN")]=NA
    numeric_like=grepl("^\\d+$",x_trimmed)
    if(all(numeric_like[!is.na(x_trimmed)])){
      x=as.numeric(x_trimmed)
    } else{
      return(suppressWarnings(as.Date(x_trimmed,tryFormats=c("%Y-%m-%d","%m/%d/%Y","%d-%b-%y","%d/%m/%Y"))))
    }
  }
  #Handle numeric input
  if(is.numeric(x)){
    convert_single=function(val){
      if(is.na(val)) return(NA)
      if(val>=1e12){
        #Unix timestamp in milliseconds
        return(as.Date(as.POSIXct(val/1000,origin="1970-01-01",tz="UTC")))
      } else if(val>=1e5){
        #Unix timestamp in seconds
        return(as.Date(as.POSIXct(val,origin="1970-01-01",tz="UTC")))
      } else if(val>=30000){
        #Excel serial number or days since 1900
        return(as.Date(val,origin="1899-12-30"))
      } else if(val>0 && val<30000){
        #Excel serial number or days since 1970
        return(as.Date(val,origin="1970-01-01"))
      } else{
        return(NA)
      }
    }
    return(as.Date(vapply(x,convert_single,as.Date(NA))))
  }
  return(x)
}
rename_files=function(files){
  month_map=c(jan="01",january="01",feb="02",february="02",mar="03",march="03",apr="04",april="04",may="05",jun="06",
              june="06",jul="07",july="07",aug="08",august="08",sep="09",sept="09",september="09",oct="10",october="10",
              nov="11",november="11",dec="12",december="12")
  month_regex=paste(names(month_map),collapse="|")
  for(f in files){
    fname=basename(f)
    fname_lower=tolower(fname)
    #Skip Already Fromatted
    already_formatted=
      grepl("^\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}\\s+(payroll|census|pay date|fixed asset report)(\\sbonus)?\\.xls[x]?$",fname_lower)||
      grepl("^\\d{4}\\.q[1-4]\\s+(payroll|census|pay date)(\\sbonus)?\\.xls[x]?$",fname_lower)||
      grepl("^pay date\\s+\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}\\.\\d{2}(\\sbonus)?\\.xls[x]?$",fname_lower)||
      grepl("^\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}\\.\\d{2}\\s-\\s\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}\\.\\d{2}\\s+(payroll|census|pay date)(\\sbonus)?\\.xls[x]?$",fname_lower)
    if(already_formatted) next
    label=NA
    file_year=NA
    file_month=NA
    file_day=NA
    file_year_end=NA
    file_month_end=NA
    file_day_end=NA
    quarter_num=NA
    bonus_flag=grepl("bonus",fname_lower)
    #Fixed Asset Report
    if(grepl("fixed asset report",fname_lower)){
      label="Fixed Asset Report"
      #MMYYYY anywhere
      mm_match=str_match(fname_lower,"(\\d{2})(\\d{4})")
      if(!is.na(mm_match[1,1])){
        mm=mm_match[1,2]
        yy=mm_match[1,3]
        if(as.integer(mm)>=1 && as.integer(mm)<=12){
          file_month=mm
          file_year=yy
        }
      }
      #Month YYYY anywhere (incl parentheses)
      if(is.na(file_year)){
        month_match=str_match(fname_lower,paste0("(",month_regex,")\\s*(\\d{4})"))
        if(!is.na(month_match[1,1])){
          month_name=month_match[1,2]
          year_num=month_match[1,3]
          if(month_name %in% names(month_map)){
            file_month=month_map[[month_name]]
            file_year=year_num
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #Other Label Detection
    if(is.na(label)){
      if(grepl("hc|census",fname_lower)) label="Census"
      else if(grepl("payroll",fname_lower)) label="Payroll"
      else if(grepl("pay date",fname_lower)) label="Pay Date"
      else next
    }
    #Date Range
    if(label!="Fixed Asset Report"){
      date_range_pattern="(\\d{1,2})[\\.\\-](\\d{1,2})[\\.\\-](\\d{2})[\\s\\-]+(\\d{1,2})[\\.\\-](\\d{1,2})[\\.\\-](\\d{2})"
      range_match=str_match(fname_lower,date_range_pattern)
      if(!all(is.na(range_match))){
        convert_year=function(yy){
          if(as.integer(yy)<50) paste0("20",yy) else paste0("19",yy)
        }
        file_year=convert_year(range_match[,4])
        file_month=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(range_match[,2]))
        file_day=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(range_match[,3]))
        file_year_end=convert_year(range_match[,7])
        file_month_end=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(range_match[,5]))
        file_day_end=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(range_match[,6]))
      } else{
        #Quarter + Year
        qy=str_match(fname_lower,"(?:(\\d{4})\\s*(?:q|qtr|quarter)\\s*([1-4])|(?:q|qtr|quarter)\\s*([1-4])\\s*(\\d{4}))")
        if(!all(is.na(qy))){
          if(!is.na(qy[2]) && !is.na(qy[3])){
            file_year=qy[2]
            quarter_num=as.integer(qy[3])
          } else if(!is.na(qy[4]) && !is.na(qy[5])){
            quarter_num=as.integer(qy[4])
            file_year=qy[5]
          }
        }
        #Quarter Without Year
        if(is.na(quarter_num)){
          qm=str_match(fname_lower,"(?:([1-4])\\s*qtr|([1-4])\\s*q)")
          if(!all(is.na(qm))){
            quarter_num=as.integer(na.omit(qm[2:3])[1])
          }
        }
        if(!is.na(quarter_num)){
          if(is.na(file_year)){
            created_time=suppressWarnings(file.info(f)$ctime)
            if(!is.na(created_time)) file_year=format(created_time,"%Y")
          }
          file_month=sprintf("%02d",c(3,6,9,12)[quarter_num])
          file_day="01"
        } else{
          #MM.DD.YYYY or MM-DD-YYYY first
          mdy_alt=str_match(fname_lower,"(\\d{1,2})[\\.\\-](\\d{1,2})[\\.\\-](\\d{4})")
          if(!all(is.na(mdy_alt))){
            file_month=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(mdy_alt[1,2]))
            file_day=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(mdy_alt[1,3]))
            file_year=mdy_alt[1,4]
          } else {
            #Existing YMD
            ymd=str_match(fname,"(\\d{4})[-\\.]?(\\d{1,2})(?:[-\\.]?(\\d{1,2}))?")
            mdy=str_match(fname,"(\\d{1,2})[-\\.]?(\\d{1,2})[-\\.]?(\\d{4})")
            if(!all(is.na(ymd)) && !is.na(ymd[1,2])){
              file_year=ymd[1,2]
              file_month=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(ymd[1,3]))
              if(!is.na(ymd[1,4])) file_day=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(ymd[1,4]))
            } else if(!all(is.na(mdy)) && !is.na(mdy[1,4])){
              file_month=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(mdy[1,1]))
              file_day=sprintf("%02d",as.integer(mdy[1,2]))
              file_year=mdy[1,3]
            }
          }
          #Fallback year
          if(is.na(file_year)){
            created_time=suppressWarnings(file.info(f)$ctime)
            if(!is.na(created_time)) file_year=format(created_time,"%Y")
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #Build Final Name
    ext=file_ext(fname)
    new_name=NA
    if(!is.na(file_year_end)){
      new_name=paste0(label," ",file_year,".",file_month,".",file_day," - ",file_year_end,".",file_month_end,".",file_day_end)
    } else if(!is.na(quarter_num) && !is.na(file_year)){
      new_name=paste0(label," ",file_year,".Q",quarter_num)
    } else if(!is.na(file_year) && !is.na(file_month)){
      if(!is.na(file_day)) new_name=paste0(label," ", file_year,".",file_month,".",file_day)
      else new_name=paste0(label," ",file_year,".",file_month)
    }
    if(bonus_flag && !is.na(new_name)) new_name=paste(new_name,"Bonus")
    #Rename
    if(!is.na(new_name)){
      new_file=file.path(dirname(f),paste0(new_name,".",ext))
      if(f!=new_file){
        file.rename(f,new_file)
        message("Renamed: ",fname," -> ",basename(new_file))
      }
    }
  }
}
column_renaming_payroll=function(df_list){
  envir=parent.frame()
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    found_employee_id=FALSE
    #Look for Employee ID variants
    for(col_name in colnames(df)){
      if(grepl("employee",col_name,ignore.case=TRUE)){
        values=as.character(df[[col_name]])
        non_na_values=values[!is.na(values)]
        if(length(non_na_values)>0 && all(grepl("^[A-Za-z0-9]+$",non_na_values))){
          colnames(df)[which(colnames(df)==col_name)]="Employee ID"
          df[["Employee ID"]]=as.character(df[["Employee ID"]])
          found_employee_id=TRUE
          break
        }
      }
    }
    #If no Employee ID found, look for Workday ID
    if(!found_employee_id){
      for(col_name in colnames(df)){
        col_trim=trimws(col_name)
        if(grepl("^workday[ ._]*id$",col_trim,ignore.case=TRUE)){
          message("Matched Workday ID column: ",col_name," in ",df_name," - Renaming to Employee ID")
          colnames(df)[which(colnames(df)==col_name)]="Employee ID"
          df[["Employee ID"]]=as.character(df[["Employee ID"]])
          found_employee_id=TRUE
          break
        }
      }
    }
    #If still not found, look for Associate ID
    if(!found_employee_id){
      for(col_name in colnames(df)){
        col_trim=trimws(col_name)
        if(grepl("^associate[ ._]*id$",col_trim,ignore.case=TRUE)){
          message("Matched Associate ID column: ",col_name," in ",df_name," - Renaming to Employee ID")
          colnames(df)[which(colnames(df)==col_name)]="Employee ID"
          df[["Employee ID"]]=as.character(df[["Employee ID"]])
          found_employee_id=TRUE
          break
        }
      }
    }
    #Remove rows with NA in Employee ID if column exists
    if("Employee ID" %in% colnames(df)){
      df=df[!is.na(df[["Employee ID"]]),]
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Employee ID column renamed.")
  #Loop through each data frame
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    full_name_col=grep("^employee$|employee[ _\\.]*name$|^worker$|worker[ _\\.]*name$|full[ _\\.]*name$|^name$",
                        colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(full_name_col)==1){
      full_names=as.character(df[[full_name_col]])
      df$`First Name`=sapply(full_names,function(x){
        x=trimws(x)
        if(grepl(",",x)){
          strsplit(x,",\\s*")[[1]][2] %||% NA #After comma
        } else{
          strsplit(x,"\\s+")[[1]][1] #First word
        }
      })
      df$`Last Name`=sapply(full_names,function(x){
        x=trimws(x)
        if(grepl(",",x)){
          strsplit(x,",\\s*")[[1]][1] #Before comma
        } else{
          parts=strsplit(x,"\\s+")[[1]]
          if(length(parts)>1) paste(parts[-1],collapse=" ") else NA
        }
      })
      df=df[,-full_name_col,drop=FALSE]
    }
    #Separate first/last name columns
    first_name_col=grep("employee[ _\\.]*first|worker[ _\\.]*first",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    last_name_col=grep("employee[ _\\.]*last|worker[ _\\.]*last",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(first_name_col)==1) colnames(df)[first_name_col]="First Name"
    if(length(last_name_col)==1) colnames(df)[last_name_col]="Last Name"
    #Columns already named like "First Name"/"Last Name"
    existing_last=grep("last[ _\\.]*name",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    existing_first=grep("first[ _\\.]*name",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(existing_last)==1) colnames(df)[existing_last]="Last Name"
    if(length(existing_first)==1) colnames(df)[existing_first]="First Name"
    #Remove parentheses and contents in First/Last Name
    if("First Name" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$`First Name`=gsub("\\s*\\([^)]*\\)","",df$`First Name`)
    }
    if("Last Name" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$`Last Name`=gsub("\\s*\\([^)]*\\)","",df$`Last Name`)
    }
    #Save updated data frame
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("First Name and Last Name columns renamed.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Find column named "company" ignoring case
    idx=grep("^company$",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(idx)==1){
      colnames(df)[idx]="Company"
      #Standardize "USA" and "LLC" and "INC" in the Company column
      df$Company=gsub("\\busa\\b","USA",df$Company,ignore.case=TRUE)
      df$Company=gsub("\\bllc\\b","LLC",df$Company,ignore.case=TRUE)
      df$Company=gsub("\\binc\\b","INC",df$Company,ignore.case=TRUE)
    }
    #Find column named "company code"
    company_code_idx=grep("^company[ _\\.]*code$",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(company_code_idx)==1){
      colnames(df)[company_code_idx]="Company Code"
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Company and Company Code columns standardized.")
  #Loop through each data frame in the list
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Identify columns with job/title, position/title, business title, or position name, but exclude "position id"
    job_title_col_index=which(sapply(colnames(df),function(col_name){
      grepl("job.*title|title.*job|position.*title|title.*position|position|business[_.\\s]*title|position[_.\\s]*name",
            col_name,ignore.case=TRUE) && !grepl("position[ _\\.]*id",col_name,ignore.case=TRUE)
    }))
    #Rename the first matching column to "Job Title"
    if(length(job_title_col_index)>0){
      colnames(df)[job_title_col_index[1]]="Job Title"
    }
    #Remove suffix after hyphen if at least 50% match with name
    if("Job Title" %in% colnames(df) && all(c("First Name","Last Name") %in% colnames(df))){
      df$`Job Title`=mapply(function(title,first,last){
        title=as.character(title)
        #Remove leading numbers and hyphen
        title=gsub("^[0-9]+\\s*-\\s*","",title)
        full_name=paste(first,last)
        #Split on last hyphen (if any)
        parts=strsplit(title,"\\s*-\\s*")[[1]]
        if(length(parts)>1){
          main_title=paste(parts[-length(parts)],collapse=" - ")
          suffix=parts[length(parts)]
          #Compute similarity
          match_chars=sum(unlist(strsplit(tolower(full_name),"")) %in% unlist(strsplit(tolower(suffix),"")))
          match_ratio=match_chars/nchar(full_name)
          if(match_ratio>=0.5){
            title=main_title
          }
        }
        trimws(title)
      },df$`Job Title`,df$`First Name`,df$`Last Name`)
    }
    #Rename any "Position ID" variants to standard "Position ID"
    pos_id_col_index=grep("position[ _\\.]*id",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(pos_id_col_index)>0){
      colnames(df)[pos_id_col_index]="Position ID"
    }
    #Save the modified data frame back to the environment
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Job Title column renamed.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    work_state_assigned=FALSE
    #Explicit match for "Worked in State"
    worked_state_idx=grep("^worked[ ._]*in[ ._]*state$",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(worked_state_idx)==1){
      colnames(df)[worked_state_idx]="Work State"
      work_state_assigned=TRUE
    }
    state_cols=grep("state$",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE) #Only columns ending with 'state'
    #"location state" → Work State
    if(length(state_cols)>0 && !work_state_assigned){
      location_state_col=grep("^location[ ._]*state$",colnames(df)[state_cols],ignore.case=TRUE)
      if(length(location_state_col)==1){
        ws_col=state_cols[location_state_col]
        colnames(df)[ws_col]="Work State"
        work_state_assigned=TRUE
        state_cols=setdiff(state_cols,ws_col)
      }
    }
    #If only one remaining state column → Work State
    if(length(state_cols)==1 && !work_state_assigned){
      colnames(df)[state_cols]="Work State"
      work_state_assigned=TRUE
      state_cols=integer(0)
    }
    #Prefer columns containing "work"
    if(length(state_cols)>1 && !work_state_assigned){
      work_state_col=grep("work",colnames(df)[state_cols],ignore.case=TRUE)
      if(length(work_state_col)==1){
        ws_col=state_cols[work_state_col]
        colnames(df)[ws_col]="Work State"
        work_state_assigned=TRUE
        state_cols=setdiff(state_cols,ws_col)
      }
    }
    #Tax-state logic
    if(length(state_cols)>0){
      tax_state_cols=grep("tax",colnames(df)[state_cols],ignore.case=TRUE)
      tax_state_last_cols=grep("state$",colnames(df)[state_cols][tax_state_cols],ignore.case=TRUE)
      if(length(tax_state_last_cols)>0){
        valid_cols=state_cols[tax_state_cols[tax_state_last_cols]]
        if(!work_state_assigned){
          non_na_counts=colSums(!is.na(df[,valid_cols,drop=FALSE]))
          best_col=valid_cols[which.max(non_na_counts)]
          colnames(df)[best_col]="Work State"
          work_state_assigned=TRUE
          state_cols=setdiff(state_cols,best_col)
        }
        for(col in state_cols){
          if(colnames(df)[col]!="Work State"){
            colnames(df)[col]="Resident State"
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #Remaining state columns → Resident State
    for(col in state_cols){
      if(colnames(df)[col]!="Work State"){
        colnames(df)[col]="Resident State"
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Work State and Resident State column renamed.")
  #Check if ANY data frame already has a "Work State" column
  has_work_state=any(sapply(df_list,function(df_name){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    any(colnames(df)=="Work State")
  }))
  #Only proceed if NO data frame has "Work State"
  if(!has_work_state){
    for(df_name in df_list){
      #Only target payroll data frames (case-insensitive)
      if(!grepl("payroll",df_name,ignore.case=TRUE)) next
      df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
      #Identify XX_wages columns
      wage_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{2}_wages$",colnames(df),value=TRUE)
      #Skip if no wage columns found
      if(length(wage_cols)==0) next
      #Initialize new columns
      df$`Work State`=NA_character_
      df$`Resident State`=NA_character_
      #Extract state codes from column names
      state_codes=toupper(sub("_wages$","",wage_cols))
      #Matrix of wage values
      wage_matrix=as.matrix(df[,wage_cols,drop=FALSE])
      colnames(wage_matrix)=state_codes
      for(i in seq_len(nrow(df))){
        row_vals=wage_matrix[i,]
        #States with non-zero wages
        non_zero=row_vals[row_vals!=0 & !is.na(row_vals)]
        if(length(non_zero)==0) next
        #Order states by wage descending
        ordered_states=names(sort(non_zero,decreasing=TRUE))
        #Assign Work / Resident State
        df$`Work State`[i]=ordered_states[1]
        if(length(ordered_states)>1){
          df$`Resident State`[i]=ordered_states[2]
        }
      }
      #Assign updated data frame back to environment
      assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
    }
  }
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Try to rename any 'location' column to 'Work Location'
    location_cols=grep("location",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    work_location_assigned=FALSE
    if(length(location_cols)>0){
      colnames(df)[location_cols]="Work Location"
      work_location_assigned=TRUE
    }
    #If no column was renamed, look for "worked in department"
    if(!work_location_assigned){
      dept_col_idx=grep("^worked[ ._]*in[ ._]*department$",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
      if(length(dept_col_idx)==1){
        colnames(df)[dept_col_idx]="Worked in Department"
        dept_values=as.character(df[["Worked in Department"]])
        #Check if all values are numeric
        if(all(grepl("^[0-9]+$",dept_values))){
          #Take first three digits from each entry
          dept_codes=substr(dept_values,1,3)
          #Match against location_codes
          matched_locations=sapply(dept_codes,function(code){
            idx=which(location_codes$`Location Code`==code)
            if(length(idx)==1){
              location_codes$`Work Location`[idx]
            } else{
              NA
            }
          })
          df$`Work Location`=matched_locations
          work_location_assigned=TRUE
        }
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Work Location column processed, including fallback mapping from Worked in Department.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Look for a column titled "home department"
    home_dept_idx=grep("^home[ ._]*department$",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(home_dept_idx)==1){
      colnames(df)[home_dept_idx]="Home Department"
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Home Department column renamed if found.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Look for a column titled "tax id"
    tax_id_idx=grep("^tax[ ._]*id$",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
    if(length(tax_id_idx)==1){
      colnames(df)[tax_id_idx]="Tax ID"
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Tax ID column renamed if found.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Only proceed if required columns exist
    if(all(c("Home Department","Worked in Department","Work Location") %in% colnames(df))){
      df$`Home Department`=mapply(function(home,worked,work_loc){
        home=as.character(home)
        worked=as.character(worked)
        work_loc=as.character(work_loc)
        #Pattern: digits - text - text (hyphens may have spaces around them)
        pattern="^\\s*(\\d+)\\s*-\\s*(.*?)\\s*-\\s*(.*)\\s*$"
        if(grepl(pattern,home)){
          parts=sub(pattern,"\\1;\\2;\\3",home)
          split_parts=strsplit(parts,";")[[1]]
          dept_code=split_parts[1]
          middle_text=split_parts[2]
          end_text=split_parts[3]
          #Case-insensitive match for Work Location
          if(dept_code==worked && tolower(end_text)==tolower(work_loc)){
            return(trimws(middle_text))
          }
        }
        #Otherwise return original
        return(home)
      },df$`Home Department`,df$`Worked in Department`,df$`Work Location`)
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Home Department column cleaned (case-insensitive match for Work Location).")
  #Loop through each data frame in the list
  for(df_name in df_list){
    #Get the actual data frame
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Find column named exactly "city" (case-insensitive)
    city_col=which(tolower(colnames(df))=="city")
    #Rename if found
    if(length(city_col)==1){
      colnames(df)[city_col]="Resident City"
    }
    #Save back to environment
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Resident City column renamed.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    date_cols=grep("date",names(df),ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE)
    if(length(date_cols)>0){
      #Keep rows where NONE of the date columns contain any letters
      rows_to_keep=apply(df[date_cols],1,function(row_vals){
        all(sapply(row_vals,function(x){
          if(is.na(x)) return(TRUE)
          #Return TRUE if no letters in the string (case-insensitive)
          !grepl("[a-z]",as.character(x),ignore.case=TRUE)
        }))
      })
      df=df[rows_to_keep,,drop=FALSE]
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    cn=colnames(df)
    cn_lower=tolower(cn)
    sep="[ _\\.]"
    #Helper
    exact=function(pattern){
      grep(paste0("^",pattern,"$"),cn_lower)
    }
    #Check for FULL explicit trio
    hire_explicit=exact(paste0("hire",sep,"date"))
    rehire_explicit=exact(paste0("rehire",sep,"date"))
    term_explicit=c(exact(paste0("termination",sep,"date")),exact(paste0("term",sep,"date")))
    has_full_trio=length(hire_explicit)==1 && length(rehire_explicit)==1 && length(term_explicit)>=1
    #Use explicit trio ONLY
    if(has_full_trio){
      colnames(df)[hire_explicit]="Hire Date"
      df$`Hire Date`=convert_to_date(df[[hire_explicit]])
      colnames(df)[rehire_explicit]="Rehire Date"
      df$`Rehire Date`=convert_to_date(df[[rehire_explicit]])
      term_idx=term_explicit[1]
      colnames(df)[term_idx]="Termination Date"
      df$`Termination Date`=convert_to_date(df[[term_idx]])
    } else{
      #Fallback Logic (only if trio missing)
      #Hire Date
      hire_idx=exact(paste0("original",sep,"hire",sep,"date"))
      if(length(hire_idx)==0){
        hire_idx=grep("^hire.*date$|^date.*hire$",cn_lower)
      }
      if(length(hire_idx)>0){
        hire_idx=hire_idx[1]
        colnames(df)[hire_idx]="Hire Date"
        df$`Hire Date`=convert_to_date(df[[hire_idx]])
      }
      #Rehire Date
      rehire_idx=grep("continuous.*service.*date",cn_lower)
      if(length(rehire_idx)==0){
        rehire_idx=grep("^rehire.*date$|^date.*rehire$",cn_lower)
      }
      if(length(rehire_idx)>0){
        rehire_idx=rehire_idx[1]
        colnames(df)[rehire_idx]="Rehire Date"
        df$`Rehire Date`=convert_to_date(df[[rehire_idx]])
      }
      #Termination Date
      term_idx=grep("^termination.*date$|^term.*date$|^date.*term$",cn_lower)
      if(length(term_idx)>0){
        term_idx=term_idx[1]
        colnames(df)[term_idx]="Termination Date"
        df$`Termination Date`=convert_to_date(df[[term_idx]])
      }
    }
    #Cleanup
    if(all(c("Hire Date","Rehire Date") %in% colnames(df))){
      same_dates=!is.na(df$`Hire Date`) & !is.na(df$`Rehire Date`) & df$`Hire Date`==df$`Rehire Date`
      df$`Rehire Date`[same_dates]=as.Date(NA)
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Hire Date, Rehire Date, and Termination Date columns renamed.")
  #Define status keywords (lowercase)
  status_keywords=c("hired","rehired","active","a","a-active","d","d-deceased",
                    "terminated","t-terminated","fired","resigned","t","laid off","furloughed",
                    "leave with pay","leave without pay","leave","on leave","L-Leave")
  #Helper regex pattern for flexible separators: space, underscore, or period
  sep_pattern="[ _\\.]"
  active_values=c("Active","Hired","Rehired","A","A-Active")
  terminated_values=c("Terminated","Fired","Resigned","T","T-Terminated")
  deceased_values=c("D","Deceased","D-Deceased")
  leave_values=c("L","Leave with Pay","Leave without Pay","Leave","On Leave","L-Leave")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    #Skip any df_name that does NOT contain census, pay_date, or payroll
    if(!grepl("census|pay_date|payroll",df_name,ignore.case=TRUE)){
      next
    }
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Pattern: "employee" + separator + "status"
    status_col_indices=which(grepl("employee[ _.-]+status",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)| #Flexible "employee status"
                              tolower(colnames(df)) %in% c("employee_status","status")) #Exact literal or just "status"
    #Fallback: columns where all values are in status lists
    if(length(status_col_indices)==0){
      all_status_values=c(active_values,terminated_values,deceased_values,leave_values)
      status_col_indices=which(sapply(df,function(col){
        if(is.character(col)||is.factor(col)){
          vals=na.omit(as.character(col))
          length(vals)>0 && all(vals %in% all_status_values)
        } else FALSE
      }))
    }
    #Rename columns that match status keywords
    found_employee_status=FALSE
    if(length(status_col_indices)>0){
      all_status_values_lower=tolower(c(active_values,terminated_values,deceased_values,leave_values))
      for(col_index in status_col_indices){
        status_col=df[[col_index]]
        status_col_clean=status_col[!is.na(status_col)]
        status_col_clean_lower=tolower(as.character(status_col_clean))
        if(length(status_col_clean)>0 && all(status_col_clean_lower %in% all_status_values_lower)){
          colnames(df)[col_index]="Employee Status"
          found_employee_status=TRUE
          break
        }
      }
    }
    #If no "Employee Status" found, try to find an "active status" column
    if(!found_employee_status){
      active_status_pattern=paste0("^active",sep_pattern,"*status$")
      active_idx=grep(active_status_pattern,colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
      if(length(active_idx)==1){
        #Rename to Employee Status
        colnames(df)[active_idx]="Employee Status"
        df[["Employee Status"]]=as.character(df[["Employee Status"]])
        #Check for "on leave" column first and mark those rows "On Leave" ONLY IF Termination Date IS NA
        on_leave_pattern=paste0("^on",sep_pattern,"*leave$")
        on_leave_idx=grep(on_leave_pattern,colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE)
        if(length(on_leave_idx)==1){
          on_leave_col=as.character(df[[on_leave_idx]])
          yes_leave_idx=which(tolower(on_leave_col)=="yes")
          if(length(yes_leave_idx)>0){
            if("Termination Date" %in% colnames(df)){
              if(!inherits(df[["Termination Date"]],"Date")){
                df[["Termination Date"]]=as.Date(df[["Termination Date"]],tryFormats=c("%Y-%m-%d","%m/%d/%Y","%d-%b-%Y"))
              }
              no_term_idx=yes_leave_idx[is.na(df[["Termination Date"]][yes_leave_idx])]
              if(length(no_term_idx)>0){
                df[["Employee Status"]][no_term_idx]="On Leave"
              }
            } else {
              df[["Employee Status"]][yes_leave_idx]="On Leave"
            }
          }
        }
        #Replace "Yes" with "Active" in Employee Status (except those already "On Leave")
        yes_idx=which(tolower(df[["Employee Status"]])=="yes")
        if(length(yes_idx)>0){
          df[["Employee Status"]][yes_idx]="Active"
        }
        found_employee_status=TRUE
      }
    }
    #Convert Termination Date to Date if exists
    if("Termination Date" %in% colnames(df)){
      if(!inherits(df[["Termination Date"]],"Date")){
        df[["Termination Date"]]=as.Date(df[["Termination Date"]],tryFormats=c("%Y-%m-%d","%m/%d/%Y","%d-%b-%Y"))
      }
      #For any row with non-NA Termination Date, override/set Employee Status to "Terminated"
      term_idx=which(!is.na(df[["Termination Date"]]))
      if(length(term_idx)>0){
        if(!("Employee Status" %in% colnames(df))){
          df[["Employee Status"]]=NA_character_
        }
        #Default: mark terminated
        df[["Employee Status"]][term_idx]="Terminated"
        #Override: rehired AFTER termination => Active
        if("Rehire Date" %in% colnames(df)){
          if(!inherits(df[["Rehire Date"]],"Date")){
            df[["Rehire Date"]]=as.Date(df[["Rehire Date"]],tryFormats=c("%Y-%m-%d","%m/%d/%Y","%d-%b-%Y"))
          }
          rehire_after_term_idx=term_idx[!is.na(df[["Rehire Date"]][term_idx]) &
                                          df[["Rehire Date"]][term_idx]>df[["Termination Date"]][term_idx]]
          if(length(rehire_after_term_idx)>0){
            df[["Employee Status"]][rehire_after_term_idx]="Active"
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #Fill any remaining NA or empty Employee Status with "Unknown"
    if("Employee Status" %in% colnames(df)){
      na_status_idx=which(is.na(df[["Employee Status"]])|df[["Employee Status"]]=="")
      if(length(na_status_idx)>0){
        df[["Employee Status"]][na_status_idx]="Unknown"
      }
    } else{
      df[["Employee Status"]]="Unknown"
    }
    #Save modified data frame back to environment
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Check if "Employee Status" column exists (case-insensitive)
    status_col_idx=which(tolower(colnames(df))=="employee status")
    if(length(status_col_idx)>0){
      col_vals=as.character(df[[status_col_idx]])
      col_vals=trimws(col_vals) #remove extra spaces
      #Check if all non-NA values are "Unknown"
      if(length(col_vals[!is.na(col_vals)])>0 && all(col_vals[!is.na(col_vals)]=="Unknown")){
        #Remove the column
        df[[status_col_idx]]=NULL
      }
    }
    #Assign back to original name
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Employee Status column renamed.")
  #Define the valid values for the Classification column (all lowercase)
  valid_values=tolower(c("Full-Time","Full Time","Full","F","FARG","FORG","FT","F - Full Time","F - Full-Time",
                          "Part-Time","Part Time","Part","P","PARG","PT","INTR","P - Part Time","P - Part-Time"))
  #Define the threshold for "overwhelming majority" (e.g., 90%)
  majority_threshold=0.9
  #Loop through each data frame in the list
  for(df_name in df_list){
    #Get the actual data frame
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Loop through each column in the data frame
    for(col_name in colnames(df)){
      #Convert the column to lowercase for comparison
      col_lower=tolower(as.character(df[[col_name]]))
      logical_vec=col_lower %in% valid_values
      if(length(logical_vec)>0){
        valid_proportion=mean(logical_vec,na.rm=TRUE)
        if(!is.na(valid_proportion) && valid_proportion>=majority_threshold){
          colnames(df)[colnames(df)==col_name]="Classification"
          break
        }
      }
    }
    #Save the modified data frame back to the environment
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Classification column renamed.")
  #Define the valid values for the Wage Type column
  valid_values_wage=c("Salaried","Salary","Salary Exempt","Salary Non Exempt","Salary Non-Exempt","S",
                      "Hourly","Hourly Non-Exempt","Hourly Non Exempt","Hourly Exempt","Hour","H")
  #Convert valid values to lowercase once
  valid_values_wage_lower=tolower(valid_values_wage)
  #Loop through each data frame in the list
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    found=FALSE
    #First pass: look for a column whose values (case-insensitive) are all in the valid list
    for(col_name in colnames(df)){
      non_na_values=df[[col_name]][!is.na(df[[col_name]])]
      if(length(non_na_values)>0 && all(tolower(non_na_values) %in% valid_values_wage_lower)){
        colnames(df)[colnames(df)==col_name]="Wage Type"
        found=TRUE
        break
      }
    }
    #Second pass (fallback)
    if(!found){
      #Try to find a column with both "wage" and "type"
      wage_type_cols=grep("wage",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE)
      wage_type_cols=wage_type_cols[grepl("type",wage_type_cols,ignore.case=TRUE)]
      if(length(wage_type_cols)>0){
        #Rename first "wage-type" column found
        colnames(df)[colnames(df)==wage_type_cols[1]]="Wage Type"
      } else{
        #If none found, try to find "pay rate type"
        pay_rate_type_cols=grep("pay[ _\\.]*rate[ _\\.]*type",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE)
        if(length(pay_rate_type_cols)>0){
          #Rename first "pay rate type" column found
          colnames(df)[colnames(df)==pay_rate_type_cols[1]]="Wage Type"
        }
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Wage Type column renamed.")
  #Define replacements for Wage Type
  salaried_values=c("Salaried","Salary","Salary Exempt","Salary Non Exempt","Salary Non-Exempt","S")
  hourly_values=c("Hourly","Hourly Non-Exempt","Hourly Non Exempt","Hourly Exempt","Hour","H")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    if("Wage Type" %in% colnames(df)){
      df=df%>%mutate(`Wage Type`=case_when(`Wage Type` %in% salaried_values~"Salaried",
                                            `Wage Type` %in% hourly_values~"Hourly",TRUE~`Wage Type`))
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  #Match "pay rate" variations or any column that contains "rate" as a whole word or suffix
  pattern="(?i)pay[ _-]*rate|(^|[^a-zA-Z])rate([^a-zA-Z]|$)"
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Find all matches to pattern
    col_match=grep(pattern,colnames(df),perl=TRUE)
    if(length(col_match)>0){
      #Rename the first match to "Pay Rate"
      colnames(df)[col_match[1]]="Pay Rate"  
    } else{
      #If no Pay Rate, search for salary column
      salary_match=grep("(?i)salary",colnames(df),perl=TRUE)
      if(length(salary_match)>0){
        colnames(df)[salary_match[1]]="Pay Rate"
      }
    }
    #Ensure "Pay Rate" exists
    if("Pay Rate" %in% colnames(df)){
      #Clean Pay Rate: remove $ and commas, convert to numeric
      df$`Pay Rate`=as.numeric(gsub("[\\$,]","",as.character(df$`Pay Rate`)))
      #Check for salaried rows exceeding 500
      if("Wage Type" %in% colnames(df)){
        salaried_rows=which(df$`Wage Type` %in% salaried_values)
        if(length(salaried_rows)==0||all(df$`Pay Rate`[salaried_rows]<=500)){
          #Only apply adjustment if no salaried rows > 500
          df$`Pay Rate`=ifelse(df$`Wage Type` %in% salaried_values,df$`Pay Rate`/26,
            ifelse(df$`Wage Type` %in% hourly_values, df$`Pay Rate`/2080,df$`Pay Rate`))
        } #Else skip adjustment
      } else{
        #If Wage Type column does not exist, leave Pay Rate as-is
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Pay Rate column renamed.")
  date_cols=c("Hire Date","Rehire Date","Termination Date")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    for(col in intersect(date_cols,names(df))){
      df[[col]]=convert_to_date(df[[col]])
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  #Check if both "payroll" and "census" data frames are in df_list
  has_payroll=any(grepl("payroll",df_list,ignore.case=TRUE))
  has_census=any(grepl("census",df_list,ignore.case=TRUE))
  #Vectors to track Pay Date column status
  created_pay_date=c()
  renamed_pay_date=c()
  #Loop through each data frame
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    date_cols=grep("^(pay|check)[._ ]?date$",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE)
    if(length(date_cols)>0){
      #Rename matched columns to "Pay Date"
      colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% date_cols]="Pay Date"
      renamed_pay_date=c(renamed_pay_date,df_name)
    } else if(grepl("payroll",df_name,ignore.case=TRUE)){
      #Extract YYYY_MM from df_name like "df_2025_03"
      matches=regmatches(df_name,regexec("^df_(\\d{4})_(\\d{2})",df_name))
      if(length(matches[[1]])>=3){
        year=as.integer(matches[[1]][2])
        month_num=as.integer(matches[[1]][3])
        #Last day of month
        last_day=as.Date(paste(year,month_num,"01",sep="-")) %m+% months(1)-days(1)
        #Last Friday of the month
        weekday_last=as.POSIXlt(last_day)$wday #Sunday = 0
        offset=(weekday_last-5) %% 7 #Friday = 5
        last_friday=last_day-offset
        df$`Pay Date`=convert_to_date(last_friday)
        created_pay_date=c(created_pay_date,df_name)
      } else{
        warning(paste("Unable to extract year/month from df_name:",df_name))
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Pay Date column renamed.")
  month_label=if(exists("month",envir=envir)) get("month",envir=envir) else NULL
  quarter_label=if(exists("quarter",envir=envir)) get("quarter",envir=envir) else NULL
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Skip if df is not actually a dataframe
    if(!is.data.frame(df)) next
    if("Pay Date" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$`Pay Date`=as.Date(df$`Pay Date`)
      if(!is.null(month_label)){
        #Defensive: force month_label to character if needed
        month_label=as.character(month_label)
        if(is.numeric(month_label)){
          month_label=month.name[as.integer(month_label)]
        }
        month_label=tools::toTitleCase(tolower(month_label))
        df=df[tools::toTitleCase(tolower(format(df$`Pay Date`,"%B")))==month_label,]
      } else if(!is.null(quarter_label)){
        quarter_months_list=list(c("January","February","March"),c("April","May","June"),
                                  c("July","August","September"),c("October","November","December"))
        quarter_label=as.integer(quarter_label) #Defensive
        months_in_quarter=quarter_months_list[[quarter_label]]
        df=df[format(df$`Pay Date`,"%B") %in% months_in_quarter,]
      }
      assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
    }
  }
  month=month_label
  quarter=quarter_label
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Skip if df is not a dataframe
    if(!is.data.frame(df)) next
    pattern="(?i)^gross([ _-]*(pay|wages)|(_[a-z0-9]{0,10})?)$"
    matching_cols=grep(pattern,colnames(df),value=TRUE,perl=TRUE)
    if(length(matching_cols)>0){
      colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% matching_cols]="Gross Wages"
      assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
    }
  }
  message("Gross Wages column renamed.")
  #Flag to track if the column already exists in any data frame
  days_column_found=FALSE
  #First check if any df already has a suitable "Days in Pay Period" column
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    days_col=grep("days[._ ]*in[._ ]*pay[._ ]*period",colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE)
    if(length(days_col)==1){
      colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% days_col]="Days in Pay Period"
      assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
      days_column_found=TRUE
    }
  }
  message("Days in Pay Period column renamed.")
  #If none were found, create it in payroll data frames only
  if(!days_column_found){
    for(df_name in df_list){
      if(grepl("payroll|pay[._ ]?date",df_name,ignore.case=TRUE)){
        df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
        #Check if file name has YYYY_MM or YYYY_QX
        match_month=regexec("(\\d{4})_(\\d{2})",df_name)
        parts_month=regmatches(df_name,match_month)[[1]]
        match_quarter=regexec("(\\d{4})_q(\\d)",tolower(df_name))
        parts_quarter=regmatches(df_name,match_quarter)[[1]]
        if(length(parts_month)==3){
          #Case 1: Monthly file (df_YYYY_MM_payroll)
          year=as.integer(parts_month[2])
          month_num=as.integer(parts_month[3])
          first_day=as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-01",year,month_num))
          days_in_month=as.integer(format(seq(first_day,length=2,by="1 month")[2]-1,"%d"))
          if("Pay Date" %in% names(df)){
            if(df_name %in% created_pay_date){
              df$`Days in Pay Period`=days_in_month
            } else if(df_name %in% renamed_pay_date){
              df$`Days in Pay Period`=14
            } else{
              df$`Days in Pay Period`=days_in_month
            }
          } else{
            df$`Days in Pay Period`=days_in_month
          }
        } else if(length(parts_quarter)==3){
          #Case 2: Quarterly file (df_YYYY_QX_payroll)
          if("Pay Date" %in% names(df)){
            df$`Days in Pay Period`=sapply(df$`Pay Date`,function(pd){
              if(is.na(pd)) return(NA_integer_)
              pd=as.Date(pd)
              first_day=as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-01",year(pd),month(pd)))
              as.integer(format(seq(first_day,length=2,by="1 month")[2]-1,"%d"))
            })  
            #Apply renamed vs created pay date rule
            if(df_name %in% renamed_pay_date){
              df$`Days in Pay Period`=14
            }
          } else{
            warning(paste("Quarterly payroll file missing Pay Date column:",df_name))
          }
        } else{
          warning(paste("Could not extract YYYY_MM or YYYY_QX from:",df_name))
        }
        assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
      }
    }
  }
  #Loop through each data frame in the list
  renamed_any=FALSE
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    patterns=c("pay period end date","pay period ending date","end date","ending date")
    renamed=FALSE
    for(pattern in patterns){
      regex_pattern=gsub(" ","[ _-]*",pattern,fixed=TRUE)
      matching_cols=grep(regex_pattern,colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE,perl=TRUE)
      if(length(matching_cols)>0){
        colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% matching_cols]="Pay Period End Date"
        renamed=TRUE
        renamed_any=TRUE
        break
      }
    }
    if(renamed){
      assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
    }
  }
  message("Pay Period End Date column renamed.")
  #If no data frame had a column renamed, create "Pay Period End Date" column in payroll df(s)
  if(!renamed_any){
    for(df_name in df_list){
      if(grepl("payroll|pay[ _.-]*date",df_name,ignore.case=TRUE)){
        df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
        match=regexec("df_(\\d{4})_(\\d{2})",df_name)
        parts=regmatches(df_name,match)[[1]]
        if("Pay Date" %in% colnames(df)){
          #Case 1: If it has a "Pay Date" column, use that - 8
          df$`Pay Period End Date`=as.Date(df$`Pay Date`)-8
          assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
        } else if(length(parts)==3){
          #Case 2: If the df_name encodes year/month like "df_2025_03_payroll"
          year=as.integer(parts[2])
          month_num=as.integer(parts[3])
          #First and last day of the month
          first_day=as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-01",year,month_num))
          last_day=seq(first_day,length=2,by="1 month")[2]-1
          #Use consistent logic: 8 days before last day of month
          df$`Pay Period End Date`=last_day-8
          assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
        } else{
          warning(paste("Could not extract year/month or Pay Date from",df_name))
        }
      }
    }
  }
  #Loop through each data frame in the list
  renamed_any=FALSE
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    patterns=c("pay period start date","pay period starting date","pay period begin date","pay period beginning date",
                "start date","starting date","begin date","beginning date")
    renamed=FALSE
    for(pattern in patterns){
      regex_pattern=gsub(" ","[ _-]*",pattern,fixed=TRUE)
      matching_cols=grep(regex_pattern,colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE,perl=TRUE)
      if(length(matching_cols)>0){
        colnames(df)[colnames(df) %in% matching_cols]="Pay Period Start Date"
        renamed=TRUE
        renamed_any=TRUE
        break
      }
    }
    if(renamed){
      assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
    }
  }
  #If no data frame had a column renamed, create "Pay Period Start Date" column in payroll df(s)
  if(!renamed_any){
    for(df_name in df_list){
      #Detect payroll OR pay_date in ANY position of df_name
      is_payroll_related=grepl("payroll",df_name,ignore.case=TRUE)||grepl("pay[ _-]*date",df_name,ignore.case=TRUE)
      if(is_payroll_related){
        df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
        match=regexec("df_(\\d{4})_(\\d{2})",df_name)
        parts=regmatches(df_name,match)[[1]]
        if("Pay Date" %in% colnames(df)){
          #Case 1: If it has a "Pay Date" column, use that - 21
          df$`Pay Period Start Date`=as.Date(df$`Pay Date`)-21
          assign(df_name,df)
        } else if(length(parts)==3){
          #Case 2: If the df_name encodes year/month like "df_2025_03_payroll"
          year=as.integer(parts[2])
          month_num=as.integer(parts[3])
          #First and last day of the month
          first_day=as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-01",year,month_num))
          last_day=seq(first_day,length=2,by="1 month")[2]-1
          #Use consistent logic: 21 days before last day of month
          df$`Pay Period Start Date`=last_day-21
          assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
        } else{
          warning(paste("Could not extract year/month or Pay Date from",df_name))
        }
      }
    }
  }
  message("Pay Period Start Date column renamed.")
  #Loop through each data frame
  for(df_name in df_list){
    #Get the data frame
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Define a broad pattern to capture possible variants
    pattern="(?i)(?:total[ _.-]*)?hours(?:[ _.-]*worked)?|gross[ _.-]*hours|working[ _.-]*hours"
    #Find all matching columns
    matching_cols=grep(pattern,colnames(df),ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE,perl=TRUE)
    if(length(matching_cols)>0){
      #Prioritize explicit "gross hours" or "total hours worked" first
      preferred_pattern="(?i)gross[ _.-]*hours|total[ _.-]*hours(?:[ _.-]*worked)?"
      preferred_match=grep(preferred_pattern,matching_cols,ignore.case=TRUE,value=TRUE,perl=TRUE)
      #Choose the first preferred match if it exists, else the first general match
      chosen_col=if(length(preferred_match)>0) preferred_match[1] else matching_cols[1]
      #Rename that single column
      colnames(df)[colnames(df)==chosen_col]="Total Hours Worked"
    }
    #Save back to environment
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Total Hours Worked column renamed.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Columns ending with separator + "amount"
    amount_cols=grep("(?i)[ _\\.-]amount$",colnames(df),perl=TRUE,value=TRUE)
    if(length(amount_cols)>0){
      #Convert to numeric (remove commas)
      df[,amount_cols]=lapply(df[,amount_cols,drop=FALSE],function(x){
        as.numeric(gsub(",","",x))
      })
    } else{
      #Columns containing "sit" + separator + "18"
      sit18_pattern="(?i)sit[ _\\.]+18"
      sit18_cols=grep(sit18_pattern,colnames(df),perl=TRUE,value=TRUE)
      if(length(sit18_cols)>0){
        #Rename all matched columns to "Work State SIT"
        for(col in sit18_cols){
          colnames(df)[colnames(df)==col]="Work State SIT"
        }
      } else{
        #Fallback: flexible "worked in state employee tax" with separators
        tax_pattern="(?i)^worked[ _\\.-]+in[ _\\.-]+state[ _\\.-]+employee[ _\\.-]+tax$"
        tax_col_idx=grep(tax_pattern,colnames(df),perl=TRUE)
        if(length(tax_col_idx)==1){
          colnames(df)[tax_col_idx]="Work State SIT"
        }
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Work State SIT column renamed.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Regex pattern to match columns containing "state 2 wages" with separators (space, underscore, or period)
    pattern="(?i)state[ _\\.]+2.*wages"
    #Find matching columns
    matching_cols=grep(pattern,colnames(df),perl=TRUE,value=TRUE)
    if(length(matching_cols)>0){
      for(col in matching_cols){
        colnames(df)[colnames(df)==col]="Resident State Wages"
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Resident State Wages column renamed.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Pattern to match "sit" + separator + "21" anywhere in the column name
    sit21_pattern="(?i)sit[ _\\.]+21"
    sit21_cols=grep(sit21_pattern,colnames(df),perl=TRUE,value=TRUE)
    if(length(sit21_cols)>0){
      for(col in sit21_cols){
        colnames(df)[colnames(df)==col]="Resident State SIT"
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Resident State SIT column renamed.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Find columns ending with separator + "wages"
    wages_cols_all=grep("(?i)[ _\\.-]wages$",colnames(df),perl=TRUE,value=TRUE)
    #Exclude gross wages and "state 2"
    state_2_pattern="(?i)state[ _\\.]+2"
    wages_cols=wages_cols_all[!grepl("gross",wages_cols_all,ignore.case=TRUE) & 
                              !grepl(state_2_pattern,wages_cols_all,perl=TRUE)]
    if(length(wages_cols)>0){
      #Clean numeric values
      df[,wages_cols]=lapply(df[,wages_cols,drop=FALSE],function(x){
        as.numeric(gsub("[,$]","",x))
      })
      #Create columns only if they don't already exist
      if(!"Work State Wages" %in% colnames(df)){
        df$`Work State Wages`=0
      }
      if(!"Resident State Wages" %in% colnames(df)){
        df$`Resident State Wages`=0
      }
      wage_matrix=as.matrix(df[,wages_cols,drop=FALSE])
      for(i in seq_len(nrow(df))){
        row_vals=wage_matrix[i,]
        non_zero=row_vals[row_vals!=0 & !is.na(row_vals)]
        if(length(non_zero)==0) next
        ordered_vals=sort(non_zero,decreasing=TRUE)
        #Highest → Work State Wages
        df$`Work State Wages`[i]=ordered_vals[1]
        #Second highest → Resident State Wages (if exists)
        if(length(ordered_vals)>1){
          df$`Resident State Wages`[i]=ordered_vals[2]
        }
      }
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  if(!"Work State Wages" %in% colnames(df)){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    total_earnings_pattern="(?i)^total[ _\\.-]*earnings$"
    total_earnings_idx=grep(total_earnings_pattern,colnames(df),perl=TRUE)
    if(length(total_earnings_idx)>0){
      colnames(df)[total_earnings_idx[1]]="Work State Wages"
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  state_lookup=c(AL="Alabama",AK="Alaska",AZ="Arizona",AR="Arkansas",CA="California",CO="Colorado",CT="Connecticut",
                  DE="Delaware",FL="Florida",GA="Georgia",HI="Hawaii",ID="Idaho",IL="Illinois",IN="Indiana",IA="Iowa",
                  KS="Kansas",KY="Kentucky",LA="Louisiana",ME="Maine",MD="Maryland",MA="Massachusetts",MI="Michigan",
                  MN="Minnesota",MS="Mississippi",MO="Missouri",MT="Montana",NE="Nebraska",NV="Nevada",NH="New Hampshire",
                  NJ="New Jersey",NM="New Mexico",NY="New York",NC="North Carolina",ND="North Dakota",OH="Ohio",
                  OK="Oklahoma",OR="Oregon",PA="Pennsylvania",RI="Rhode Island",SC="South Carolina",SD="South Dakota",
                  TN="Tennessee",TX="Texas",UT="Utah",VT="Vermont",VA="Virginia",WA="Washington",WV="West Virginia",
                  WI="Wisconsin",WY="Wyoming")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    if(grepl("pay[ _\\.-]?date|payroll",df_name,ignore.case=TRUE)){
      #Ensure columns exist
      needed_cols=c("Work State SIT","Resident State SIT","Work State Wages","Resident State Wages")
      for(col in needed_cols){
        if(!(col %in% colnames(df))){
          df[[col]]=0
        }
      }
      #SIT Columns
      sit_cols=grep("(?i)([ _\\.-]amount$|w_h)",colnames(df),perl=TRUE,value=TRUE)
      sit_cols=sit_cols[!grepl("(?i)^wg",sit_cols,perl=TRUE)]
      if(length(sit_cols)>0){
        #Clean numeric values
        df[,sit_cols]=lapply(df[,sit_cols,drop=FALSE],function(x){
          as.numeric(gsub("[,$]","",x))
        })
        #Initialize columns
        df$`Work State SIT`=0
        df$`Resident State SIT`=0
        sit_matrix=as.matrix(df[,sit_cols,drop=FALSE])
        for(i in seq_len(nrow(df))){
          row_vals=sit_matrix[i,]
          non_zero=row_vals[row_vals!=0 & !is.na(row_vals)]
          if(length(non_zero)==0) next
          ordered_vals=sort(non_zero,decreasing=TRUE)
          df$`Work State SIT`[i]=ordered_vals[1]
          if(length(ordered_vals)>1){
            df$`Resident State SIT`[i]=ordered_vals[2]
          }
        }
      }
      #Wage Columns
      wg_cols=grep("(?i)^wg",colnames(df),perl=TRUE,value=TRUE)
      if(length(wg_cols)>0){
        #Clean numeric values
        df[,wg_cols]=lapply(df[,wg_cols,drop=FALSE],function(x){
          as.numeric(gsub("[,$]","",x))
        })
        #Ensure columns exist
        needed_cols=c("Work State Wages","Resident State Wages","Work State","Resident State")
        for(col in needed_cols){
          if(!(col %in% colnames(df))){
            df[[col]]=NA
          }
        }
        wg_matrix=as.matrix(df[,wg_cols,drop=FALSE])
        for(i in seq_len(nrow(df))){
          row_vals=wg_matrix[i,]
          non_zero_idx=which(row_vals!=0 & !is.na(row_vals))
          if(length(non_zero_idx)==0) next
          ordered_idx=non_zero_idx[order(row_vals[non_zero_idx],decreasing=TRUE)]
          #Work State Wages
          df$`Work State Wages`[i]=row_vals[ordered_idx[1]]
          #Function to extract state name from wg column
          get_state_name=function(col_name){
            state_part=sub("(?i)^wg[_\\.-]*","",col_name,perl=TRUE)
            state_part=gsub("[_\\.-]"," ",state_part)
            state_part=trimws(state_part)
            state_key=toupper(gsub(" ","",state_part))
            if(state_key %in% names(state_lookup)){
              return(state_lookup[state_key])
            } else {
              return(tools::toTitleCase(tolower(state_part)))
            }
          }
          #Work State
          df$`Work State`[i]=get_state_name(wg_cols[ordered_idx[1]])
          #Resident State if second column exists
          if(length(ordered_idx)>1){
            df$`Resident State Wages`[i]=row_vals[ordered_idx[2]]
            df$`Resident State`[i]=get_state_name(wg_cols[ordered_idx[2]])
          }
        }
      }
      assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
    }
  }
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    state_names=state_lookup
    state_abbr=names(state_lookup)
    clean_state_name=function(x){
      if(is.na(x)) return(NA)
      x_upper=toupper(x)
      #Check full state names
      for(state in state_names){
        if(grepl(toupper(state),x_upper,fixed=TRUE)){
          return(state)
        }
      }
      #Check abbreviations
      for(abbr in state_abbr){
        if(grepl(paste0("\\b",abbr,"\\b"),x_upper)){
          return(state_lookup[abbr])
        }
      }
      return(NA)
    }
    if("Work State" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$`Work State`=sapply(df$`Work State`,clean_state_name)
    }
    if("Resident State" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$`Resident State`=sapply(df$`Resident State`,clean_state_name)
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    if(all(c("Work State Wages","Work State SIT") %in% colnames(df))){
      cols=colnames(df)
      #Remove "Work State Wages" from its current position
      cols=cols[cols!="Work State Wages"]
      #Find position of "Work State SIT"
      sit_pos=which(cols=="Work State SIT")
      #Insert "Work State Wages" right before "Work State SIT"
      new_order=append(cols,"Work State Wages",after=sit_pos-1)
      df=df[,new_order,drop=FALSE]
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Identify columns that are completely NA
    all_na_cols=sapply(df,function(col) all(is.na(col)))
    #Exclude Termination Date and Rehire Date from removal
    cols_to_remove=setdiff(names(all_na_cols[all_na_cols]),c("Termination Date","Rehire Date","Resident State"))
    if(length(cols_to_remove)>0){
      df=df[,!(colnames(df) %in% cols_to_remove),drop=FALSE]
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Identify columns to remove: those with underscores or no uppercase letters
    cols_to_remove=sapply(colnames(df),function(col){
      has_underscore=grepl("_",col)
      has_uppercase=grepl("[A-Z]",col)
      return(has_underscore|!has_uppercase)
    })
    #Keep only columns that don't match those criteria
    df=df[,!cols_to_remove,drop=FALSE]
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Remove FIRST instance of "Resident State" if duplicates exist
    rs_idx=which(colnames(df)=="Resident State")
    if(length(rs_idx)>1){
      df=df[,-rs_idx[1],drop=FALSE]
    }
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("Duplicate Resident State columns removed.")
  #Built-in state mappings
  state_map=setNames(state.name,state.abb)
  state_cols=c("Work State","Resident State")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    #Get the data frame
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    for(col in state_cols){
      if(col %in% names(df)){
        #Trim and coerce to character
        ws_chr=trimws(as.character(df[[col]]))
        #Check if column is numeric codes (allow NA)
        is_all_numeric=all(is.na(ws_chr)|grepl("^[0-9]+$",ws_chr))
        if(is_all_numeric){
          #Numeric state code mapping
          state_map_num=c("2"="Massachusetts","3"="Alabama","10"="Alaska","12"="North Carolina","15"="Colorado",
                          "17"="Virginia","18"="Arkansas","20"="Minnesota","21"="Indiana","22"="Missouri","23"="Georgia",
                          "25"="California","28"="Utah","30"="Ohio","35"="South Carolina","37"="Arizona","39"="Oregon",
                          "41"="Montana","42"="Florida","43"="Illinois","53"="Texas","60"="Michigan")
          #Lookup and replace
          idx=match(ws_chr,names(state_map_num))
          df[[col]]=ifelse(!is.na(idx),state_map_num[idx],ws_chr)
        } else{
          #Column contains abbreviations or full names
          ws_upper=toupper(ws_chr) #Normalize case
          idx=match(ws_upper,names(state_map))
          df[[col]]=ifelse(!is.na(idx),state_map[idx],ws_chr) #Unknowns unchanged
        }
      }
    }
    #Assign updated df back to environment
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
  message("22 replaced with Missouri.")
  for(df_name in df_list){
    df=get(df_name,envir=envir)
    #Define replacements for Classification
    full_time_values=c("Full-Time","Full Time","Full","F","FARG","FORG","FT","F - Full Time","F - Full-Time")
    part_time_values=c("Part-Time","Part Time","Part","P","PARG","PT","INTR","P - Part Time","P - Part-Time")
    if("Classification" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$Classification=ifelse(df$Classification %in% full_time_values,"Full-Time",
                        ifelse(df$Classification %in% part_time_values,"Part-Time",df$Classification))
    }
    if("Employee Status" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$`Employee Status`=ifelse(df$`Employee Status` %in% active_values,"Active",
                            ifelse(df$`Employee Status` %in% terminated_values,"Terminated",
                            ifelse(df$`Employee Status` %in% deceased_values,"Deceased",
                            ifelse(df$`Employee Status` %in% leave_values,"On Leave",df$`Employee Status`))))
      df=df%>%mutate(`Employee Status`=ifelse(is.na(`Employee Status`)|`Employee Status`=="",
                                        ifelse(is.na(`Termination Date`),"Active","Terminated"),`Employee Status`))
    }
    if(exists("directory",envir=envir)){
      directory=get("directory",envir=envir)
    } else{
      stop("'directory' variable not found in the specified environment")
    }
    if(exists("company",envir=envir)){
      company=get("company",envir=envir)
    } else{
      stop("'company' variable not found in the specified environment")
    }
    if(exists("all_sheets_jobs",envir=envir)){
      all_sheets_jobs=get("all_sheets_jobs",envir=envir)
    }
    if(exists("file_path_jobs",envir=envir)){
      file_path_jobs=get("file_path_jobs",envir=envir)
    }
    if(exists("all_sheets_locations",envir=envir)){
      all_sheets_locations=get("all_sheets_locations",envir=envir)
    }
    if(exists("file_path_locations",envir=envir)){
      file_path_locations=get("file_path_locations",envir=envir)
    }
    if(exists("all_sheets_jobs")){
      if(company %in% all_sheets_jobs){
        job_abbreviations=read.xlsx(file_path_jobs,sheet=company)
        colnames(job_abbreviations)=gsub("\\."," ",colnames(job_abbreviations))
        job_abbreviations$Abbreviation=toupper(job_abbreviations$Abbreviation)
        if("Job Title" %in% colnames(df)){
          df$`Job Title`=toupper(df$`Job Title`)
          match_idx=match(df$`Job Title`,job_abbreviations$Abbreviation)
          df$`Job Title`[!is.na(match_idx)]=job_abbreviations$`Full Job Title`[match_idx[!is.na(match_idx)]]
          still_unmatched=is.na(match_idx)
          if(any(still_unmatched)){
            match_idx2=match(df$`Job Title`[still_unmatched],toupper(job_abbreviations$`Full Job Title`))
            df$`Job Title`[still_unmatched][!is.na(match_idx2)]=job_abbreviations$`Full Job Title`[match_idx2[!is.na(match_idx2)]]
            unmatched_titles=unique(df$`Job Title`[still_unmatched][is.na(match_idx2)])
          } else{
            unmatched_titles=character(0)
          }
          if(length(unmatched_titles)>0){
            cat("The following Job Titles in",df_name,"have no matches in job_abbreviations:\n")
            print(unmatched_titles)
            answer=readline(prompt="Type Y when ready to retry from the top, or N to stop: ")
            if(tolower(answer) %in% c("y","yes")){
              next #Restarts for loop for this df_name
            } else{
              stop("Stopped because of unmatched job titles.")
            }
          }
        }
      }
    } else{
      message(paste("Sheet",company,"does not exist in job abbreviations file. Skipping job title replacement for",df_name))
    }
    message("Job Abbreviations changed.")
    #Work Location Abbreviations replacement
    if(exists("all_sheets_locations")){
      if(company %in% all_sheets_locations){
        work_location_abbreviations=read.xlsx(file_path_locations,sheet=company)
        colnames(work_location_abbreviations)=gsub("\\."," ",colnames(work_location_abbreviations))
        work_location_abbreviations$Abbreviation=toupper(work_location_abbreviations$Abbreviation)
        if("Work Location" %in% colnames(df)){
          df$`Work Location`=toupper(df$`Work Location`)
          match_idx=match(df$`Work Location`,work_location_abbreviations$Abbreviation)
          df$`Work Location`[!is.na(match_idx)]=work_location_abbreviations$`Work Location`[match_idx[!is.na(match_idx)]]
        }
      }
    } else{
      message(paste("Sheet",company,"does not exist in work location abbreviations file. Skipping work location replacement for", df_name))
    }
    #Proper-case First Name and Last Name (after spaces and hyphens)
    proper_case=function(x){
      sapply(x,function(val){
        if(is.na(val)) return(NA_character_)
        parts=unlist(strsplit(tolower(val),"([ -])",perl=TRUE))
        seps=regmatches(tolower(val),gregexpr("([ -])",tolower(val),perl=TRUE))[[1]]
        parts=paste0(toupper(substr(parts,1,1)),substr(parts,2,nchar(parts)))
        paste(rbind(parts,c(seps,"")),collapse="")
      },USE.NAMES=FALSE)
    }
    if("First Name" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$`First Name`=proper_case(df$`First Name`)
    }
    if("Last Name" %in% colnames(df)){
      df$`Last Name`=proper_case(df$`Last Name`)
    }
    #Assign back to environment
    assign(df_name,df,envir=envir)
  }
}
```

```{r}
missouri_works_model=function(company,start_month=NULL,end_month=NULL,start_quarter=NULL,
                              end_quarter=NULL,start_year,end_year){
  package_updater()
  #Input validations
  validate_inputs=function(company,start_month=NULL,end_month=NULL,start_quarter=NULL,end_quarter=NULL,
                           start_year,end_year){
    #Company validation
    if(!is.character(company)){
      stop("Error: Company must be a string.")
    }
    #Year validation
    if(is.null(start_year)||is.null(end_year)){
      stop("Error: Both 'start_year' and 'end_year' must be provided.")
    }
    if(!is.numeric(start_year)||start_year<=0||start_year!=as.integer(start_year)){
      stop("Error: 'start_year' must be a positive nonzero integer.")
    }
    if(!is.numeric(end_year)||end_year<=0||end_year!=as.integer(end_year)){
      stop("Error: 'end_year' must be a positive nonzero integer.")
    }
    if(start_year>end_year){
      stop("Error: 'start_year' must be before or equal to 'end_year'.")
    }
    #Month vs Quarter exclusivity
    if((!is.null(start_month)||!is.null(end_month)) && (!is.null(start_quarter)||!is.null(end_quarter))){
      stop("Error: Provide either month range or quarter range, not both.")
    }
    #Month validation
    if(!is.null(start_month)||!is.null(end_month)){
      if(is.null(start_month)||is.null(end_month)){
        stop("Error: Both 'start_month' and 'end_month' must be provided together.")
      }
      if(!is.character(start_month)||!is.character(end_month)){
        stop("Error: Months must be strings.")
      }
      valid_months=month.name
      if(!(start_month %in% valid_months)){
        stop(paste("Error: Invalid 'start_month'. Must be one of:",paste(valid_months,collapse=", ")))
      }
      if(!(end_month %in% valid_months)){
        stop(paste("Error: Invalid 'end_month'. Must be one of:",paste(valid_months,collapse=", ")))
      }
      #Chronological check for months
      start_idx=match(start_month,valid_months)
      end_idx=match(end_month,valid_months)
      if(start_year==end_year && start_idx>end_idx){
        stop("Error: 'start_month' must not be after 'end_month' within the same year.")
      }
    }
    #Quarter validation
    if(!is.null(start_quarter)||!is.null(end_quarter)){
      if(is.null(start_quarter)||is.null(end_quarter)){
        stop("Error: Both 'start_quarter' and 'end_quarter' must be provided together.")
      }
      if(!is.numeric(start_quarter)||!(start_quarter %in% 1:4)){
        stop("Error: 'start_quarter' must be a number between 1 and 4.")
      }
      if(!is.numeric(end_quarter)||!(end_quarter %in% 1:4)){
        stop("Error: 'end_quarter' must be a number between 1 and 4.")
      }
      #Chronological check for quarters
      if(start_year==end_year && start_quarter>end_quarter){
        stop("Error: 'start_quarter' must not be after 'end_quarter' within the same year.")
      }
    }
    return(TRUE) #Passed all checks
  }
  validate_inputs(company=company,start_month=start_month,end_month=end_month,start_quarter=start_quarter,
                  end_quarter=end_quarter,start_year=start_year,end_year=end_year)
  if(tolower(company)=="demo"){    
    if(dir.exists(file.path(Sys.getenv("USERPROFILE"),"Downloads/Missouri Works"))){
      directory=file.path(Sys.getenv("USERPROFILE"),"Downloads")
    } else{
      directory=file.path(Sys.getenv("USERPROFILE"),"Documents/Automation")
    }
  } else{
    directory=file.path(Sys.getenv("USERPROFILE"),"Documents/Automation")
  }
  file_path_periods=paste0(directory,"Programs/Missouri Works/Missouri Works Report Periods.xlsx")
  if(tolower(company)=="demo"){
    dir.create(dirname(file_path_periods),recursive=TRUE,showWarnings=FALSE)
  }
  report_periods=read.xlsx(file_path_periods,sheet="Report Periods")
  #Replace dots with spaces in column names
  names(report_periods)=gsub("\\."," ",names(report_periods))
  report_periods=report_periods%>%mutate(across(!Client,~convert_to_date(.)))
  #Define file path and sheet
  file_path=paste0(directory,"Programs/Missouri Works/",company,"/",company," Missouri Works Report.xlsx")
  if(file.exists(file_path)){
    wb=loadWorkbook(file_path)
    all_sheets=names(wb)
    #Helper to convert sheet names into actual dates
    parse_period_date=function(name){
      if(grepl("^[0-9]{2}\\.[0-9]{4}$",name)){ #"03.2025"
        parts=strsplit(name,"\\.")[[1]]
        month=as.integer(parts[1])
        year=as.integer(parts[2])
        return(as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-01",year,month)))
      } else if(grepl("^Q[1-4]\\.[0-9]{4}$",name)){ #"Q1.2025"
        parts=strsplit(name,"\\.")[[1]]
        quarter=as.integer(sub("Q","",parts[1]))
        year=as.integer(parts[2])
        month_equiv=(quarter-1)*3+1 #Q1 = Jan, Q2 = Apr, etc.
        return(as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-01",year,month_equiv)))
      } else{
        return(as.Date(NA)) #Not a recognized period
      }
    }
    #Determine period cutoff
    if(!is.null(start_month)){
      month_num=match(tolower(start_month),tolower(month.name))
      start_date=as.Date(paste0(start_year,"-",sprintf("%02d",month_num),"-01"))
      month_upper=paste0(toupper(substr(start_month,1,1)),tolower(substr(start_month,2,nchar(start_month))))
      period_label_sheet=sprintf("%02d.%d",month_num,start_year) #"MM.YYYY"
      period_label_form=paste0(substr(month_upper,1,3),"-",substr(start_year,3,4)) #"MMM-YY"
    } else if(!is.null(start_quarter)){
      start_month_num=(start_quarter-1)*3+1
      start_date=as.Date(paste0(start_year,"-",sprintf("%02d",start_month_num),"-01"))
      period_label_sheet=paste0("Q",start_quarter,".",start_year) #"QX.YYYY"
      period_label_form=paste0("Q",start_quarter," ",start_year) #"QX YYYY"   
    } else{
      stop("Either month or quarter must be defined.")
    }
    #Identify period-based sheets
    period_pattern="^(?:[0-9]{2}\\.[0-9]{4}|Q[1-4]\\.[0-9]{4})$"
    period_sheets=grep(period_pattern,all_sheets,value=TRUE)
    #Convert their names into dates
    period_dates=sapply(period_sheets,parse_period_date)
    #Remove current + future periods
    future_sheets=period_sheets[period_dates>=start_date]
    for(s in future_sheets) removeWorksheet(wb,s)
    #Yearly reports ("YYYY Yearly Report")
    yearly_sheets=grep("^[0-9]{4} Yearly Report$",all_sheets,value=TRUE)
    yearly_years=as.numeric(sub(" Yearly Report","",yearly_sheets))
    future_yearly=yearly_sheets[yearly_years>=start_year]
    for(s in future_yearly) removeWorksheet(wb,s)
    #Combined Payroll Data
    if("Combined Payroll Data" %in% all_sheets){
      cpd=read.xlsx(wb,sheet="Combined Payroll Data")
      colnames(cpd)=gsub("\\."," ",colnames(cpd))
      #Employee ID Change logic applied to cpd
      eid_change_date=report_periods$`Employee ID Change`[report_periods$Client==company]
      if(!is.na(eid_change_date) && eid_change_date>=start_date && "New Employee ID" %in% names(cpd)){
        #Remove New Employee ID column
        cpd$`New Employee ID`=NULL
      }
      cpd=cpd%>%mutate(`Pay Date`=convert_to_date(`Pay Date`))%>%filter(`Pay Date`<start_date) #drop current+future periods
      removeWorksheet(wb,"Combined Payroll Data")
      addWorksheet(wb,"Combined Payroll Data",tabColour="#8B0000")
      writeData(wb,"Combined Payroll Data",cpd,withFilter=TRUE)
      message("Combined Payroll Data sheet updated if redo.")
    }
    #Save
    wb$ActiveSheet=1L
  } else{
    message("File does not exist: ",file_path," — skipping.")
  }
  #Function to get cutoff date depending on mode
  get_cutoff=function(year,month=NULL,quarter=NULL){
    if(!is.null(month)){
      #Month mode → cutoff = 1st of that month
      month_num=match(month,month.name)
      list(cutoff_date=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,month_num)),type="month")
    } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
      #Quarter mode → cutoff = 1st of first month in that quarter
      month_num=(quarter-1)*3+1
      list(cutoff_date=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,month_num)),type="quarter")
    } else{
      stop("Must provide either month or quarter.")
    }
  }
  #Parse YYYY.MM or YYYY.QX into a date and type
  parse_period=function(p){
    if(str_detect(p,"Q")){
      year=as.integer(str_extract(p,"^\\d{4}"))
      q=as.integer(str_extract(p,"(?<=Q)\\d"))
      month_num=(q-1)*3+1
      list(date=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,month_num)),type="quarter")
    } else{
      year=as.integer(str_extract(p,"^\\d{4}"))
      month=as.integer(str_extract(p,"(?<=\\.)\\d{2}"))
      list(date=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,month)),type="month")
    }
  }
  #Main deletion function
  delete_future_files=function(company,year,month=NULL,quarter=NULL){
    base_folder=paste0(directory,"Programs/Missouri Works")
    email_folder=file.path(base_folder,company,"Emails to Client")
    if(dir.exists(email_folder)){
      all_files=list.files(email_folder,pattern="\\.eml$",full.names=TRUE)
      period_strings=basename(all_files)%>%str_extract("\\d{4}\\.(?:\\d{2}|Q\\d)")
      cutoff=get_cutoff(year,month,quarter)
      keep=logical(length(all_files))
      for(i in seq_along(all_files)){
        parsed=parse_period(period_strings[i])
        #In month mode: delete any month >= cutoff or any quarter >= cutoff
        if(cutoff$type=="month"){
          if((parsed$type=="month" && parsed$date>=cutoff$cutoff_date)||
            (parsed$type=="quarter" && parsed$date>=floor_date(cutoff$cutoff_date,"quarter"))){
            keep[i]=FALSE
          } else{
            keep[i]=TRUE
          }
        }
        #In quarter mode: delete any quarter >= cutoff or any month >= cutoff
        else if(cutoff$type=="quarter"){
          if((parsed$type=="quarter" && parsed$date>=cutoff$cutoff_date)||
            (parsed$type=="month" && parsed$date>=cutoff$cutoff_date)){
            keep[i]=FALSE
          } else{
            keep[i]=TRUE
          }
        }
      }
      files_to_delete=all_files[!keep]
      if(length(files_to_delete)>0){
        file.remove(files_to_delete)
      }
      return(files_to_delete)
    } else{
      message("Folder does not exist, skipping: ",email_folder)
    }
  }
  delete_future_files(company=company,year=start_year,quarter=start_quarter,month=start_month)
  report_function=function(company,month=NULL,quarter=NULL,year){
        start_time_1=Sys.time()
    envir=parent.frame()
    #Conditional get
    if(exists("wb",envir=envir)){
      wb=get("wb",envir=envir)
      message("Loaded wb")
    } else{
      file_path=paste0(directory,"Programs/Missouri Works/",company,"/",company," Missouri Works Report.xlsx")
      if(file.exists(file_path)){
        wb=loadWorkbook(file_path)
      }
      message("wb imported from file_path.")
    }
    #Input validations
    if(!is.null(month) && !is.null(quarter)){
      stop("Error: Provide either 'month' or 'quarter', not both.")
    }
    if(is.null(month) && is.null(quarter)){
```
