    file_path=paste0(directory,"Programs/Missouri Works/",company,"/",company," Missouri Works Report.xlsx")
    align_types=function(current_df,reference_df){
      for(col in intersect(names(current_df),names(reference_df))){
        ref_class=class(reference_df[[col]])
        cur_class=class(current_df[[col]])
        if(!identical(ref_class,cur_class)){
          #Handle Date
          if("Date" %in% ref_class){
            if(!inherits(current_df[[col]],"Date")){
              current_df[[col]]=as.Date(current_df[[col]],origin="1970-01-01")
            }
          #Handle character
          } else if("character" %in% ref_class){
            current_df[[col]]=as.character(current_df[[col]])
          #Handle numeric/integer
          } else if("numeric" %in% ref_class||"integer" %in% ref_class){
            current_df[[col]]=as.numeric(current_df[[col]])
          #Handle logical
          } else if("logical" %in% ref_class){
            current_df[[col]]=as.logical(current_df[[col]])
          }
        }
      }
      return(current_df)
    }
    if("PeriodKey" %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)){
      combined_payroll_data$PeriodKey=NULL
    }
    #Keep only columns that do NOT have an underscore and DO contain at least one uppercase letter
    combined_payroll_data=combined_payroll_data%>%
      select(where(~{
                      col_name=deparse(substitute(.))
                      #Actually we need the column names vector
                      TRUE
                    }))
    #Better approach using column names directly
    cols_to_keep=names(combined_payroll_data)[!grepl("_",names(combined_payroll_data)) & 
                                                grepl("[A-Z]",names(combined_payroll_data))]
    combined_payroll_data=combined_payroll_data[,cols_to_keep]
    cols=colnames(combined_payroll_data)
    desired_order=c("Employee ID","Last Name","First Name","Employee Status","Work Location","Job Title",
                    "Hire Date","Rehire Date","Termination Date","Classification","Wage Type","Pay Rate","Gross Wages",
                    "Work State","Work State Wages","Work State SIT","Resident State","Resident State Wages",
                    "Resident State SIT","Total Hours Worked","Pay Date","Days in Pay Period","Pay Period End Date")
    #Keep only columns that actually exist
    existing_priority_cols=desired_order[desired_order %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)]
    #Append any remaining columns not specified above
    remaining_cols=setdiff(colnames(combined_payroll_data),existing_priority_cols)
    #Reorder
    combined_payroll_data=combined_payroll_data[,c(existing_priority_cols,remaining_cols)]
    message("Combined Payroll Data columns reordered.")
    required_dates=c("Hire Date","Rehire Date","Termination Date")
    #Proceed only if all three date columns and Job Title exist
    if(all(c(required_dates,"Job Title") %in% cols)){
      hire_idx=match("Hire Date",cols)
      rehire_idx=match("Rehire Date",cols)
      term_idx=match("Termination Date",cols)
      #Check if the three date cols are adjacent and in the correct order
      adjacent_and_ordered=((rehire_idx==hire_idx+1) && (term_idx==rehire_idx+1))
      if(!adjacent_and_ordered){
        #Remove the three date columns from current positions
        cols_wo_dates=cols[!cols %in% required_dates]
        #Find Job Title position in cols without dates
        job_title_idx=match("Job Title",cols_wo_dates)
        #Insert the date columns after Job Title
        new_cols=append(cols_wo_dates,required_dates,after=job_title_idx)
        #Reorder dataframe
        combined_payroll_data=combined_payroll_data[,new_cols,drop=FALSE]
      }
    }
    numeric_cols=c("Pay Rate","Gross Wages","Work State Wages","Work State SIT","Resident State Wages","Resident State SIT",
                    "Total Hours Worked","Days in Pay Period")
    for(col in numeric_cols){
      if(col %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)){
        combined_payroll_data[[col]]=suppressWarnings(as.numeric(combined_payroll_data[[col]]))
      }
    }
    message("Numeric columns aligned.")
    combined_payroll_data=combined_payroll_data%>%distinct(.keep_all=TRUE)
    if(file.exists(file_path) && exists("sheet_names") && "Combined Payroll Data" %in% sheet_names){
      #Apply this before combining
      combined_payroll_data=align_types(combined_payroll_data,previous_data)
      #Merge new and old data
      combined_payroll_data=bind_rows(combined_payroll_data,previous_data)%>%distinct()
      numeric_cols=c("Pay Rate","Gross Wages","Work State Wages","Work State SIT","Resident State Wages","Resident State SIT",
                      "Total Hours Worked","Days in Pay Period")
      for(col in numeric_cols){
        if(col %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)){
          combined_payroll_data[[col]]=suppressWarnings(as.numeric(combined_payroll_data[[col]]))
        }
      }
      combined_payroll_data=combined_payroll_data%>%distinct(.keep_all=TRUE)
      if("Combined Payroll Data" %in% names(wb)){
        removeWorksheet(wb,"Combined Payroll Data")
      }
    } else if(file.exists(file_path)){
      #Case 2: file exists but sheet missing -> add sheet without erasing others
      wb=loadWorkbook(file_path)
    } else{
      #Case 3: file doesn’t exist -> new workbook
      wb=createWorkbook()
    }
    if("New Employee ID" %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)){
      combined_payroll_data=combined_payroll_data[!is.na(combined_payroll_data$`New Employee ID`) &
                                                  combined_payroll_data$`New Employee ID`!="",]
    }
    addWorksheet(wb,"Combined Payroll Data",tabColour="#8B0000")
    writeData(wb,"Combined Payroll Data",combined_payroll_data)
    #Bold header row
    header_style=createStyle(textDecoration="bold")
    addStyle(wb,sheet="Combined Payroll Data",style=header_style,rows=1,cols=1:ncol(combined_payroll_data),gridExpand=TRUE)
    #Freeze top row and first 4 columns
    freezePane(wb,sheet="Combined Payroll Data",firstActiveRow=2,firstActiveCol=4)
    #Add filters to top row
    addFilter(wb,sheet="Combined Payroll Data",rows=1,cols=1:ncol(combined_payroll_data))
    date_cols=c("Hire Date","Rehire Date","Termination Date","Pay Date","Pay Period End Date")
    #Create a date style (Excel date number format)
    date_style=createStyle(numFmt="DATE")
    #Write data
    writeData(wb,"Combined Payroll Data",combined_payroll_data)
    #Apply the date style to the columns with dates
    for(col in date_cols){
      if(col %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)){
        col_index=match(col,colnames(combined_payroll_data))
        #Apply style from row 2 to last row (assuming row 1 = header)
        addStyle(wb,sheet="Combined Payroll Data",style=date_style,cols=col_index,rows=2:(nrow(combined_payroll_data)+1),
                  gridExpand=TRUE)
      }
    }
    accounting_cols=c("Pay Rate","Gross Wages","Work State Wages","Work State SIT","Resident State Wages","Resident State SIT")
    accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
    for(col in accounting_cols){
      if(col %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)){
        col_index=match(col,colnames(combined_payroll_data))
        addStyle(wb,sheet="Combined Payroll Data",style=accounting_style,cols=col_index,
                  rows=2:(nrow(combined_payroll_data)+1),gridExpand=TRUE)
      }
    }
    #Create a style for number with no decimals
    number_no_decimals_style=createStyle(numFmt="0")
    #Your target columns
    cols_to_format=c("Days in Pay Period","Total Hours Worked")
    #Get number of rows (including header row at 1)
    n_rows=nrow(combined_payroll_data)+1 #+1 for header
    for(col_name in cols_to_format){
      if(col_name %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)){
        col_index=match(col_name,colnames(combined_payroll_data))
        addStyle(wb,sheet="Combined Payroll Data",style=number_no_decimals_style,cols=col_index,
                  rows=2:n_rows, #Apply style from row 2 (first data row) down
                  gridExpand=TRUE)
      }
    }
    message("Combined Payroll Data sheet added to file.")
    #Convert full month name to numeric month number with leading zero
    month_num=if(!is.null(month)){
      match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))%>% sprintf("%02d",.)
    } else{
      NULL
    }
    missouri_works$`Pay Rate`=as.numeric(missouri_works$`Pay Rate`)
    #Only do if the file exists
    if(file.exists(file_path)){
      #Get all sheets
      all_sheets=names(wb)
      #Filter quarterly/monthly report sheets
      valid_sheets=all_sheets[grepl("^(\\d{2}\\.\\d{4}|\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}|Q[1-4]\\.\\d{4}|\\d{4}\\.Q[1-4])$",all_sheets)]
      if(length(valid_sheets)>0){
        sheet_dates=sapply(valid_sheets,function(s){
          end_of_month=function(year,month){
            if(is.na(month)||month<1||month>12) return(NA)
            start=as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-01",year,month))
            seq(start,by="month",length=2)[2]-1
          }
          if(grepl("^\\d{2}\\.\\d{4}$",s)){ #MM.YYYY
            mm=as.numeric(substr(s,1,2))
            yy=as.numeric(substr(s,4,7))
            end_of_month(yy,mm)
          } else if(grepl("^\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}$",s)){ #YYYY.MM
            yy=as.numeric(substr(s,1,4))
            mm=as.numeric(substr(s,6,7))
            end_of_month(yy,mm)
          } else if(grepl("^Q[1-4]\\.\\d{4}$",s)){ #QX.YYYY
            q=as.numeric(sub("^Q([1-4])\\.(\\d{4})$","\\1",s))
            yy=as.numeric(sub("^Q([1-4])\\.(\\d{4})$","\\2",s))
            mm=q*3
            end_of_month(yy,mm)
          } else if(grepl("^\\d{4}\\.Q[1-4]$",s)){ #YYYY.QX
            yy=as.numeric(sub("^(\\d{4})\\.Q([1-4])$","\\1",s))
            q=as.numeric(sub("^(\\d{4})\\.Q([1-4])$","\\2",s))
            mm=q*3
            end_of_month(yy,mm)
          } else{
            NA
          }
        })
        #Pick the most recent prior sheet
        most_recent_sheet=valid_sheets[which.max(sheet_dates)]
        #Read only headers from prior sheet
        prior_df=read.xlsx(wb,sheet=most_recent_sheet,startRow=4,colNames=TRUE,rows=4)
        #Clean column names (replace dots with spaces)
        names(prior_df)=gsub("\\."," ",names(prior_df))
        #Remove the single-row data, leaving just column names as an empty data frame
        prior_df=prior_df[0,]
        #Get all "MMM-YY Status" columns
        prior_status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Status$",names(prior_df),value=TRUE)
        if(length(prior_status_cols)>0){
          #Order newest to oldest
          col_order=order(as.Date(paste0("01-",prior_status_cols),format="%d-%b-%y"),decreasing=TRUE)
          prior_status_cols=prior_status_cols[col_order]
          #Add blank columns to missouri_works at the end
          for(col_name in prior_status_cols){
            if(!(col_name %in% names(missouri_works))){
              missouri_works[[col_name]]="" #Blank column
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
    if(new_employee_id_code==FALSE && "New Employee ID" %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)){
      #Add New Employee ID to missouri_works
      new_employee_lookup=combined_payroll_data[combined_payroll_data$`New Employee ID`!="" & !is.na(combined_payroll_data$`New Employee ID`),]
      new_employee_lookup=new_employee_lookup[!duplicated(new_employee_lookup$`Employee ID`),c("Employee ID","New Employee ID")]
      missouri_works$`New Employee ID`=new_employee_lookup$`New Employee ID`[match(missouri_works$`Employee ID`,new_employee_lookup$`Employee ID`)]
      #Find Old Employee ID
      missouri_works$`Old Employee ID`=NA
      for(i in 1:nrow(missouri_works)){
        new_employee_val=missouri_works$`New Employee ID`[i]
        if(!is.na(new_employee_val)){
          #All payroll rows with same New Employee ID
          temp=combined_payroll_data[combined_payroll_data$`New Employee ID`==new_employee_val,]
          #Remove Employee IDs that already exist in missouri_works
          temp=temp[!(temp$`Employee ID` %in% missouri_works$`Employee ID`),]
          if(nrow(temp)>0){
            #Get row with most recent Pay Date
            temp=temp[order(as.Date(temp$`Pay Date`),decreasing=TRUE),]
            missouri_works$`Old Employee ID`[i]=temp$`Employee ID`[1]
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #Determine sheet name
    sheet_name=if(!is.null(quarter)){
      paste0(year,".Q",quarter)
    } else if(!is.null(month_num)){
      paste0(year,".",month_num)
    } else{
      stop("Either month or quarter must be defined.")
    }
    #Load or create workbook
    if(file.exists(file_path)){
      if(sheet_name %in% names(wb)){
        removeWorksheet(wb,sheet_name)
      }
    }
    #Add worksheet
    addWorksheet(wb,sheet_name,tabColour="#ADD8E6")
    #Write missouri_works
    writeData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=missouri_works,startRow=report_start_row)
    #Bold header row (row 4)
    header_style=createStyle(textDecoration="bold")
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_style,rows=report_start_row,cols=1:ncol(missouri_works),gridExpand=TRUE)
    #Freeze panes
    freezePane(wb,sheet=sheet_name,firstActiveRow=report_start_row+1,firstActiveCol=3)
    #Add filters on header row
    addFilter(wb,sheet=sheet_name,rows=report_start_row,cols=1:ncol(missouri_works))
    #Find all columns containing "Date" (case-insensitive)
    date_cols=grep("Date",colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE,ignore.case=FALSE)
    date_cols=setdiff(date_cols,"Count of Pay Date")
    date_style=createStyle(numFmt="DATE")
    for(col_name in date_cols){
      col_index=match(col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=date_style,rows=(report_start_row+1):(nrow(missouri_works)+report_start_row),
                cols=col_index,gridExpand=TRUE)
    }
    #Columns that exactly match
    exact_cols=c("Pay Rate","Gross Wages","Resident State Wages","Resident State SIT")
    #Columns containing these substrings
    contains_cols_patterns=c("Work State Wages","Work State SIT","Works Credit")
    #Find all columns containing any of the patterns
    contains_cols=unique(unlist(lapply(contains_cols_patterns,function(pattern){
      grep(pattern,colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE,ignore.case=TRUE)
    })))
    #Combine exact and contains columns
    accounting_cols=unique(c(exact_cols,contains_cols))
    #Create ACCOUNTING style
    accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
    #Apply the style to matching columns if they exist
    for(col_name in accounting_cols){
      if(col_name %in% colnames(missouri_works)){
        col_index=match(col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=accounting_style,rows=(report_start_row+1):(nrow(missouri_works)+report_start_row),
                  cols=col_index,gridExpand=TRUE)
      }
    }
    #Target columns for integer (no decimals) format
    int_cols=c("Total Hours Worked","Sum of Days in Pay Period","Count of Pay Date","Works Days Worked")
    #Create a style with zero decimals
    integer_style=createStyle(numFmt="0")
    for(col_name in int_cols){
      if(col_name %in% colnames(missouri_works)){
        col_index=match(col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=integer_style,rows=(report_start_row+1):(nrow(missouri_works)+report_start_row),
                  cols=col_index,gridExpand=TRUE)
      }
    }
    #Get column indices
    emp_status_col=match("Employee Status",colnames(missouri_works))
    classification_col=match("Classification",colnames(missouri_works))
    work_state_col=match("Work State",colnames(missouri_works))
    #Red text style
    red_text_style=createStyle(fontColour="#FF0000")
    #Rows with data
    data_rows=(report_start_row+1):(nrow(missouri_works)+report_start_row)
    #Conditional formatting for "Terminated" in Employee Status
    conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=emp_status_col,rows=data_rows,rule='=="Terminated"',
                          style=red_text_style,type="expression")
    #Conditional formatting for "Part-Time" in Classification
    conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=classification_col,rows=data_rows,rule='=="Part-Time"',
                          style=red_text_style,type="expression")
    #Conditional formatting for Work State not equal to "Missouri"
    #Get Excel column letter for Work State
    work_state_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(work_state_col)
    #Assume report_start_row = 4 means header is on row 4
    data_start_row=report_start_row+1 #so data starts at 5
    work_state_formula=paste0(work_state_col_letter,data_start_row,"<>\"Missouri\"")
    conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=work_state_col,rows=data_start_row:max(data_rows), #Apply from first data row onward
                          rule=work_state_formula,style=red_text_style,type="expression")
    if(!is.null(month)){
      start_date=as.Date(paste0(year,"-",match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name)),"-01"))
      end_date=ceiling_date(start_date,"month")-days(1)
    } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
      start_month=(quarter-1)*3+1
      start_date=as.Date(paste0(year,"-",sprintf("%02d",start_month),"-01"))
      end_date=ceiling_date(start_date %m+% months(3),"month")-days(1)
    } else{
      stop("Either month or quarter must be defined.")
    }
    mo_start_col=match("MO Works Start Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    mo_start_letter=openxlsx::int2col(mo_start_col)
    data_rows=(report_start_row+1):(nrow(missouri_works)+report_start_row)
    start_date_num=as.numeric(as.Date(start_date))+25569
    end_date_num=as.numeric(as.Date(end_date))+25569
    data_start_row=report_start_row+1
    formula=paste0("=AND(",mo_start_letter,data_start_row,">=",start_date_num,",",mo_start_letter,data_start_row,"<=",end_date_num,")")
    bold_green_style=createStyle(fontColour="#008000",textDecoration="bold")
    conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=mo_start_col,rows=data_rows,rule=formula,style=bold_green_style,
                          type="expression")
    #MO Works End Date column
    mo_end_col=match("MO Works End Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    mo_end_letter=openxlsx::int2col(mo_end_col)
    #Bold red style for end date
    bold_red_style=createStyle(fontColour="#FF0000",textDecoration="bold")
    #Same date range formula but applied to MO Works End Date column
    formula_end=paste0("=AND(",mo_end_letter,data_start_row,">=",start_date_num,",",mo_end_letter,data_start_row,"<=",end_date_num,")")
    conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=mo_end_col,rows=data_rows,rule=formula_end,style=bold_red_style,
                          type="expression")
    #Columns in your current sheet
    current_emp_id_col=match("Employee ID",colnames(missouri_works))
    gross_wages_col=match("Gross Wages",colnames(missouri_works))
    #Columns in "Combined Payroll Data" sheet
    combined_emp_id_col=match("Employee ID",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    combined_gross_wages_col=match("Gross Wages",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    cpd_paydate_col=match("Pay Date",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    #Convert column indices to Excel letters
    current_emp_id_letter=openxlsx::int2col(current_emp_id_col)
    gross_wages_letter=openxlsx::int2col(gross_wages_col)
    combined_emp_id_letter=openxlsx::int2col(combined_emp_id_col)
    combined_gross_wages_letter=openxlsx::int2col(combined_gross_wages_col)
    cpd_paydate_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_paydate_col)
    #Number of rows in your data (missouri_works)
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    #Exactly one of month or quarter must be defined
    if(!is.null(month) && nzchar(month)){
      #Month Mode
      mm=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
      stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
      yyyy=year
      start_yyyy=yyyy
      start_mm=mm
      if(mm==12){
        end_yyyy=yyyy+1
        end_mm=1
      } else{
        end_yyyy=yyyy
        end_mm=mm+1
      }
    } else if(!is.null(quarter) && quarter %in% 1:4){
      #Quarter Mode
      yyyy=year
      start_mm=c(1,4,7,10)[quarter]
      start_yyyy=yyyy
      end_mm=start_mm+3
      if(end_mm==13){
        end_mm=1
        end_yyyy=yyyy+1
      } else{
        end_yyyy=yyyy
      }
    } else{
      stop("You must define either `month` (full name) or `quarter` (1–4)")
    }
    #Build formula for each row without current sheet name on Employee ID cell:
    formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
      paste0("=SUMIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",combined_gross_wages_letter,":",combined_gross_wages_letter,",",
              "'Combined Payroll Data'!",combined_emp_id_letter,":",combined_emp_id_letter,",",current_emp_id_letter,r,",",
              "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",start_yyyy,",",start_mm,",1),",
              "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\"<\" & DATE(",end_yyyy,",",end_mm,",1)",")")
    })
    #Write formulas into the "Gross Wages" column on your current sheet
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=gross_wages_col,startRow=start_row)
    #Detect required columns
    #Current sheet (missouri_works)
    mw_emp_col=match("Employee ID",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!is.na(mw_emp_col))
    #Combined Payroll Data
    cpd_emp_col=match("Employee ID",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    cpd_paydate_col=match("Pay Date",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    cpd_wages_col=match("Work State Wages",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    cpd_state_col=match("Work State",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    stopifnot(!is.na(cpd_emp_col),!is.na(cpd_paydate_col),!is.na(cpd_wages_col),!is.na(cpd_state_col))
    #Convert to Excel column letters
    mw_emp_letter=openxlsx::int2col(mw_emp_col)
    cpd_emp_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_emp_col)
    cpd_paydate_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_paydate_col)
    cpd_wages_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_wages_col)
    cpd_state_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_state_col)
    #Find MM-YYYY Work State Wages columns
    pattern="^([A-Za-z]{3})-([0-9]{2}) Work State Wages$"
    wage_cols=grep(pattern,colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    #Loop through each MM-YYYY column
    for(col_name in wage_cols){
      #Extract MMM and YY
      m=regexec(pattern,col_name)
      parts=regmatches(col_name,m)[[1]]
      mon_str=parts[2] #e.g. "Jan"
      yy=as.integer(parts[3]) #e.g. 25
      #Convert month string → month number
      mm=match(tolower(mon_str),tolower(month.abb))
      stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
      #Convert YY → YYYY (assumes 2000s; adjust if needed)
      yyyy=2000+yy
      #Compute next month/year safely
      if(mm==12){
        next_mm=1
        next_yyyy=yyyy+1
      } else{
        next_mm=mm+1
        next_yyyy=yyyy
      }
      #Column index / letter in current sheet
      col_index=match(col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      #Build formulas row-by-row
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        paste0("=SUMIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_wages_letter,":",cpd_wages_letter,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",yyyy,",",mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\"<\" & DATE(",next_yyyy,",",next_mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_state_letter,":",cpd_state_letter,",","\"Missouri\"",")")
        })
      #Write formulas into the column
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=col_index,startRow=start_row)
    }
    #Detect required columns for SIT
    cpd_sit_col=match("Work State SIT",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    stopifnot(!is.na(cpd_sit_col))
    cpd_sit_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_sit_col)
    #Find MM-YYYY Work State SIT columns
    pattern_sit="^([A-Za-z]{3})-([0-9]{2}) Work State SIT$"
    sit_cols=grep(pattern_sit,colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
    #Loop through each MM-YYYY Work State SIT column
    for(col_name in sit_cols){
      #Extract MMM and YY
      m=regexec(pattern_sit,col_name)
      parts=regmatches(col_name,m)[[1]]
      mon_str=parts[2] #e.g. "Jan"
      yy=as.integer(parts[3]) #e.g. 25
      #Convert month string → month number
      mm=match(tolower(mon_str),tolower(month.abb))
      stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
      #Convert YY → YYYY (assumes 2000s; adjust if needed)
      yyyy=2000+yy
      #Compute next month/year safely
      if(mm==12){
        next_mm=1
        next_yyyy=yyyy+1
      } else{
        next_mm=mm+1
        next_yyyy=yyyy
      }
      #Column index / letter in current sheet
      col_index=match(col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      #Build formulas row-by-row
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        paste0("=SUMIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_sit_letter,":",cpd_sit_letter,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",yyyy,",",mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\"<\" & DATE(",next_yyyy,",",next_mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_state_letter,":",cpd_state_letter,",","\"Missouri\"",")")
        })
      #Write formulas into the column
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=col_index,startRow=start_row)
    }
    #Required columns for combined payroll
    cpd_wages_col=match("Work State Wages",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    stopifnot(!is.na(cpd_wages_col))
    cpd_wages_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_wages_col)
    #Find the "Work State Wages" column (exact name) in missouri_works
    wsw_col_index=match("Work State Wages",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!is.na(wsw_col_index))
    wsw_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(wsw_col_index)
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    if(!is.null(month) && nzchar(month)){
      #Convert full month name to month number
      mm=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
      stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
      yyyy=year
      #Compute next month/year safely
      if(mm==12){
        next_mm=1
        next_yyyy=yyyy+1
      } else{
        next_mm=mm+1
        next_yyyy=yyyy
      }
      #Generate formulas for each row
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        paste0("=SUMIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_wages_letter,":",cpd_wages_letter,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",yyyy,",",mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\"<\" & DATE(",next_yyyy,",",next_mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_state_letter,":",cpd_state_letter,",","\"Missouri\"",")")
      })
    } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        start_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(wsw_col_index-3)
        end_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(wsw_col_index-1)
        paste0("=SUM(",start_col_letter,r,":",end_col_letter,r,")")
      })
    } else{
      stop("Either 'month' or 'quarter' must be defined")
    }
    #Write the formulas into the "Work State Wages" column in missouri_works sheet
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=wsw_col_index,startRow=start_row)
    #Required columns for combined payroll (SIT)
    cpd_sit_col=match("Work State SIT",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    stopifnot(!is.na(cpd_sit_col))
    cpd_sit_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_sit_col)
    #Find the "Work State SIT" column (exact name) in missouri_works
    ws_sit_col_index=match("Work State SIT",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!is.na(ws_sit_col_index))
    ws_sit_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(ws_sit_col_index)
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    if(!is.null(month) && nzchar(month)){
      #Convert full month name to month number
      mm=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
      stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
      yyyy=year
      #Compute next month/year safely
      if(mm==12){
        next_mm=1
        next_yyyy=yyyy+1
      } else{
        next_mm=mm+1
        next_yyyy=yyyy
      }
      #Generate formulas for each row
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        paste0("=SUMIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_sit_letter,":",cpd_sit_letter,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",yyyy,",",mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\"<\" & DATE(",next_yyyy,",",next_mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_state_letter,":",cpd_state_letter,",","\"Missouri\"",")")
      })
    } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        start_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(ws_sit_col_index-3)
        end_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(ws_sit_col_index-1)
        paste0("=SUM(",start_col_letter,r,":",end_col_letter,r,")")
      })
    } else{
      stop("Either 'month' or 'quarter' must be defined")
    }
    #Write the formulas into the "Work State SIT" column in missouri_works sheet
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=ws_sit_col_index,startRow=start_row)
    #Columns to process: named list with combined payroll col and target missouri_works col
    cols_to_process=list("Resident State Wages"="Resident State Wages","Resident State SIT"="Resident State SIT",
                          "Total Hours Worked"="Total Hours Worked","Days in Pay Period"="Sum of Days in Pay Period")
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    for(col_name in names(cols_to_process)){
      #Find combined payroll column index & letter
      cpd_col_idx=match(col_name,colnames(combined_payroll_data))
      stopifnot(!is.na(cpd_col_idx))
      cpd_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_col_idx)
      #Find missouri_works target column index & letter
      target_col_name=cols_to_process[[col_name]]
      target_col_idx=match(target_col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      stopifnot(!is.na(target_col_idx))
      target_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(target_col_idx)
      #Generate formulas based on month or quarter
      if(!is.null(month) && nzchar(month)){
        mm=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
        stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
        yyyy=year
        if(mm==12){
          next_mm=1
          next_yyyy=yyyy+1
        } else{
          next_mm=mm+1
          next_yyyy=yyyy
        }
        formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
          paste0("=SUMIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_col_letter,":",cpd_col_letter,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",",
                  "\">=\" & DATE(",yyyy,",",mm,",1),","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",",
                  "\"<\" & DATE(",next_yyyy,",",next_mm,",1)",")")
        })
      } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
        quarter_start_month=(quarter-1)*3+1
        quarter_end_month=quarter_start_month+3
        formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
          paste0("=SUMIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_col_letter,":",cpd_col_letter,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",year,",",quarter_start_month,",1),",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",",
                  "\"<\" & DATE(",year+ifelse(quarter==4,1,0),",",quarter_end_month %% 12,",1)",")")
        })
      } else{
        stop("Either 'month' or 'quarter' must be defined")
      }
      #Write formulas to missouri_works sheet
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=target_col_idx,startRow=start_row)
    }
    #Columns to process for MINIFS
    min_cols_to_process=list("Pay Period End Date"="Min of Pay Period End Date","Pay Date"="Min of Pay Date")
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    for(payroll_col_name in names(min_cols_to_process)){
      #Find combined payroll column index & letter
      cpd_col_idx=match(payroll_col_name,colnames(combined_payroll_data))
      stopifnot(!is.na(cpd_col_idx))
      cpd_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_col_idx)
      #Find missouri_works target column index & letter
      target_col_name=min_cols_to_process[[payroll_col_name]]
      target_col_idx=match(target_col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      stopifnot(!is.na(target_col_idx))
      target_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(target_col_idx)
      #Build formulas depending on month or quarter
      if(!is.null(month) && nzchar(month)){
        mm=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
        stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
        yyyy=year
        if(mm==12){
          next_mm=1
          next_yyyy=yyyy+1
        } else{
          next_mm=mm+1
          next_yyyy=yyyy
        }
        formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
          paste0("=_xlfn.MINIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_col_letter,":",cpd_col_letter,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",yyyy,",",mm,",1),",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\"<\" & DATE(",next_yyyy,",",next_mm,",1)",")")
        })
      } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
        quarter_start_month=(quarter-1)*3+1
        quarter_end_month=quarter_start_month+3
        formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
          paste0("=_xlfn.MINIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_col_letter,":",cpd_col_letter,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",year,",",quarter_start_month,",1),",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",",
                  "\"<\" & DATE(",year+ifelse(quarter==4,1,0),",",quarter_end_month %% 12,",1)",")")
        })
      } else{
        stop("Either 'month' or 'quarter' must be defined")
      }
      #Write formulas into target missouri_works column
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=target_col_idx,startRow=start_row)
    }
    #Columns to process for MAXIFS
    max_cols_to_process=list("Pay Period End Date"="Max of Pay Period End Date","Pay Date"="Max of Pay Date")
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    for(payroll_col_name in names(max_cols_to_process)){
      #Find combined payroll column index & letter
      cpd_col_idx=match(payroll_col_name,colnames(combined_payroll_data))
      stopifnot(!is.na(cpd_col_idx))
      cpd_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_col_idx)
      #Find missouri_works target column index & letter
      target_col_name=max_cols_to_process[[payroll_col_name]]
      target_col_idx=match(target_col_name, colnames(missouri_works))
      stopifnot(!is.na(target_col_idx))
      target_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(target_col_idx)
      #Build formulas depending on month or quarter
      if(!is.null(month) && nzchar(month)){
        mm=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
        stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
        yyyy=year
        if(mm==12){
          next_mm=1
          next_yyyy=yyyy+1
        } else{
          next_mm=mm+1
          next_yyyy=yyyy
        }
        formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
          paste0("=_xlfn.MAXIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_col_letter,":",cpd_col_letter,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",yyyy,",",mm,",1),",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\"<\" & DATE(",next_yyyy,",",next_mm,",1)",")")
        })
      } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
        quarter_start_month=(quarter-1)*3+1
        quarter_end_month=quarter_start_month+3
        formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
          paste0("=_xlfn.MAXIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_col_letter,":",cpd_col_letter,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",year,",",quarter_start_month,",1),",
                  "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",",
                  "\"<\" & DATE(",year+ifelse(quarter==4,1,0),",",quarter_end_month %% 12,",1)",")")
        })
      } else{
        stop("Either 'month' or 'quarter' must be defined")
      }
      #Write formulas into target missouri_works column
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=target_col_idx,startRow=start_row)
    }
    #Find the column indexes and letters for these two columns
    min_pay_period_end_col_idx=match("Min of Pay Period End Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!is.na(min_pay_period_end_col_idx))
    min_pay_period_end_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(min_pay_period_end_col_idx)
    min_pay_period_start_col_idx=match("Min of Pay Period Start Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!is.na(min_pay_period_start_col_idx))
    min_pay_period_start_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(min_pay_period_start_col_idx)
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
      paste0("=",min_pay_period_end_col_letter,r," - 13")
    })
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=min_pay_period_start_col_idx,startRow=start_row)
    #Find required columns
    cpd_paydate_col=match("Pay Date",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
    stopifnot(!is.na(cpd_paydate_col))
    cpd_paydate_letter=openxlsx::int2col(cpd_paydate_col)
    #Find "Count of Pay Date" column in missouri_works
    count_paydate_col_idx=match("Count of Pay Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!is.na(count_paydate_col_idx))
    count_paydate_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(count_paydate_col_idx)
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    if(!is.null(month) && nzchar(month)){
      mm=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
      stopifnot(!is.na(mm))
      yyyy=year
      if(mm==12){
        next_mm=1
        next_yyyy=yyyy+1
      } else{
        next_mm=mm+1
        next_yyyy=yyyy
      }
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        paste0("=COUNTIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",yyyy,",",mm,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\"<\" & DATE(",next_yyyy,",",next_mm,",1)",")")
      })
    } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
      quarter_start_month=(quarter-1)*3+1
      quarter_end_month=quarter_start_month+3
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        paste0("=COUNTIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_emp_letter,":",cpd_emp_letter,",",mw_emp_letter,r,",",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",","\">=\" & DATE(",year,",",quarter_start_month,",1),",
                "'Combined Payroll Data'!",cpd_paydate_letter,":",cpd_paydate_letter,",",
                "\"<\" & DATE(",year+ifelse(quarter==4,1,0),",",quarter_end_month %% 12,",1)",")")
      })
    } else{
      stop("Either 'month' or 'quarter' must be defined")
    }
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=count_paydate_col_idx,startRow=start_row)
    #Helper to convert column number to Excel letter
    int2col=function(n) openxlsx::int2col(n)
    #Find previous sheet as before (same code as you already have)
    previous_sheet=NULL
    all_sheets=names(wb)
    period_sheets=all_sheets[grepl("^\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}$",all_sheets)|grepl("^\\d{4}\\.Q[1-4]$",all_sheets)]
    sheet_index=function(s){
      if(grepl("^\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}$",s)){
        yr=as.numeric(substr(s,1,4))
        mo=as.numeric(substr(s,6,7))
        yr*12+mo
      } else if(grepl("^\\d{4}\\.Q[1-4]$",s)){
        yr=as.numeric(substr(s,1,4))
        q=as.numeric(substr(s,7,7))
        yr*12+(q-1)*3+1
      } else{
        NA
      }
    }
    sheet_df=data.frame(sheet=period_sheets,index=sapply(period_sheets,sheet_index),stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
    current_index=if(!is.null(month)){
      year*12+match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
    } else{
      year*12+(quarter-1)*3+1
    }
    prior_sheets=sheet_df[sheet_df$index<current_index,]
    if(nrow(prior_sheets)>0){
      previous_sheet=prior_sheets$sheet[which.max(prior_sheets$index)]
    }
    #Find columns for Start Date
    start_col=match("MO Works Start Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    emp_col=match("Employee ID",colnames(missouri_works))
    hire_col=match("Hire Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    rehire_col=match("Rehire Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    start_col_letter=int2col(start_col)
    emp_col_letter=int2col(emp_col)
    hire_col_letter=int2col(hire_col)
    rehire_col_letter=int2col(rehire_col)
    #Find columns for End Date
    end_col=match("MO Works End Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    term_col=match("Termination Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    end_col_letter=int2col(end_col)
    term_col_letter=int2col(term_col)
    #Compute current period start/end as Excel serial numbers
    if(!is.null(month)){
      month_num=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
      period_start=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,month_num))
      period_end=seq(period_start,length=2,by="1 month")[2]-1
    } else{
      q_start_month=(quarter-1)*3+1
      period_start=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,q_start_month))
      period_end=seq(period_start,length=2,by="3 months")[2]-1
    }
    #Convert R Date to Excel DATE(YYYY,MM,DD) formula string
    date_to_excel_date_formula=function(d){
      sprintf("DATE(%d,%d,%d)",as.integer(format(d,"%Y")),as.integer(format(d,"%m")),as.integer(format(d,"%d")))
    }
    period_start_date_formula=date_to_excel_date_formula(period_start)
    period_end_date_formula=date_to_excel_date_formula(period_end)
    #Convert Excel column letters to number
    col2num=function(col){
      s=strsplit(col,"")[[1]]
      sum(sapply(s,function(x) utf8ToInt(x)-utf8ToInt("A")+1)*26^(rev(seq_along(s)-1)))
    }
    #Trim spaces in sheet names
    previous_sheet=trimws(previous_sheet)
    sheet_name=trimws(sheet_name)
    #Month -> Quarter: subtract 6 columns
    if((grepl("^\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}$",previous_sheet)||grepl("^\\d{2}\\.\\d{4}$",previous_sheet)) &&
        (grepl("^\\d{4}\\.Q[1-4]$",sheet_name)||grepl("^Q[1-4]\\.\\d{4}$",sheet_name))){
      #Shift start_col_letter
      shift_start=col2num(start_col_letter)-6
      if(shift_start<1) shift_start=1
      start_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(shift_start)
      #Shift end_col_letter
      shift_end=col2num(end_col_letter)-6
      if(shift_end<1) shift_end=1
      end_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(shift_end)
    }
    #Quarter -> Month: add 6 columns
    g=function(pattern,x){
      if(length(x)==0||is.na(x)) return(FALSE)
      grepl(pattern,x)
    }
    if((g("^\\d{4}\\.Q[1-4]$",previous_sheet)||g("^Q[1-4]\\.\\d{4}$",previous_sheet)) &&
        (g("^\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}$",sheet_name)||g("^\\d{2}\\.\\d{4}$",sheet_name))){
      start_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(col2num(start_col_letter)+6)
      end_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(col2num(end_col_letter)+6)
    }
    #Modified build_start_date_formulas function
    build_start_date_formulas=function(rows,current_data,prev_report){
      has_prev=!(is.null(previous_sheet)||length(previous_sheet)==0||is.null(prev_report)||length(prev_report)==0)
      if(has_prev){
        #Convert Excel rows to R data frame indices
        r_indices=rows-start_row+1
        formulas=sapply(seq_along(rows),function(i){
          current_emp_id=current_data[["Employee ID"]][r_indices[i]]
          emp_exists_in_prev=length(current_emp_id)>0 && !is.na(current_emp_id) && current_emp_id %in% prev_report[["Employee ID"]]
          if(i<=3){
            cat("Row",rows[i],"- Emp ID:",current_emp_id,"- Exists in prev?",emp_exists_in_prev,"\n")
          }
          if(is.na(emp_exists_in_prev)) emp_exists_in_prev=FALSE
          if(emp_exists_in_prev){
            paste0("=_xlfn.IF(AND(",rehire_col_letter,rows[i],"<>\"\",",rehire_col_letter,rows[i],"<=",
                    period_end_date_formula,"),",rehire_col_letter,rows[i],",","_xlfn.IF(AND(",hire_col_letter,rows[i],
                    ">=",period_start_date_formula,",",hire_col_letter,rows[i],"<=",period_end_date_formula,"),",
                    hire_col_letter,rows[i],",","_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",emp_col_letter,rows[i],",'",previous_sheet,"'!", 
                    emp_col_letter,":",emp_col_letter,",'",previous_sheet,"'!", start_col_letter,":",start_col_letter,
                    ",\"\")))")
          } else{
            paste0("=_xlfn.IF(",rehire_col_letter,rows[i],"<>\"\",",rehire_col_letter,rows[i],",",hire_col_letter,rows[i],")")
          }
        })
        return(formulas)
      } else{
        #No previous sheet OR prev_report NULL/empty
        paste0("=_xlfn.IF(",rehire_col_letter,rows,"<>\"\",",rehire_col_letter,rows,",",hire_col_letter,rows,")")
      }
    }
    build_end_date_formulas=function(rows,current_data,prev_report){
      has_prev=!(is.null(previous_sheet)||length(previous_sheet)==0||is.null(prev_report)||length(prev_report)==0)
      if(has_prev){
        #Convert Excel rows to R data frame indices
        r_indices=rows-start_row+1
        formulas=sapply(seq_along(rows),function(i){
          current_emp_id=current_data[["Employee ID"]][r_indices[i]]
          emp_exists_in_prev=length(current_emp_id)>0 && !is.na(current_emp_id) && current_emp_id %in% prev_report[["Employee ID"]]
          if(i<=3){
            cat("Row",rows[i],"- Emp ID:",current_emp_id,"- Exists in prev?",emp_exists_in_prev,"\n")
          }
          if(is.na(emp_exists_in_prev)) emp_exists_in_prev=FALSE
          if(emp_exists_in_prev){
            #Employee exists in previous sheet - use XLOOKUP formula
            paste0("=_xlfn.IF(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",emp_col_letter,rows[i],",'",previous_sheet,"'!",emp_col_letter,":",emp_col_letter,
                    ",'",previous_sheet,"'!",end_col_letter,":",end_col_letter,",\"\")=\"\",",
                    "_xlfn.IF(",term_col_letter,rows[i],"<>\"\",",term_col_letter,rows[i],",\"\"),",
                    "_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",emp_col_letter,rows[i],",'",previous_sheet,"'!",emp_col_letter,":",emp_col_letter,
                    ",'",previous_sheet,"'!",end_col_letter,":",end_col_letter,",\"\"))")
          } else{
            #Employee doesn't exist in previous sheet - direct reference
            paste0("=_xlfn.IF(OR(ISBLANK(",term_col_letter,rows[i],"),",term_col_letter,rows[i],"=\"\"),\"\",",
                    term_col_letter,rows[i],")")
          }
        })
        return(formulas)
      } else{
        #No previous sheet OR prev_report NULL/empty
        paste0("=_xlfn.IF(OR(ISBLANK(",term_col_letter,rows,"),",term_col_letter,rows,"=\"\"),\"\",",
                term_col_letter,rows,")")
      }
    }
    #Convert R Date to Excel DATE(YYYY,MM,DD) formula string
    date_to_excel_date_formula=function(d){
      sprintf("DATE(%d,%d,%d)",as.integer(format(d,"%Y")),as.integer(format(d,"%m")),as.integer(format(d,"%d")))
    }
    period_start_date_formula=date_to_excel_date_formula(period_start)
    period_end_date_formula=date_to_excel_date_formula(period_end)
    #Write formulas for "MO Works Start Date" only in blank rows
    start_blank_rows=which(is.na(missouri_works[["MO Works Start Date"]])|
                      trimws(as.character(missouri_works[["MO Works Start Date"]]))=="")
    start_excel_rows=start_row+start_blank_rows-1
    if(length(start_excel_rows)>0){
      start_formulas=build_start_date_formulas(start_excel_rows,current_data=missouri_works,prev_report=prev_report)
      for(i in seq_along(start_excel_rows)){
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=start_formulas[i],startCol=start_col,startRow=start_excel_rows[i])
      }
    }
    #Write formulas for "MO Works End Date" only in blank rows
    end_blank_rows=which(is.na(missouri_works[["MO Works End Date"]])|
                    trimws(as.character(missouri_works[["MO Works End Date"]]))=="")
    end_excel_rows=start_row+end_blank_rows-1
    if(length(end_excel_rows)>0){
      end_formulas=build_end_date_formulas(end_excel_rows,current_data=missouri_works,prev_report=prev_report)
      for(i in seq_along(end_excel_rows)){
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=end_formulas[i],startCol=end_col,startRow=end_excel_rows[i])
      }
    }
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    #Find all "Works Credit" columns
    works_credit_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Works Credit$",colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
    for(credit_col_name in works_credit_cols){
      #Extract MMM-YY prefix, e.g. "Jan-26"
      prefix=sub(" Works Credit$","",credit_col_name)
      #Determine corresponding Status and Work State SIT column names
      status_col_name=paste0(prefix," Status")
      #Determine SIT column name
      if(!is.null(quarter)){
        sit_col_name=paste0(prefix," Work State SIT")
      } else{
        sit_col_name="Work State SIT"
      }
      #Find their column indices
      status_col_idx=match(status_col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      sit_col_idx=match(sit_col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      credit_col_idx=match(credit_col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      #Skip if either Status or SIT column is missing
      if(is.na(status_col_idx)||is.na(sit_col_idx)||is.na(credit_col_idx)) next
      #Get Excel column letters
      status_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(status_col_idx)
      sit_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(sit_col_idx)
      #Build formulas for all rows in this column
      formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
        paste0("=IF(",status_col_letter,r,"=\"Eligible\",",sit_col_letter,r,",0)")
      })
      #Write formulas to the sheet
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=credit_col_idx,startRow=start_row,array=FALSE)
    }
    #Compute period start/end dates (Date class)
    if(!is.null(month)){
      month_num=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
      period_start=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,month_num))
      period_end=seq(period_start,length=2,by="1 month")[2]-1
    } else{
      q_start_month=(quarter-1)*3+1
      period_start=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,q_start_month))
      period_end=seq(period_start,length=2,by="3 months")[2]-1
    }
    #Convert period boundaries to Excel serial numbers
    period_start_xl=as.numeric(period_start)
    period_end_xl=as.numeric(period_end)
    #Get column indices
    start_date_col_idx=match("MO Works Start Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    end_date_col_idx=match("MO Works End Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    works_days_col_idx=match("Works Days Worked",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!any(is.na(c(start_date_col_idx,end_date_col_idx,works_days_col_idx))))
    #Convert to Excel column letters
    start_date_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(start_date_col_idx)
    end_date_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(end_date_col_idx)
    works_days_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(works_days_col_idx)
    #Convert R Date to Excel DATE(yyyy,mm,dd) formula string
    date_to_excel_date_formula=function(d){
      sprintf("DATE(%d,%d,%d)",as.integer(format(d,"%Y")),as.integer(format(d,"%m")),as.integer(format(d,"%d")))
    }
    #Convert your period start and end dates
    period_start_date_formula=date_to_excel_date_formula(period_start)
    period_end_date_formula=date_to_excel_date_formula(period_end)
    #Build Excel formulas with DATE()
    formulas=sapply(start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),function(r){
      paste0("=MAX(0, MIN(IF(ISBLANK(",end_date_col_letter,r,"), ",period_end_date_formula,", ",end_date_col_letter,r,"), ",
              period_end_date_formula,") - MAX(",start_date_col_letter,r,", ",period_start_date_formula,"))")
    })
    #Write formulas to 'Works Days Worked' column
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=works_days_col_idx,startRow=start_row,array=FALSE)
    #Only run if previous period data is available
    if(exists("prev_report") && is.data.frame(prev_report) && nrow(prev_report)>0){
      #Current columns
      curr_emp_col=which(names(missouri_works)=="Employee ID")
      curr_comments_old_col=which(names(missouri_works)=="Comments Old")
      curr_emp_letter=int2col(curr_emp_col)
      #Previous columns (from prev_report df)
      prev_emp_col=which(names(prev_report)=="Employee ID")
      prev_comments_col=which(names(prev_report)=="Comments")
      prev_emp_letter=int2col(prev_emp_col)
      prev_comments_letter=int2col(prev_comments_col)
      #Ensure sheet name safe in Excel
      prev_sheet_ref=paste0("'",prev_period,"'")
      start_row=report_start_row+1
      if(new_employee_id_code==FALSE && "New Employee ID" %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data) 
                                      && "Old Employee ID" %in% colnames(missouri_works)){
        curr_old_emp_id_col=which(names(missouri_works)=="Old Employee ID")
        curr_old_emp_id_letter=int2col(curr_old_emp_id_col)
        for(r in start_row:(nrow(missouri_works)+1)){
          formula=paste0("=_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",curr_old_emp_id_letter,r,",",prev_sheet_ref,"!",prev_emp_letter,":",
                          prev_emp_letter,",",prev_sheet_ref,"!",prev_comments_letter,":",prev_comments_letter,
                          ",","\"\"",")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula,startCol=curr_comments_old_col,startRow=r)
        }
      } else{
        #Write formulas
        for(r in start_row:(nrow(missouri_works)+1)){
          formula=paste0("=_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",curr_emp_letter,r,",",prev_sheet_ref,"!",prev_emp_letter,":",prev_emp_letter,
                          ",",prev_sheet_ref,"!",prev_comments_letter,":",prev_comments_letter,",","\"\"",")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula,startCol=curr_comments_old_col,startRow=r)
        }
      }
    }
    #Current column indices
    curr_comments_col=which(names(missouri_works)=="Comments")
    curr_comments_old_col=which(names(missouri_works)=="Comments Old")
    curr_comments_new_col=which(names(missouri_works)=="Comments New")
    curr_comments_letter=int2col(curr_comments_col)
    curr_comments_old_letter=int2col(curr_comments_old_col)
    curr_comments_new_letter=int2col(curr_comments_new_col)
    #Write Comments formulas
    for(r in start_row:(nrow(missouri_works)+1)){
      formula=paste0("=IF(AND(LEN(",curr_comments_old_letter,r,")>0,LEN(",curr_comments_new_letter,r,")>0),",
                      curr_comments_old_letter,r,"&\"; \"&",curr_comments_new_letter,r,",",
                      "IF(LEN(",curr_comments_old_letter,r,")>0,",curr_comments_old_letter,r,",",
                      "IF(LEN(",curr_comments_new_letter,r,")>0,",curr_comments_new_letter,r,",\"\")))")
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula,startCol=curr_comments_col,startRow=r)
    }
    #Hide columns by number
    setColWidths(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=c(curr_comments_old_col,curr_comments_new_col), #Numeric column indexes
                  widths="hidden")
    #Find the column index of "Comments"
    comments_col_idx=match("Comments",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!is.na(comments_col_idx))
    #Find the column index of "Comments"
    comments_col_idx=match("Comments",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!is.na(comments_col_idx))
    header_row=report_start_row
    data_start_row=header_row+1
    data_end_row=start_row+n_rows-1 #Adjust if your data starts at start_row
    #Set column width for Comments column
    setColWidths(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=comments_col_idx,widths=40)
    #Define styles
    header_style=createStyle(fgFill="#B0B0B0", #White Background 1 Darker 25% approx
                              valign="center",fontColour="black",wrapText=TRUE,border="Bottom")
    body_style=createStyle(fgFill="#E0E0E0", #Gray Accent 3 Lighter 80% approx
                            textDecoration="italic",wrapText=TRUE)
    #Apply header style to the header cell
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_style,rows=header_row,cols=comments_col_idx,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
    #Apply body style to data rows below header
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=body_style,rows=data_start_row:data_end_row,cols=comments_col_idx,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
    #Create middle align style
    middle_align_style=createStyle(valign="center")
    #Apply to entire sheet
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=middle_align_style,rows=1:(nrow(missouri_works)+report_start_row),
              cols=1:ncol(missouri_works),gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    start_row=report_start_row+1 #Data start row
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    #Patterns to apply same styling to
    patterns=c("Work State Wages","Work State SIT")
    for(pattern in patterns){
      #Find all columns matching "MMM-YY {pattern}"
      cols=grep(paste0("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} ",pattern,"$"),colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
      if(length(cols)==0) next #Skip if none found
      col_indices=match(cols,colnames(missouri_works))
      #Define styles
      header_style=createStyle(fgFill="#ED7D31") #Orange fill for header
      body_style=createStyle(fgFill="#FFE7D6") #Light orange fill for body
      #Apply header style (row 3)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_style,rows=report_start_row,cols=col_indices,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
      #Apply body style (rows below header)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=body_style,rows=start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),cols=col_indices,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    }
    start_row=report_start_row+1
    n_rows=nrow(missouri_works)
    #MO Works Start Date
    start_date_col_idx=match("MO Works Start Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    if(!is.na(start_date_col_idx)){
      header_style_start=createStyle(fgFill="#28A745") #Green header
      body_style_start=createStyle(fgFill="#C6EFCE") #Light green body
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_style_start,rows=report_start_row,cols=start_date_col_idx,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=body_style_start,rows=start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),cols=start_date_col_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    }
    #MO Works End Date
    end_date_col_idx=match("MO Works End Date",colnames(missouri_works))
    if(!is.na(end_date_col_idx)){
      header_style_end=createStyle(fgFill="#DC3545") #Red header
      body_style_end=createStyle(fgFill="#F8D7DA") #Light red body
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_style_end,rows=report_start_row,cols=end_date_col_idx,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=body_style_end,rows=start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),cols=end_date_col_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    }
    #MMM-YY Works Credit columns
    works_credit_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Works Credit$",colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
    if(length(works_credit_cols)>0){
      works_credit_col_indices=match(works_credit_cols,colnames(missouri_works))
      #Styles
      header_style_credit=createStyle(fgFill="#6F42C1",fontColour="white")
      body_style_credit=createStyle(fgFill="#E5D4F6")
      highlight_style=createStyle(fgFill="#C6EFCE",fontColour="#006100",textDecoration="bold",border="TopBottomLeftRight",
                                  borderColour="#00B050",borderStyle="thick")
      #This style is for sum row without bottom border
      highlight_style_no_bottom=createStyle(fgFill="#C6EFCE",fontColour="#006100",textDecoration="bold",
                                            border=c("top","left","right"),borderColour="#00B050",borderStyle="thick")
      #Apply header and body styles as before
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_style_credit,rows=report_start_row,cols=works_credit_col_indices,
                gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=body_style_credit,rows=start_row:(start_row+n_rows-1),
                cols=works_credit_col_indices,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      #Rows above header row
      text_row=report_start_row-2
      sum_formula_row=report_start_row-1
      for(i in seq_along(works_credit_col_indices)){
        col_idx=works_credit_col_indices[i]
        col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(col_idx)
        col_name=works_credit_cols[i]
        #Extract MMM and YY from col_name
        #Example: "Jan-26 Works Credit"
        mmyy=sub(" Works Credit$","",col_name)
        #Convert MMM-YY to "MMM YYYY"
        mmyy_parts=unlist(strsplit(mmyy,"-"))
        mon_abbr=mmyy_parts[1]
        year_two_digit=mmyy_parts[2]
        #Convert 2-digit year to 4-digit year assuming 2000+ (adjust if needed)
        year_full=as.numeric(paste0("20",year_two_digit))
        text_label=paste0(mon_abbr," ",year_full," Works Credit")
        #Write text label two rows above header
        writeData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=text_label,startCol=col_idx,startRow=text_row,colNames=FALSE,rowNames=FALSE,
                  withFilter=FALSE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=highlight_style,rows=text_row,cols=col_idx,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
        #Write sum formula one row above header
        sum_formula=paste0("=SUM(",col_letter,start_row,":",col_letter,start_row+n_rows-1,")")
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sum_formula,startCol=col_idx,startRow=sum_formula_row)
        #Create an accounting number format style
        accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
        #Then apply it to the sum_formula_row for all relevant columns
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=highlight_style_no_bottom,rows=sum_formula_row,cols=col_idx,gridExpand=FALSE,
                  stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=accounting_style,rows=sum_formula_row,cols=works_credit_col_indices,
                  gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
    }
    #Get all "MMM-YY Status" columns in missouri_works
    all_status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Status$",names(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
    #Build exclusion list based on defined objects
    exclude_cols=character(0)
    if(exists("month") && !is.null(month) && exists("year") && !is.null(year)){
      mon_abbrev=substr(month,1,3)
      yr_abbrev=substr(as.character(year),3,4)
      exclude_cols=paste0(mon_abbrev,"-",yr_abbrev," Status")
    } else if(exists("quarter") && !is.null(quarter) && exists("year") && !is.null(year)){
      quarter_months_map=list("1"=c("Jan","Feb","Mar"),"2"=c("Apr","May","Jun"),"3"=c("Jul","Aug","Sep"),"4"=c("Oct","Nov","Dec"))
      quarter_val=as.character(quarter[1]) #force scalar
      quarter_months=quarter_months_map[[quarter_val]]
      yr_abbrev=substr(as.character(year),3,4)
      exclude_cols=paste0(quarter_months,"-",yr_abbrev," Status")
    }
    #Build the final list (all status cols except exclusions)
    status_cols_list=setdiff(all_status_cols,exclude_cols)
    #Define the styles
    status_header_style=createStyle(fgFill="#E6F2FA", #very pale blue background
                                    fontColour="#808080", #light grey text
                                    textDecoration="bold",border="Bottom",borderStyle="thick")
    status_body_style=createStyle(fgFill="#E6F2FA", #same pale blue background
                                  fontColour="#808080") #light grey text
    #Apply styles to the status columns
    for(col_name in status_cols_list){
      col_index=which(colnames(missouri_works)==col_name)
      #Header (row 1)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=status_header_style,rows=report_start_row,cols=col_index,gridExpand=TRUE)  
      #Body (rows 2:n)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=status_body_style,rows=start_row:(nrow(missouri_works)+start_row-1),
                cols=col_index,gridExpand=TRUE)
    }
    if(file.exists(file_path)){
      #Read prior sheet headers only
      recent_df=prior_df
      #Detect status columns in prior sheet
      prior_status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Status$",names(recent_df),value=TRUE)
      #Match status columns to current missouri_works
      current_status_cols=intersect(prior_status_cols,names(missouri_works))
      if(length(current_status_cols)>0){
        #Determine Employee ID column to use
        join_col=if("New Employee ID" %in% names(missouri_works) && !("New Employee ID" %in% names(recent_df))){
          "New Employee ID"
        } else{
          "Employee ID"
        }
        #Convert Employee IDs to character
        missouri_works[[join_col]]=as.character(missouri_works[[join_col]])
        recent_df[["Employee ID"]]=as.character(recent_df[["Employee ID"]])
        #Map Excel column letters
        prior_emp_idx=which(names(recent_df)=="Employee ID")
        current_emp_idx=which(names(missouri_works)==join_col)
        prior_emp_letter=openxlsx::int2col(prior_emp_idx)
        current_emp_letter=openxlsx::int2col(current_emp_idx)
        prior_status_idx=match(current_status_cols,names(recent_df))
        prior_status_letters=openxlsx::int2col(prior_status_idx)
        current_status_idx=match(current_status_cols,names(missouri_works))
        current_status_letters=openxlsx::int2col(current_status_idx)
        #Excel row numbers
        rows=seq_len(nrow(missouri_works))+start_row-1
        if(new_employee_id_code==FALSE && "New Employee ID" %in% colnames(combined_payroll_data)
                                        && "Old Employee ID" %in% colnames(missouri_works)){
          curr_old_emp_id_col=which(names(missouri_works)=="Old Employee ID")
          curr_old_emp_id_letter=int2col(curr_old_emp_id_col)
          for(j in seq_along(current_status_cols)){
            formulas=paste0("=_xlfn.IF(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",curr_old_emp_id_letter,rows,",","'",most_recent_sheet,"'!",
                              prior_emp_letter,":",prior_emp_letter,",","'",most_recent_sheet,"'!",prior_status_letters[j],
                              ":",prior_status_letters[j],",\"\"",")=\"\",\"\",_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",curr_old_emp_id_letter,rows,",",
                              "'",most_recent_sheet,"'!",prior_emp_letter,":",prior_emp_letter,",","'",most_recent_sheet,
                              "'!",prior_status_letters[j],":",prior_status_letters[j],",\"\"","))")
            openxlsx::writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=current_status_idx[j],startRow=start_row)
          }
        } else{
          #Write XLOOKUP formulas into workbook
          for(j in seq_along(current_status_cols)){
            formulas=paste0("=_xlfn.IF(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",current_emp_letter,rows,",","'",most_recent_sheet,"'!",
                            prior_emp_letter,":",prior_emp_letter,",","'",most_recent_sheet,"'!",prior_status_letters[j],
                            ":",prior_status_letters[j],",\"\"",")=\"\",\"\",_xlfn.XLOOKUP(",current_emp_letter, rows,",",
                            "'",most_recent_sheet,"'!",prior_emp_letter,":",prior_emp_letter,",","'",most_recent_sheet,
                            "'!",prior_status_letters[j],":",prior_status_letters[j],",\"\"","))")
            openxlsx::writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formulas,startCol=current_status_idx[j],startRow=start_row)
          }
        }
      }
    }
    if("Old Employee ID" %in% colnames(missouri_works)){
      old_id_col=which(colnames(missouri_works)=="Old Employee ID")
      setColWidths(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=old_id_col,widths="hidden")
    }
    if("New Employee ID" %in% colnames(missouri_works)){
      new_employee_col=which(colnames(missouri_works)=="New Employee ID")
      setColWidths(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=new_employee_col,widths="hidden")
    }
    #Format date as "MMM-YY"
    fmt_month_year=function(date){
      format(date,"%b-%y")
    }
    header_style=createStyle(fgFill="#00B0F0")
    body_style=createStyle(fgFill="#A3E7FF")
    header_row=report_start_row
    data_rows=(header_row+1):(header_row+n_rows) #Adjust n_rows accordingly
    #Determine the relevant status columns based on current period
    status_col_names=c()
    if(!is.null(month)){
      #Single month period
      period_start=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))))
      status_col_names=paste0(fmt_month_year(period_start)," Status")
    } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
      #Quarter: three months in sequence
      q_start_month=(quarter-1)*3+1
      period_months=seq(as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,q_start_month)),by="month",length.out=3)
      status_col_names=paste0(sapply(period_months,fmt_month_year)," Status")
    }
    #Find matching columns in missouri_works
    col_names=colnames(missouri_works)
    status_cols_idx=match(status_col_names,col_names)
    status_cols_idx=status_cols_idx[!is.na(status_cols_idx)]
    status_cols_letters=openxlsx::int2col(status_cols_idx)
    #Apply styles for headers and body cells only for those columns
    for(col_letter in status_cols_letters){
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_style,rows=header_row,cols=match(col_letter,openxlsx::int2col(1:ncol(missouri_works))),
                gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=body_style,rows=data_rows,cols=match(col_letter,openxlsx::int2col(1:ncol(missouri_works))),
                gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    }
    #Define styles for Eligible and Ineligible
    green_text=createStyle(fontColour="#008000") #Green
    red_text=createStyle(fontColour="#FF0000") #Red
    for(col in status_cols_idx){ #status_cols_idx from previous code
      col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(col)
      #Highlight cells exactly equal to "Eligible"
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=col,rows=data_rows,rule=paste0("=",col_letter,data_rows[1],"=\"Eligible\""),
                            style=green_text,type="expression")
      #Highlight cells containing "Ineligible" anywhere
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=col,rows=data_rows,rule=paste0("=ISNUMBER(SEARCH(\"Ineligible\",",col_letter,data_rows[1],"))"),
                            style=red_text,type="expression")
    }
    #Find the baseline number for the current company
    baseline_number=dplyr::case_when(period_start>=baseline_info$`Start Date 1` &
                                      period_end<=baseline_info$`End Date 1`~baseline_info$`Baseline 1`,
                                      period_start>=baseline_info$`Start Date 2` &
                                      period_end<=baseline_info$`End Date 2`~baseline_info$`Baseline 2`,TRUE~NA_real_)
    if(length(baseline_number)==0) baseline_number=0 #Fallback if no match
    #Define styles
    baseline_actual_style=createStyle(fontColour="#C65911",fgFill="#F2F2F2")
    baseline_required_style=createStyle(fgFill="#F2F2F2")
    green_text_style=createStyle(fontColour="#008000")
    #Rows
    header_row=report_start_row
    eligible_count_row=header_row-1
    baseline_required_row=eligible_count_row-1
    baseline_actual_row=baseline_required_row-1
    baseline_text=paste0("Baseline (Required): ",ifelse(is.na(baseline_number),0,baseline_number))
    for(col in status_cols_idx){
      col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(col)
      #Write Baseline (Actual) formula with styling
      baseline_actual_formula=paste0('="Baseline (Actual): " & COUNTIF(',
                                      col_letter,(header_row+1),':',col_letter,max(data_rows),',"Baseline")')
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=baseline_actual_formula,startCol=col,startRow=baseline_actual_row)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=baseline_actual_style,cols=col,rows=baseline_actual_row,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
      #Write Baseline (Required) text with background fill
      writeData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=baseline_text,startCol=col,startRow=baseline_required_row)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=baseline_required_style,cols=col,rows=baseline_required_row,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
      #Write Eligible count formula row with green text style
      eligible_count_formula=paste0('= "Eligible: " & COUNTIF(',col_letter,(header_row+1),':',col_letter,max(data_rows),', "Eligible")')
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=eligible_count_formula,startCol=col,startRow=eligible_count_row)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=green_text_style,cols=col,rows=eligible_count_row,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
    }
    #Create ACCOUNTING style once
    accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
    #Base columns
    base_cols=c("Work State Wages","Work State SIT")
    #Monthly columns matching regex
    monthly_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Work State (Wages|SIT)$",colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
    #Rows
    header_row=report_start_row
    data_start=header_row+1
    data_end=data_start+nrow(missouri_works)-1
    sum_row=header_row-1
    #Store all columns where formulas are written for styling later
    all_sum_cols=integer(0)
    if(length(monthly_cols)>0){
      monthly_col_indices=match(monthly_cols,colnames(missouri_works))
      #Write sum formulas above each monthly column (sum of that column's data)
      for(i in seq_along(monthly_cols)){
        col_idx=monthly_col_indices[i]
        col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(col_idx)
        formula=paste0("=SUM(",col_letter,data_start,":",col_letter,data_end,")")
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula,startCol=col_idx,startRow=sum_row)
        all_sum_cols=c(all_sum_cols,col_idx)
      }
    }
    for(base_col in base_cols){
      base_col_idx=match(base_col,colnames(missouri_works))
      if(is.na(base_col_idx)) next
      base_col_letter=openxlsx::int2col(base_col_idx)
      #If monthly columns exist for this base column:
      #Sum the three monthly columns immediately preceding the base column in the sum_row
      if(length(monthly_cols)>=3){
        three_monthly_indices=(base_col_idx-3):(base_col_idx-1)
        if(all(three_monthly_indices %in% monthly_col_indices)){
          monthly_letters=sapply(three_monthly_indices,openxlsx::int2col)
          #Use continuous range from first to last column letter for that row
          sum_formula=paste0("=SUM(",monthly_letters[1],sum_row,":",monthly_letters[length(monthly_letters)],sum_row,")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sum_formula,startCol=base_col_idx,startRow=sum_row)          
          all_sum_cols=c(all_sum_cols,base_col_idx)
          next
        }
      }
      #Otherwise, sum base column data as usual
      sum_formula=paste0("=SUM(",base_col_letter,data_start,":",base_col_letter,data_end,")")
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sum_formula,startCol=base_col_idx,startRow=sum_row)
      all_sum_cols=c(all_sum_cols,base_col_idx)
    }
    #Apply ACCOUNTING format to all sum formula cells
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=accounting_style,rows=sum_row,cols=unique(all_sum_cols),gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    #Get Excel column letters from indices
    int2col=function(indices){
      openxlsx::int2col(indices)
    }
    #Main function to handle base column and monthly prefix pattern
    write_sum_and_conditional=function(wb,sheet_name,missouri_works,combined_payroll_data,period_start,period_end,
                                        report_start_row,base_col_name,monthly_col_suffix,
                                        combined_payroll_sheet_name="Combined Payroll Data"){
      #Find base column index
      base_col_idx=match(base_col_name,colnames(missouri_works))
      if(is.na(base_col_idx)){
        message(paste0("Base column '",base_col_name,"' not found. Skipping."))
        return(NULL)
      }    
      base_col_letter=int2col(base_col_idx)     
      #Find all monthly columns with suffix, e.g. "MMM-YY Work State Wages"
      pattern_monthly=paste0("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} ",monthly_col_suffix,"$")
      monthly_cols=grep(pattern_monthly,colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
      monthly_col_indices=match(monthly_cols,colnames(missouri_works))
      header_row=report_start_row
      data_start_row=header_row+1
      data_end_row=data_start_row+nrow(missouri_works)-1
      sum_row=header_row-1 #Sum of current sheet (below the sumif row)
      sumif_row=header_row-2 #Sumif of combined payroll data (top row)
      #Check if there exist exactly 3 monthly columns immediately before the base column
      #That means monthly_col_indices are base_col_idx-3, base_col_idx-2, base_col_idx-1
      adjacent_monthly_cols=base_col_idx-3:1
      has_adjacent_three=all(adjacent_monthly_cols %in% monthly_col_indices)
      #Write formula for sumif row (top row) - sumifs from Combined Payroll Data
      #Find columns in combined payroll data
      cp_col_idx=match(base_col_name,colnames(combined_payroll_data))
      pd_col_idx=match("Pay Date",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
      ws_col_idx=match("Work State",colnames(combined_payroll_data))
      if(is.na(cp_col_idx)|is.na(pd_col_idx)|is.na(ws_col_idx)){
        stop("Required columns not found in combined_payroll_data")
      }
      cp_col_letter=int2col(cp_col_idx)
      pd_col_letter=int2col(pd_col_idx)
      ws_col_letter=int2col(ws_col_idx)
      if(base_col_name=="Gross Wages"){
        #No Work State filter
        sumif_formula=paste0(
