          "=SUMIFS(","'",combined_payroll_sheet_name,"'!$",cp_col_letter,":$",cp_col_letter,",",
          "'",combined_payroll_sheet_name,"'!$",pd_col_letter,":$",pd_col_letter,",",
          "\">=\"&DATE(",format(period_start,"%Y,%m,%d"),"),",
          "'",combined_payroll_sheet_name,"'!$",pd_col_letter,":$",pd_col_letter,",",
          "\"<=\"&DATE(",format(period_end,"%Y,%m,%d"),")",")")
      } else{
        #Include Work State = Missouri
        sumif_formula=paste0("=SUMIFS(","'",combined_payroll_sheet_name,"'!$",cp_col_letter,":$",cp_col_letter,",",
                              "'",combined_payroll_sheet_name,"'!$",pd_col_letter,":$",pd_col_letter,",",
                              "\">=\"&DATE(",format(period_start,"%Y,%m,%d"),"),",
                              "'",combined_payroll_sheet_name,"'!$",pd_col_letter,":$",pd_col_letter,",",
                              "\"<=\"&DATE(",format(period_end,"%Y,%m,%d"),"),",
                              "'",combined_payroll_sheet_name,"'!$",ws_col_letter,":$",ws_col_letter,",",
                              "\"Missouri\"",")")
      }
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sumif_formula,startCol=base_col_idx,startRow=sumif_row)
      #Write formula for sum row (below sumif)
      if(has_adjacent_three){
        #sum_row = row immediately above header row
        #header_row = e.g. 6
        #sum formula = sum of adjacent three columns in header_row + 1 (first data row)
        first_data_row=header_row-1
        col_letters_adjacent=int2col(adjacent_monthly_cols)
        #Construct formula like: =SUM(P6:R6)
        sum_formula_adjacent=paste0("=SUM(",col_letters_adjacent[1],first_data_row,":",col_letters_adjacent[3],first_data_row,")")
        #Write this formula to the cell above header row in base_col
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sum_formula_adjacent,startCol=base_col_idx,startRow=sum_row)     
      } else{
        #If no 3 adjacent monthly columns, sum the entire base column vertically
        sum_formula=paste0("=SUM(",base_col_letter,data_start_row,":",base_col_letter,data_end_row,")")
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sum_formula,startCol=base_col_idx,startRow=sum_row)
      }    
      #Add ACCOUNTING style to sumif_row and sum_row cells
      accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=accounting_style,rows=c(sumif_row,sum_row),cols=base_col_idx,stack=TRUE) 
      #Conditional formatting green/red with tolerance of 1 cent
      green_style=createStyle(bgFill="#C6EFCE",fontColour="#006100")
      red_style=createStyle(bgFill="#FFC7CE",fontColour="#9C0006")
      #For sumif_row cell: compare sumif_row cell to sum_row cell
      cf_formula_sumif_row=paste0("ABS($",base_col_letter,sumif_row," - $",base_col_letter,sum_row,") < 0.01")
      #For sum_row cell: compare sum_row cell to sumif_row cell
      cf_formula_sum_row=paste0("ABS($",base_col_letter,sum_row," - $",base_col_letter,sumif_row,") < 0.01")
      #Apply green formatting when matching for sumif_row only
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=base_col_idx,rows=sumif_row,rule=cf_formula_sumif_row,
                            style=green_style,type="expression")
      #Apply green formatting when matching for sum_row only
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=base_col_idx,rows=sum_row,rule=cf_formula_sum_row,style=green_style,
                            type="expression")
      #Now red formatting: cells where they do NOT match
      #For sumif_row cell red formatting:
      cf_formula_red_sumif_row=paste0("NOT(",cf_formula_sumif_row,")")
      #For sum_row cell red formatting:
      cf_formula_red_sum_row=paste0("NOT(",cf_formula_sum_row,")")
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=base_col_idx,rows=sumif_row,rule=cf_formula_red_sumif_row,
                            style=red_style,type="expression")
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=base_col_idx,rows=sum_row,rule=cf_formula_red_sum_row,
                            style=red_style,type="expression")
    }
    #For "Work State Wages" columns
    write_sum_and_conditional(wb,sheet_name,missouri_works,combined_payroll_data,period_start,period_end,
                              report_start_row=report_start_row,base_col_name="Gross Wages",monthly_col_suffix="Gross Wages")
    #For "Work State Wages" columns
    write_sum_and_conditional(wb,sheet_name,missouri_works,combined_payroll_data,period_start,period_end,
                              report_start_row=report_start_row,base_col_name="Work State Wages",monthly_col_suffix="Work State Wages")
    #For "Work State SIT" columns
    write_sum_and_conditional(wb,sheet_name,missouri_works,combined_payroll_data,period_start,period_end,
                              report_start_row=report_start_row,base_col_name="Work State SIT",monthly_col_suffix="Work State SIT")
    #For "Resident State Wages" columns
    write_sum_and_conditional(wb,sheet_name,missouri_works,combined_payroll_data,period_start,period_end,
                              report_start_row=report_start_row,base_col_name="Resident State Wages",monthly_col_suffix="Resident State Wages")
    #For "Resident State SIT" columns
    write_sum_and_conditional(wb,sheet_name,missouri_works,combined_payroll_data,period_start,period_end,
                              report_start_row=report_start_row,base_col_name="Resident State SIT",monthly_col_suffix="Resident State SIT")
    #Columns to process with MAX formulas and integer formatting
    max_int_columns=c("Sum of Days in Pay Period","Count of Pay Date","Max of Pay Period End Date","Max of Pay Date")
    #Find their indices and letters
    max_int_col_indices=match(max_int_columns,colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(!any(is.na(max_int_col_indices)))
    max_int_col_letters=openxlsx::int2col(max_int_col_indices)
    #Define rows
    header_row=report_start_row
    data_start_row=header_row+1
    data_end_row=data_start_row+nrow(missouri_works)-1
    max_formula_row=header_row-1
    #Integer style (0 decimals)
    integer_style=createStyle(numFmt="0")
    #Loop over columns
    for(i in seq_along(max_int_col_indices)){
      col_idx=max_int_col_indices[i]
      col_letter=max_int_col_letters[i]
      #Build MAX formula string
      max_formula=paste0("=MAX(",col_letter,data_start_row,":",col_letter,data_end_row,")")
      #Write formula
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=max_formula,startCol=col_idx,startRow=max_formula_row)
      #Apply integer style
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=integer_style,rows=max_formula_row,cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
    }
    #Columns to add MIN formulas above
    min_columns=c("Min of Pay Period Start Date","Min of Pay Period End Date","Min of Pay Date")
    date_cols=c(min_columns,"Max of Pay Period End Date","Max of Pay Date")
    #Find their column indices
    min_col_indices=match(min_columns,colnames(missouri_works))
    date_col_indices=match(date_cols,colnames(missouri_works))
    #Excel letters for those columns
    min_col_letters=int2col(min_col_indices)
    #Rows setup
    header_row=report_start_row
    data_start_row=header_row+1
    data_end_row=data_start_row+nrow(missouri_works)-1
    min_formula_row=header_row-1 #Row above header
    #Build and write formulas for each column
    for(i in seq_along(min_col_indices)){
      col_letter=min_col_letters[i]
      #Formula: =MIN(A2:A100) example
      min_formula=paste0("=MIN(",col_letter,data_start_row,":",col_letter,data_end_row,")")
      #Write formula to sheet
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=min_formula,startCol=min_col_indices[i],startRow=min_formula_row)
    }
    #Create date style for the cells (assuming these are dates)
    date_style=createStyle(numFmt="DATE")
    #Apply date style to those cells with the MIN formula
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=date_style,rows=min_formula_row,cols=date_col_indices,stack=TRUE)
    message("Current report sheet added to file.")
    #Define column names exactly as requested
    col_names=c("Period","MO-941, Line 1 (Withholding this Period)","MO-941, Line 2 (Compensation Deduction)",
                "MO-941, Line 3 (Existing Credit or Overpayment)","MO-941, Line 4 (Balance Due) & Line 7 (Net Due)",
                "Earned MO Works Withholding Tax Credit","Adjusted MO-941, Line 1 (Withholding this Period)",
                "Adjusted MO-941, Line 2 (Compensation Deduction)","Adjusted MO-941, Line 3 (Existing Credit or Overpayment)",
                "Adjusted MO-941, Line 4 (Balance Due) & Line 7 (Net Due)","Comments")
    #Create an empty data frame with these columns
    form_table=data.frame(matrix(ncol=length(col_names),nrow=0))
    colnames(form_table)=col_names
    form_table=data.frame(Period=character(),`MO-941, Line 1 (Withholding this Period)`=numeric(),
                          `MO-941, Line 2 (Compensation Deduction)`=numeric(),
                          `MO-941, Line 3 (Existing Credit or Overpayment)`=numeric(),
                          `MO-941, Line 4 (Balance Due) & Line 7 (Net Due)`=numeric(),
                          `Earned MO Works Withholding Tax Credit`=numeric(),
                          `Adjusted MO-941, Line 1 (Withholding this Period)`=numeric(),
                          `Adjusted MO-941, Line 2 (Compensation Deduction)`=numeric(),
                          `Adjusted MO-941, Line 3 (Existing Credit or Overpayment)`=numeric(),
                          `Adjusted MO-941, Line 4 (Balance Due) & Line 7 (Net Due)`=numeric(),
                          Comments=character(),stringsAsFactors=FALSE,check.names=FALSE)
    #Define SIT folder and initialize
    sit_folder=paste0(directory,"Programs/Missouri Works/",company,"/SIT")
    sit_df=NULL
    imported_files=c()
    file_types=c()
    file_type=NULL
    target_month_num=NULL
    if(dir.exists(sit_folder)){
      #List all SIT files (Excel + PDF)
      sit_files=list.files(path=sit_folder,pattern="\\.(xls[x]?|pdf)$",full.names=TRUE)
      sit_files_lower=tolower(sit_files)  
      #Determine month and quarter info
      if(!is.null(month)){
        month_num=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
        target_month_num=month_num
        quarter_num=ceiling(month_num/3)    
        #Search order: month file first, then quarter file
        search_patterns=c(sprintf("%04d.%02d",year,target_month_num), #YYYY.MM
                          sprintf("%04d.q%d",year,quarter_num)) #YYYY.QX    
      } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
        quarter_num=as.integer(quarter)
        quarter_months_list=list(c(1,2,3),c(4,5,6),c(7,8,9),c(10,11,12))
        months_in_quarter=quarter_months_list[[quarter_num]]    
        #Search order: quarter file first, then each month file
        search_patterns=c(sprintf("%04d.q%d",year,quarter_num), #YYYY.QX
                          sprintf("%04d.%02d",year,months_in_quarter)) #YYYY.MM    
      } else{
        stop("Either month or quarter must be defined")
      }  
      search_patterns_lower=tolower(search_patterns)  
      #Find all matching files
      matched_indexes=unlist(lapply(search_patterns_lower,function(pat){
        grep(pat,sit_files_lower,fixed=TRUE)
      }))
      matched_indexes=unique(matched_indexes)  
      if(length(matched_indexes)>0){
        for(idx in matched_indexes){
          sit_file=sit_files[idx]
          file_ext=tools::file_ext(sit_file)
          imported_files=c(imported_files,basename(sit_file))
          if(file_ext %in% c("xls","xlsx")){
            tmp_df=readxl::read_excel(sit_file)
            tmp_df=clean_and_transform_new(tmp_df)
            file_types=c(file_types,"Excel")        
          } else if(file_ext=="pdf"){
            pdf_text_content=suppressWarnings(pdftools::pdf_text(sit_file))
            tmp_df=data.frame(Page=seq_along(pdf_text_content),Text=pdf_text_content,stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
            file_types=c(file_types,"PDF")        
          } else{
            warning("Unsupported file type: ",file_ext)
            next
          }      
          #Combine files into one sit_df
          if(is.null(sit_df)){
            sit_df=tmp_df
          } else{
            sit_df=dplyr::bind_rows(sit_df,tmp_df)
          }
        }    
        #Determine final file_type
        unique_types=unique(file_types)
        if(length(unique_types)==1){
          file_type=unique_types
        } else{
          file_type="Both"
        }    
        message("Imported SIT files: ",paste(imported_files,collapse=", "))
        message("File type(s): ",file_type)
      }
    }
    message("SIT data frame imported.")
    rename_columns=function(df){
      colnames(df)=tolower(colnames(df)) #Normalize to lowercase
      #Normalize separators: replace underscores, periods, multiple spaces with a single space
      colnames(df)=gsub("[_.]+"," ",colnames(df))
      colnames(df)=gsub("\\s+"," ",colnames(df))
      colnames(df)=trimws(colnames(df))
      #Renaming rules with pattern matching and exact matching where needed
      for(i in seq_along(colnames(df))){
        col=colnames(df)[i]
        #Rename "res" or "res ind" columns to "Residency Indicator"
        if(grepl("^res( ind)?$",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Residency Indicator"
        } else if(grepl("agency",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Agency"
        } else if(grepl("tax id",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Tax ID"
        } else if(grepl("due date",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Due Date"
        } else if(grepl("dep",col)){
          #Check values in column for deposit frequency or status
          vals=tolower(as.character(df[[i]]))
          if(all(vals %in% c("quarterly","monthly","annually",NA))){
            colnames(df)[i]="Deposit Frequency"
          } else if(any(grepl("pending|paid",vals))){
            colnames(df)[i]="Deposit Status"
          }
        } else if(grepl("^st$",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="State"
        } else if(grepl("jurisdiction",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Jurisdiction"
        } else if(grepl("tax",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Tax Type"
        } else if(grepl("deposit",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Deposit Amount"
        } else if(grepl("check",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Check Date"
        } else if(grepl("process",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Process Date"
        } else if(grepl("br co",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Branch/Company"
        } else if(grepl("co name",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Company Name"
        } else if(grepl("dep date",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Deposit Date"
        } else if(grepl("client code",col)){
          colnames(df)[i]="Client Code"
        }
      }
      colnames(df)=gsub("(?i)^dep[_ .]?date$","Deposit Date",colnames(df),perl=TRUE)
      colnames(df)=gsub("(?i)^deposit$","Deposit Amount",colnames(df),perl=TRUE)
      df$Agency=str_to_title(df$Agency)
      df$`Company Name`=str_to_title(df$`Company Name`)
      #Helper function: title-case only if not exactly two letters
      title_if_not_two_letters=function(x){
        ifelse(nchar(x)==2 & !is.na(x),x,str_to_title(x))
      }
      df$State=title_if_not_two_letters(df$State)
      df$Jurisdiction=title_if_not_two_letters(df$Jurisdiction)
      abb_to_name=setNames(state.name,state.abb)
      cols_to_convert=c("State","Jurisdiction")
      for(col in cols_to_convert){
        if(col %in% names(df)){
          df[[col]]=sapply(df[[col]],function(x){
            if(is.character(x) && nchar(x)==2){
              x_up=toupper(x)
              if(x_up %in% names(abb_to_name)){
                return(abb_to_name[[x_up]])
              }
            }
            return(x)
          })
        }
      }
      cols=c("Due Date","Deposit Date","Check Date","Process Date")
      for(col in cols){
        if(col %in% names(df)){
          df[[col]]=convert_to_date(df[[col]])
        }
      }
      df$`Deposit Amount`=as.numeric(df$`Deposit Amount`)
      return(df)
    }
    if(!is.null(file_type) && exists("sit_df") && is.data.frame(sit_df) && file_type=="Excel"){
      n_cols=ncol(sit_df)
      sit_df=sit_df[
        #Not majority NA
        rowSums(is.na(sit_df))<=(n_cols/2) &
        #Has at least one numeric value
        apply(sit_df,1,function(x){
          any(suppressWarnings(!is.na(as.numeric(x))))
        }),,drop=FALSE]
      #Apply renaming:
      sit_df=rename_columns(sit_df)
      message("SIT data frame columns renamed.")
    } else if(!is.null(file_type) && file_type=="PDF"){
      #Create new columns with NA default (with exact titles including spaces)
      new_cols=c("Agency","Tax ID","Due Date","Deposit Frequency","Deposit Status","Deposit Date","State",
                  "Residency Indicator","Jurisdiction","Tax Type","Deposit Amount","Check Date","Process Date",
                  "Branch/Company","Client Code","Company Name")
      #Initialize new columns with NA_character_
      for(col in new_cols){
        sit_df[[col]]=NA_character_
      }
      #Set "Agency" column to fixed string
      sit_df[["Agency"]]="Missouri Dept of Revenue"
      sit_df[["Tax ID"]]=sapply(sit_df$Text,function(txt){
        #Regex explanation:
        #(?<![.,$])  => Negative lookbehind: no ., $ immediately before
        #\\b\\d{8}\\b => exactly 8 digits as a whole word (word boundary on both sides)
        m=regmatches(txt,regexpr("(?<![.,$])\\b\\d{8}\\b",txt,perl=TRUE))
        if(length(m)>0 && nzchar(m)){
          m
        } else{
          NA_character_
        }
      })
      sit_df[["Deposit Frequency"]]=sapply(sit_df$Text,function(txt){
        #Search for "Monthly" or "Quarterly" ignoring case
        m=regmatches(txt,regexpr("Monthly|Quarterly",txt,ignore.case=TRUE))
        if(length(m)>0 && nzchar(m)){
          #Return matched word with consistent capitalization
          #(e.g., capitalize first letter, lowercase rest)
          freq=tolower(m)
          freq=paste0(toupper(substr(freq,1,1)),substr(freq,2,nchar(freq)))
          freq
        } else{
          NA_character_
        }
      })
      sit_df[["State"]]="Missouri"
      sit_df[["Jurisdiction"]]="Missouri"
      sit_df[["Check Date"]]=sapply(sit_df$Text,function(txt){
        #Find "Monthly" or "Quarterly" followed by optional space(s) then 4 digits (MMYY)
        match=str_match(txt,"(?i)(Monthly|Quarterly)\\s+(\\d{4})")
        if(is.na(match[1,1])) return(as.Date(NA))
        mmyy=match[1,3]
        #Extract MM and YY parts
        mm=as.integer(substr(mmyy,1,2))
        yy=as.integer(substr(mmyy,3,4))
        #Convert YY to full year (assume 2000+)
        year=ifelse(yy<50,2000+yy,1900+yy)
        #Get last day of the month using lubridate
        last_day=ceiling_date(ymd(paste0(year,sprintf("%02d",mm),"01")),"month")-days(1)
        return(last_day)
      })
      sit_df$`Check Date`=convert_to_date(sit_df$`Check Date`)
      sit_df[["Branch/Company"]]=sapply(sit_df$Text,function(txt){
        parts=strsplit(txt,"\\s+")[[1]]
        idx=which(parts=="Department" & dplyr::lead(parts)=="Use")[1]
        if(is.na(idx)||idx<3) return(NA_character_)
        #Token two positions before "Department"
        parts[idx-2]
      })
      sit_df[["Process Date"]]=sapply(sit_df$Text,function(txt){
        parts=strsplit(txt,"\\s+")[[1]]
        idx=which(parts=="Department" & dplyr::lead(parts)=="Use")[1]
        if(is.na(idx)||idx<2) return(as.Date(NA))
        date_str=parts[idx-1]
        parsed=as.Date(date_str,format="%m/%d/%Y")
        if(is.na(parsed)) NA else parsed
      })
      sit_df$`Process Date`=convert_to_date(sit_df$`Process Date`)
      #Extract "Company Name" from 'Text' column by searching for "Employer"
      sit_df[["Company Name"]]=sapply(sit_df$Text,function(txt){
        #Find all matches of "Employer"
        matches=gregexpr("Employer",txt,ignore.case=TRUE)[[1]]
        #Check if there are at least two occurrences
        if(length(matches)>=3 && matches[1]!=-1){
          #Position after the second "Employer"
          start_pos=matches[3]+nchar("Employer")
          #Substring from after second "Employer" to the end
          sub_text=substr(txt,start_pos+1,nchar(txt))
          #Extract everything up to the first "(" after second Employer
          m=regmatches(sub_text,regexpr("^[^\\(]+",sub_text))
          #Trim whitespace
          company_name=trimws(m)
          #Return the extracted company name or NA if empty
          if(nzchar(company_name)) company_name else NA_character_
        } else{
          NA_character_
        }
      })      
      #Trim whitespace from extracted "Company Name"
      sit_df[["Company Name"]]=trimws(sit_df[["Company Name"]])
      format_amount=function(num_str,threshold){
        if(nchar(num_str)>threshold){
          len=nchar(num_str)
          val=paste0(substr(num_str,1,len-2),".",substr(num_str,len-1,len))
        } else{
          val=num_str
        }
        as.numeric(val)
      }
      result_df=sit_df[0,]
      result_df$`Deposit Amount`=numeric(0)
      result_df$`Tax Type`=character(0)
      for(i in seq_len(nrow(sit_df))){
        row=sit_df[i,]
        text=row$Text
        #Split text by spaces
        tokens=strsplit(text,"\\s+")[[1]]
        #Find all indices of tokens that are exactly "$"
        dollar_indices=which(tokens=="$")
        if(length(dollar_indices)==0){
          #No dollar signs at all
          row$`Deposit Amount`=as.numeric(NA)
          row$`Tax Type`=NA_character_
          result_df=bind_rows(result_df,row)
        } else{
          #First $ number
          if(length(tokens)>=dollar_indices[1]+1){
            num1=tokens[dollar_indices[1]+1]
            amt1=format_amount(num1,6)
          } else{
            amt1=as.numeric(NA)
          }
          row$`Deposit Amount`=amt1
          row$`Tax Type`="SIT"
          result_df=bind_rows(result_df,row)
          #Second $ number, if exists
          if(length(dollar_indices)>=2 && length(tokens)>=dollar_indices[2]+1){
            num2=tokens[dollar_indices[2]+1]
            amt2=format_amount(num2,4)
            new_row=row
            new_row$`Deposit Amount`=amt2
            new_row$`Tax Type`="SIT-MO COMP"
            result_df=bind_rows(result_df,new_row)
          }
        }
      }
      sit_df=result_df
      sit_df=sit_df[,!(names(sit_df) %in% c("Text","Page"))]
      sit_df$`Company Name`=sit_df$`Company Name`%>%
        tolower()%>% #All lowercase
        str_squish()%>% #Remove extra spaces, keep only single spaces
        str_to_title() #Capitalize first letter of each word
    }
    if(exists("sit_df")){
      #Define the new columns to add, initialized as numeric(0) or NA
      new_cols=data.frame(`ADP MO-941, Line 1 (Withholding this Period)`=numeric(nrow(form_table)),
                          `ADP MO-941, Line 2 (Compensation Deduction)`=numeric(nrow(form_table)),
                          `ADP MO-941, Line 3 (Existing Credit or Overpayment)`=numeric(nrow(form_table)),
                          `ADP MO-941, Line 4 (Balance Due) & Line 7 (Net Due)`=numeric(nrow(form_table)),
                          check.names=FALSE,stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
      #Find the position of "Earned MO Works Withholding Tax Credit"
      pos=which(colnames(form_table)=="Earned MO Works Withholding Tax Credit")
      #Split the form_table into two parts: before and after insertion point
      before=form_table[,1:pos,drop=FALSE]
      after=form_table[,(pos+1):ncol(form_table),drop=FALSE]
      #Combine them with new_cols inserted right after the "Earned MO Works Withholding Tax Credit" column
      form_table=cbind(before,new_cols,after)
    }
    if(!exists("sit_df")||is.null(sit_df)){
      #Remove columns starting with "ADP"
      cols_to_remove=grep("^ADP",colnames(form_table),value=TRUE)
      if(length(cols_to_remove)>0){
        message("Removing columns from form_table: ",paste(cols_to_remove,collapse=", "))
        form_table=form_table[,!(colnames(form_table) %in% cols_to_remove),drop=FALSE]
      } else{
        message("No columns starting with 'ADP' found in form_table to remove.")
      }
    } else{
      message("sit_df exists and is not NULL; no columns removed.")
    }
    #Prepare the Period string based on quarter or month
    period_str=if(!is.null(quarter)){
      paste0("Q",quarter," ",year)
    } else if(!is.null(month)){
      paste(month,year)
    } else{
      NA_character_
    }
    #Create a new row as a named list, matching form_table columns
    new_row=as.list(rep(NA,ncol(form_table)))
    names(new_row)=colnames(form_table)
    #Set the Period column value
    new_row[["Period"]]=period_str
    #Convert list to data.frame with 1 row
    new_row_df=as.data.frame(new_row,stringsAsFactors=FALSE,check.names=FALSE)
    #Add new row to form_table
    form_table=rbind(form_table,new_row_df)
    sheet_name="Form Table"
    if(!(sheet_name %in% names(wb))){
      addWorksheet(wb,sheet_name,tabColour="#7030A0")
      #Write just the header row (no data)
      empty_df=form_table[0,]
      writeData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=empty_df,startRow=1,startCol=1,colNames=TRUE)
      total_cols=ncol(form_table)
      #Base bold style for entire header row
      header_bold_style=createStyle(textDecoration="bold")
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_bold_style,rows=1,cols=1:total_cols,gridExpand=TRUE)
      #Define fill styles (with no bold to avoid conflict)
      style_light_blue=createStyle(fgFill="#DDEBF7")
      style_light_green=createStyle(fgFill="#E2EFDA")
      style_light_red=createStyle(fgFill="#FFA7A7")
      style_light_yellow=createStyle(fgFill="#FFD966")
      #Find "Period" column index
      period_col=which(colnames(form_table)=="Period")
      #Light blue fill for 4 columns after Period
      blue_cols=(period_col+1):(period_col+4)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=style_light_blue,rows=1,cols=blue_cols,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      #Light green fill for column after those 4 (Period + 5)
      green_col=period_col+5
      if(green_col<=total_cols){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=style_light_green,rows=1,cols=green_col,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #ADP columns (if exist) get light red fill
      adp_cols=grep("^ADP MO-941",colnames(form_table))
      if(length(adp_cols)==4){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=style_light_red,rows=1,cols=adp_cols,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Yellow fill for 4 columns before Comments (excluding ADP cols)
      comments_col=which(colnames(form_table)=="Comments")
      yellow_cols=(comments_col-4):(comments_col-1)
      yellow_cols=setdiff(yellow_cols,adp_cols)
      if(length(yellow_cols)>0){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=style_light_yellow,rows=1,cols=yellow_cols,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Freeze first row and first column
      freezePane(wb,sheet=sheet_name,firstActiveRow=2,firstActiveCol=2)
    } else{
      message("Sheet 'Form Table' already exists in the workbook.")
    }
    update_sit_data=function(file_path,sit_df){
      #Sheet name defined once
      sheet_name="Combined SIT Data"
      #Check if sheet exists
      sheets_in_wb=sheets(wb)
      if(sheet_name %in% sheets_in_wb){
        #Read existing data
        existing_df=read_excel(path=file_path,sheet=sheet_name)
        #Append sit_df to existing
        combined_df=dplyr::bind_rows(existing_df,sit_df)
        #Remove fully duplicated rows
        combined_df=combined_df[!duplicated(combined_df),]
        date_cols=c("Due Date","Deposit Date","Check Date","Process Date")
        for(col in date_cols){
          if(col %in% colnames(sit_df)){
            combined_df[[col]]=convert_to_date(combined_df[[col]])
            combined_df[[col]]=as.Date(combined_df[[col]])
          }
        }
        #Remove old sheet and add new combined sheet (overwrite)
        removeWorksheet(wb,sheet_name)
        addWorksheet(wb,sheet_name,tabColour="#8B0000")
        writeData(wb,sheet_name,combined_df)
      } else{
        #Sheet doesn't exist, add sit_df as new sheet
        addWorksheet(wb,sheet_name,tabColour="#8B0000")
        writeData(wb,sheet_name,sit_df)
      }
      #Freeze top row
      freezePane(wb,sheet=sheet_name,firstRow=TRUE)
      #Get data to determine header row style range
      df=readWorkbook(wb,sheet=sheet_name)
      n_cols=ncol(df)
      #Add filters to the header row
      addFilter(wb,sheet=sheet_name,rows=1,cols=1:n_cols)
      #Create styles
      header_style=createStyle(textDecoration="bold")
      date_style=createStyle(numFmt="DATE")
      accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
      #Bold header row
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=header_style,rows=1,cols=1:n_cols,gridExpand=TRUE)
      #Identify relevant columns to format
      col_names=colnames(df)
      date_cols=c("Due Date","Deposit Date","Check Date","Process Date")
      date_col_indices=which(col_names %in% date_cols)
      deposit_amount_col_index=which(col_names=="Deposit Amount")
      #Apply date format to entire columns (excluding header)
      if(length(date_col_indices)>0){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=date_style,rows=2:(nrow(df)+1),cols=date_col_indices,gridExpand=TRUE)
      }
      #Apply accounting format to Deposit Amount column
      if(length(deposit_amount_col_index)==1){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=accounting_style,rows=2:(nrow(df)+1),cols=deposit_amount_col_index,gridExpand=TRUE)
      }
      invisible(TRUE)
    }
    if(exists("sit_df") && !is.null(sit_df) && nrow(sit_df)>0){
      update_sit_data(file_path,sit_df)
    }
    sheet_name="Form Table"
    if(!(sheet_name %in% names(wb))){
      stop(paste0("Sheet '",sheet_name,"' does not exist in workbook."))
    }
    #Extract Period from new data
    new_period=form_table$Period[1]
    #Read Period column directly from Excel
    period_col=readWorkbook(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=1,colNames=TRUE)
    #Find matching Period rows in Excel
    match_row=which(period_col$Period==new_period)
    if(length(match_row)>=1){
      #Excel row number of first matching Period (add 1 for header)
      first_delete_row=min(match_row)+1
      #Delete matched row and all rows below it
      deleteData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=1:ncol(period_col),rows=first_delete_row:(nrow(period_col)+1),gridExpand=TRUE)
      new_data_start_row=first_delete_row
    } else{
      #Append after last non-empty Period
      new_data_start_row=sum(!is.na(period_col$Period) & period_col$Period!="")+2
    }
    #Write the new Form Table row
    writeData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=form_table,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=1,colNames=FALSE)
    #Determine report sheet name
    report_sheet_name=if(!is.null(quarter)){
      paste0(year,".Q",quarter)
    } else if(!is.null(month_num)){
      paste0(year,".",sprintf("%02d",as.integer(month_num)))
    } else{
      stop("Either month or quarter must be defined.")
    }
    #Build formulas
    ws_sit_col_index=which(colnames(missouri_works)=="Work State SIT")
    if(length(ws_sit_col_index)!=1){
      stop("Column 'Work State SIT' not found or multiple found.")
    }
    ws_sit_col_letter=int2col(ws_sit_col_index)
    header_row_report=report_start_row
    formula_row=header_row_report-1
    #Column B formula
    formula_col2=sprintf("='%s'!%s%d",report_sheet_name,ws_sit_col_letter,formula_row)
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col2,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=2)
    #Column C
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sprintf("=0.005*B%d",new_data_start_row),startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=3)
    #Column D
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sprintf("=B%d-C%d",new_data_start_row,new_data_start_row),
                  startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=4)
    #Column E
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=sprintf("=D%d-C%d-B%d",new_data_start_row,new_data_start_row,new_data_start_row),
                  startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=5)
    #Column F: SUM of all "MMM-YY Works Credit" columns from report_sheet_name
    #Identify Works Credit columns in missouri_works
    works_credit_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Works Credit$",colnames(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
    if(length(works_credit_cols)==0){
      stop("No 'MMM-YY Works Credit' columns found in missouri_works.")
    }
    #Get their column indices
    works_credit_indices=match(works_credit_cols,colnames(missouri_works))
    #Convert indices to Excel column letters
    works_credit_letters=int2col(works_credit_indices)
    #Row to sum = one row above header
    sum_row=report_start_row-1
    #Build SUM arguments like: '2025.Q1'!H9,'2025.Q1'!I9
    sum_refs=paste0("'",report_sheet_name,"'!",works_credit_letters,sum_row,collapse=",")
    #Construct final formula
    formula_col6=sprintf("=SUM(%s)",sum_refs)
    #Write formula to column 6 of newly added row
    writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col6,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=6)
    if("Combined SIT Data" %in% sheets(wb)){
      #Resolve SIT column letters
      deposit_col_letter=int2col(which(colnames(sit_df)=="Deposit Amount"))
      tax_col_letter=int2col(which(colnames(sit_df)=="Tax Type"))
      check_col_letter=int2col(which(colnames(sit_df)=="Check Date"))
      #Date window
      if(!is.null(quarter)){
        start_date=as.Date(paste0(year,"-",(quarter-1)*3+1,"-01"))
        end_date=ceiling_date(start_date,"quarter")-lubridate::days(1)
      } else{
        month_num=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
        start_date=as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01",year,month_num))
        end_date=ceiling_date(start_date,"month")-lubridate::days(1)
      }
      start_excel=format(start_date,"%m/%d/%Y")
      end_excel=format(end_date,"%m/%d/%Y")
      #Build formula
      formula_col7=sprintf("=SUMIFS('Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,'Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,\"SIT\",'Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,\">=%s\",'Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,\"<=%s\")",
                            deposit_col_letter,deposit_col_letter,tax_col_letter,tax_col_letter,check_col_letter,
                            check_col_letter,start_excel,check_col_letter,check_col_letter,end_excel)
      #Write formula
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col7,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=7)
      #Column 8: Negative SIT-MO COMP deposits
      formula_col8=sprintf("=-SUMIFS('Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,'Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,\"SIT-MO COMP\",'Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,\">=%s\",'Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,\"<=%s\")",
                            deposit_col_letter,deposit_col_letter,tax_col_letter,tax_col_letter,check_col_letter,
                            check_col_letter,start_excel,check_col_letter,check_col_letter,end_excel)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col8,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=8)
      #Column 9: Total Deposit Amount (all tax types)
      formula_col9=sprintf("=SUMIFS('Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,'Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,\">=%s\",'Combined SIT Data'!%s:%s,\"<=%s\")",
                            deposit_col_letter,deposit_col_letter,check_col_letter,check_col_letter,start_excel,
                            check_col_letter,check_col_letter,end_excel)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col9,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=9)
      #Column 10: Col7 - Col8 - Col9
      formula_col10=sprintf("=%s%d-%s%d-%s%d",int2col(7),new_data_start_row,int2col(8),new_data_start_row,
                            int2col(9),new_data_start_row)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col10,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=10)
      #Column 11: Col7 - Col6
      formula_col11=sprintf("=%s%d-%s%d",int2col(7),new_data_start_row,int2col(6),new_data_start_row)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col11,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=11)
      #Column 12: 0.005 * Col11
      formula_col12=sprintf("=0.005*%s%d",int2col(11),new_data_start_row)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col12,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=12)
      #Column 13: = Col8 (just copy the value from Column 8)
      formula_col13=sprintf("=%s%d",int2col(8),new_data_start_row)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col13,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=13)
      #Column 14: Col11 - Col12 - Col13
      formula_col14=sprintf("=%s%d-%s%d-%s%d",int2col(11),new_data_start_row,int2col(12),new_data_start_row,int2col(13),new_data_start_row)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col14,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=14)
    } else{
      #Formula for column 7: col2 - col6
      formula_col7=sprintf("=%s%d-%s%d",int2col(2),new_data_start_row,int2col(6),new_data_start_row)
      #Formula for column 8: 0.005 * col7
      formula_col8=sprintf("=0.005*%s%d",int2col(7),new_data_start_row)
      #Formula for column 9: =col4 (just copy col4 value)
      formula_col9=sprintf("=%s%d",int2col(4),new_data_start_row)
      #Formula for column 10: col7 - col8 - col9
      formula_col10=sprintf("=%s%d-%s%d-%s%d",int2col(7),new_data_start_row,int2col(8),new_data_start_row,int2col(9),new_data_start_row)
      #Write formulas to the worksheet
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col7,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=7)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col8,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=8)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col9,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=9)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=formula_col10,startRow=new_data_start_row,startCol=10)
    }
    #Assuming wb is loaded workbook, and sheet_name points to "Form Table"
    n_cols=ncol(form_table) #Number of columns in form_table
    #Create ACCOUNTING style
    accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
    #Apply style to all columns except first and last
    if(n_cols>2){
      cols_to_format=2:(n_cols-1)
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=accounting_style,rows=new_data_start_row,cols=cols_to_format,gridExpand=TRUE,
                stack=TRUE)
    }
    #Create fill styles
    gray_fill=createStyle(fgFill="#DBDBDB")
    green_fill=createStyle(fgFill="#D6E0D8")
    #Apply gray fill to columns 2,3,4 (rows = data body)
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=gray_fill,rows=new_data_start_row,cols=2:4,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    #Apply green fill to column 6
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=green_fill,rows=new_data_start_row,cols=6,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    #If total columns = 15, apply gray fill also to columns 7,8,9,10
    if(n_cols==15){
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=gray_fill,rows=new_data_start_row,cols=7:10,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    }
    n_cols=ncol(form_table)
    header_row=1 #Make sure this is correct row number for header
    #Columns to format: exclude first and last
    cols_to_format=2:(n_cols-1)
    #Set column width for all but first and last columns
    setColWidths(wb,sheet=sheet_name,cols=cols_to_format,widths=18.67+(18.67-18.56))
    #Create wrap text style
    wrap_style=createStyle(wrapText=TRUE)
    #Apply wrap text style to header row (single row, no gridExpand)
    addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_name,style=wrap_style,rows=header_row,cols=cols_to_format,gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
    #Set header row height
    setRowHeights(wb,sheet=sheet_name,rows=header_row,heights=43.2)
    #Extract all "MMM-YY Works Credit" columns from missouri_works
    credit_cols=grep("^[A-Z][a-z]{2}-\\d{2} Works Credit$",names(missouri_works),value=TRUE)
    #Parse month-year from column names and convert to "Month Year" format
    credit_months=sapply(credit_cols,function(col){
      m=regexec("^([A-Za-z]{3})-(\\d{2})",col)
      p=regmatches(col,m)[[1]]
      mm=match(p[2],month.abb)
      yyyy=ifelse(as.integer(p[3])>=50,1900,2000)+as.integer(p[3])
      paste0(month.name[mm]," ",yyyy)
    })
    #Create job_tracking dataframe, one row per Works Credit column month
    job_tracking=data.frame(Month=credit_months,Eligible=NA,Credit=NA,stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
    #Remove row names
    rownames(job_tracking)=NULL
    stopifnot(nrow(job_tracking)>0)
    eligible_col=match("Eligible",colnames(job_tracking))
    credit_col=match("Credit",colnames(job_tracking))
    stopifnot(!is.na(eligible_col))
    stopifnot(!is.na(credit_col))
    sheet_name="Job Tracking"
    #Convert "January 2024" → Date (first of month)
    month_to_date=function(x){
      as.Date(paste0("01 ",x),format="%d %B %Y")
    }
    #Determine cutoff date (earliest month in current job_tracking)
    cutoff_date=min(month_to_date(job_tracking$Month),na.rm=TRUE)
    #Case 1: Sheet does NOT exist → write entire sheet
    if(!(sheet_name %in% names(wb))){
      addWorksheet(wb,sheet_name,tabColour="#008000")
      writeData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=job_tracking,startRow=1,colNames=TRUE)
      freezePane(wb,sheet="Job Tracking",firstRow=TRUE)
      header_style=createStyle(textDecoration="bold")
      start_row=2
      addStyle(wb,sheet="Job Tracking",style=header_style,rows=1,cols=1:ncol(job_tracking),gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    } else{
      #Case 2: Sheet exists → append safely
      existing=read.xlsx(wb,sheet=sheet_name,colNames=TRUE)
      #Clean column names (replace dots with spaces)
      names(existing)=gsub("\\."," ",names(existing))
      #Convert Month column to Date
      existing$Month_Date=month_to_date(existing$Month)
      #Keep only rows strictly BEFORE the cutoff
      existing_clean=existing[is.na(existing$Month_Date)|existing$Month_Date<cutoff_date,]
      existing_clean$Month_Date=NULL
      #Find first empty row in sheet
      start_row=nrow(existing_clean)+2 #+1 for header, +1 to append
      #Write ONLY new rows (no headers)
      writeData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=job_tracking,startRow=start_row,colNames=FALSE)
    }
    mw_status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Status$",colnames(missouri_works))
    mw_credit_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-[0-9]{2} Works Credit$",colnames(missouri_works))
    stopifnot(length(mw_status_cols)>=nrow(job_tracking))
    stopifnot(length(mw_credit_cols)>=nrow(job_tracking))
    for(i in seq_len(nrow(job_tracking))){
      jt_row=start_row+i-1
      status_col_letter=int2col(mw_status_cols[i])
      credit_col_letter=int2col(mw_credit_cols[i])
      #Eligible
      eligible_formula=paste0('=COUNTIF(\'',report_sheet_name,'\'!',status_col_letter,':',status_col_letter,',"Eligible")')
      writeFormula(wb,sheet="Job Tracking",x=eligible_formula,startCol=eligible_col,startRow=jt_row)
      #Credit
      credit_formula=paste0('=\'',report_sheet_name,'\'!',credit_col_letter,report_start_row-1)
      writeFormula(wb,sheet="Job Tracking",x=credit_formula,startCol=credit_col,startRow=jt_row)
    }
    #Define regex patterns
    pattern_q_xyyyy="^Q[1-4]\\.[0-9]{4}$"
    pattern_yyyy_qx="^[0-9]{4}\\.Q[1-4]$"
    pattern_mm_yyyy="^(0[1-9]|1[0-2])\\.[0-9]{4}$"
    pattern_yyyy_mm="^[0-9]{4}\\.(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$"
    if(!exists("sheet_names")){
      sheet_names=openxlsx::sheets(wb)
    }
    #Determine sheet types
    is_quarterly=grepl(pattern_q_xyyyy,sheet_names)|grepl(pattern_yyyy_qx,sheet_names)
    is_monthly=grepl(pattern_mm_yyyy,sheet_names)|grepl(pattern_yyyy_mm,sheet_names)
    #Base weighted count
    matching_count=sum(ifelse(is_quarterly,3,ifelse(is_monthly,1,0)))
    #Add current period
    if(!is.null(quarter) && !is.na(quarter)){
      matching_count=matching_count+3
    } else if(!is.null(month) && !is.na(month)){
      matching_count=matching_count+1
    }
    eligible_style=createStyle(numFmt="#,##0")
    addStyle(wb,sheet="Job Tracking",style=eligible_style,rows=2:(matching_count+1),cols=eligible_col,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    credit_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
    addStyle(wb,sheet="Job Tracking",style=credit_style,rows=2:(matching_count+1),cols=credit_col,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
    #Get all sheet names in the file
    sheet_names=openxlsx::sheets(wb)
    #Define quarter-to-month mapping
    quarter_map=list(Q1=c(1,2,3),Q2=c(4,5,6),Q3=c(7,8,9),Q4=c(10,11,12))
    #Determine the reference month(s)
    if(!is.null(month)){
      reference_months=match(tolower(month),tolower(month.name))
    } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
      reference_months=quarter_map[[paste0("Q",quarter)]]
    } else{
      stop("Either 'month' or 'quarter' must be defined.")
    }
    #Identify all months covered by sheets
    months_covered=c()
    for(sheet in sheet_names){
      #MM.YYYY or QX.YYYY (format: something.year)
      if(grepl("^(0[1-9]|1[0-2]|Q[1-4])\\.[0-9]{4}$",sheet)){
        parts=strsplit(sheet,"\\.")[[1]]
        period=parts[1]
        sheet_year=as.integer(parts[2])
        if(sheet_year==year){
          if(grepl("^Q[1-4]$",period)){
            months_covered=unique(c(months_covered,quarter_map[[period]]))
          } else{
            mo=as.integer(period)
            months_covered=unique(c(months_covered,mo))
          }
        }
      }
      #YYYY.MM or YYYY.QX (format: year.something)
      else if(grepl("^[0-9]{4}\\.(0[1-9]|1[0-2]|Q[1-4])$",sheet)){
        parts=strsplit(sheet,"\\.")[[1]]
        sheet_year=as.integer(parts[1])
        period=parts[2]
        if(sheet_year==year){
          if(grepl("^Q[1-4]$",period)){
            months_covered=unique(c(months_covered,quarter_map[[period]]))
          } else{
            mo=as.integer(period)
            months_covered=unique(c(months_covered,mo))
          }
        }
      }
    }
    #Determine Required Month Range from baseline_counts
    shortened_month_list=NULL
    #Filter for the current company
    company_rows=baseline_df[baseline_df$Company==company,]
    #Gather all start/end date columns dynamically
    start_cols=grep("^Start Date",names(company_rows),value=TRUE)
    end_cols=grep("^End Date",names(company_rows),value=TRUE)
    #Loop through each date range to see if the defined month/quarter falls inside
    for(i in seq_along(start_cols)){
      start_date=company_rows[[start_cols[i]]]
      end_date=company_rows[[end_cols[i]]]
      if(is.na(start_date)||is.na(end_date)) next
      #Check if the reference date (e.g. mid-month of chosen quarter/month) falls within this range
      reference_date=as.Date(paste0(year,"-",reference_months[1],"-15"))
      if(start_date<=reference_date && reference_date<=end_date){
        start_year=year(start_date)
        end_year=year(end_date)
        start_month=month(start_date)
        end_month=month(end_date)
        #Build shortened_month_list if date range is within the defined year
        if(start_year==year && end_year==year){
          shortened_month_list=start_month:end_month
        } else if(start_year==year){
          shortened_month_list=start_month:12
        } else if(end_year==year){
          shortened_month_list=1:end_month
        } else{
          shortened_month_list=1:12
        }
        break #Only match the first applicable range
      }
    }
    #Final check: determine if the necessary months are covered
    if(!is.null(shortened_month_list)){
      all_required_months_covered=all(shortened_month_list %in% months_covered)
      if(all_required_months_covered){
        cat("Shortened month list for",company,"in",year,"is fully covered. Proceed with yearly report for months:", 
            paste(month.name[shortened_month_list],collapse=", "),"\n")
      } else{
        cat("Missing required months for",company,"in shortened list. Cannot proceed with yearly report.\n")
      }
    } else{
      #Default: check if all 12 months are covered
      all_required_months_covered=all(1:12 %in% months_covered)
      if(all_required_months_covered){
        cat("All 12 months in",year,"are covered. Proceed with full yearly report.\n")
      } else{
        cat("Missing months in full year. Cannot proceed with full yearly report.\n")
      }
    }
    if((is.null(shortened_month_list) && all(1:12 %in% months_covered))||(!is.null(shortened_month_list) && all(shortened_month_list %in% months_covered))){
      start_time_2=Sys.time()
      cat("Proceeding with yearly report for",company,"in",year,"...\n")
      yearly_report=data.frame(`Employee ID`=character(),Comments=character(),`Comments (Yearly Report)`=character(),
                                `Last Name`=character(),`First Name`=character(),`Employee Status`=character(),
                                `Work Location`=character(),`Resident State`=character(),`Hire Date`=as.Date(character()),
                                `Rehire Date`=as.Date(character()),`Termination Date`=as.Date(character()),
                                Classification=character(),`Wage Type`=character(),`Pay Rate`=numeric(),
                                stringsAsFactors=FALSE,check.names=FALSE)
      #Extract the relevant columns from baseline_info and convert to Date if not already
      baseline_info=baseline_info%>%mutate(`Start Date 1`=convert_to_date(`Start Date 1`),
                                            `End Date 1`=convert_to_date(`End Date 1`),
                                            `Start Date 2`=convert_to_date(`Start Date 2`),
                                            `End Date 2`=convert_to_date(`End Date 2`))
      #Helper function: get all months (as Date first of month) within a date range intersecting the target year
      get_months_in_range=function(start_date,end_date,target_year){
        #Ensure dates are in target year range, else return empty
        if(is.na(start_date)|is.na(end_date)) return(character(0))
        #Clip dates to the target year
        start_clip=max(as.Date(paste0(target_year,"-01-01")),start_date)
        end_clip=min(as.Date(paste0(target_year,"-12-31")),end_date)
        if(start_clip>end_clip) return(character(0)) #No overlap
        #Sequence of months (1st day) in the clipped range
        months_seq=seq(floor_date(start_clip,"month"),floor_date(end_clip,"month"),by="month")
        #Format to "MMM-YY"
        format(months_seq,"%b-%y")
      }
      #Get all months covered in either range 1 or range 2 for all rows
      all_months=unique(unlist(apply(baseline_info,1,function(row){
        months_1=get_months_in_range(as.Date(row["Start Date 1"]),as.Date(row["End Date 1"]),year)
        months_2=get_months_in_range(as.Date(row["Start Date 2"]),as.Date(row["End Date 2"]),year)
        unique(c(months_1,months_2))
      })))
      #Sort months chronologically (optional but cleaner)
      #Convert "MMM-YY" back to date for sorting
      all_months_sorted=all_months[order(as.Date(paste0("01-",all_months),format="%d-%b-%y"))]
      #Add columns for each month in yearly_report for Gross Wages, initialized as numeric(0)
      for(month_col in all_months_sorted){
        col_name=paste0(month_col," Gross Wages")
        yearly_report[[col_name]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      }
      #Add "Gross Wages" and "Annualized Wages" column after all monthly Gross Wages columns
      yearly_report[["Gross Wages"]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      yearly_report[["Annualized Wages"]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      #Add "Work State" column at the end
      yearly_report[["Work State"]]=character(nrow(yearly_report))
      #Add monthly "Work State Wages" columns for each month found
      for(month_col in all_months_sorted){
        col_name=paste0(month_col," Work State Wages")
        yearly_report[[col_name]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      }
      #Add the summary "Work State Wages" column at the end
      yearly_report[["Work State Wages"]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      #Reorder so "Work State Wages" column is immediately after the last monthly "Work State Wages" column
      cols=colnames(yearly_report)
      #Find the position of the last "MMM-YY Work State Wages" column
      work_state_wages_monthly_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Work State Wages$",cols)
      last_monthly_pos=max(work_state_wages_monthly_cols)
      #Reorder columns to put the summary "Work State Wages" right after monthly ones
      new_order=append(cols[-(last_monthly_pos+1)],"Work State Wages",after=last_monthly_pos)
      yearly_report=yearly_report[,new_order,drop=FALSE]
      #Add monthly "Work State SIT" columns for each month found
      for(month_col in all_months_sorted){
        col_name=paste0(month_col," Work State SIT")
        yearly_report[[col_name]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      }
      #Add the summary "Work State SIT" column at the end
      yearly_report[["Work State SIT"]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      #Reorder so "Work State SIT" column is immediately after the last monthly "Work State SIT" column
      cols=colnames(yearly_report)
      #Find the position of the last "MMM-YY Work State SIT" column
      work_state_sit_monthly_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Work State SIT$",cols)
      last_monthly_pos_sit=max(work_state_sit_monthly_cols)
      #Reorder columns to put the summary "Work State SIT" right after monthly ones
      new_order=append(cols[-(last_monthly_pos_sit+1)],"Work State SIT",after=last_monthly_pos_sit)
      yearly_report=yearly_report[,new_order,drop=FALSE]
      #Add "Resident State" column at the end
      yearly_report[["Resident State"]]=character(nrow(yearly_report))
      #Add monthly "Resident State Wages" columns for each month found
      for(month_col in all_months_sorted){
        col_name=paste0(month_col," Resident State Wages")
        yearly_report[[col_name]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      }
      #Add the summary "Resident State Wages" column at the end
      yearly_report[["Resident State Wages"]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      #Reorder so "Resident State Wages" column is immediately after the last monthly "Resident State Wages" column
      cols=colnames(yearly_report)
      #Find the position of the last "MMM-YY Resident State Wages" column
      resident_state_wages_monthly_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Resident State Wages$",cols)
      last_monthly_pos=max(resident_state_wages_monthly_cols)
      #Reorder columns to put the summary "Resident State Wages" right after monthly ones
      new_order=append(cols[-(last_monthly_pos+1)],"Resident State Wages",after=last_monthly_pos)
      yearly_report=yearly_report[,new_order,drop=FALSE]
      #Add monthly "Resident State SIT" columns for each month found
      for(month_col in all_months_sorted){
        col_name=paste0(month_col," Resident State SIT")
        yearly_report[[col_name]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      }
      #Add the summary "Resident State SIT" column at the end
      yearly_report[["Resident State SIT"]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      #Reorder so "Resident State SIT" column is immediately after the last monthly "Resident State SIT" column
      cols=colnames(yearly_report)
      #Find the position of the last "MMM-YY Resident State SIT" column
      resident_state_sit_monthly_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Resident State SIT$",cols)
      last_monthly_pos_sit=max(resident_state_sit_monthly_cols)
      #Reorder columns to put the summary "Resident State SIT" right after monthly ones
      new_order=append(cols[-(last_monthly_pos_sit+1)],"Resident State SIT",after=last_monthly_pos_sit)
      yearly_report=yearly_report[,new_order,drop=FALSE]
      #Add monthly "Hours Worked" columns for each month found
      for(month_col in all_months_sorted){
        col_name=paste0(month_col," Hours Worked")
        yearly_report[[col_name]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      }
      #Add the summary "Total Hours Worked" column at the end
      yearly_report[["Total Hours Worked"]]=numeric(nrow(yearly_report))
      #Reorder so "Total Hours Worked" column is immediately after the last monthly "Hours Worked" column
      cols=colnames(yearly_report)
      #Find the position of the last "MMM-YY Hours Worked" column
      hours_worked_monthly_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Hours Worked$",cols)
      last_monthly_pos_hours=max(hours_worked_monthly_cols)
      #Reorder columns to put the summary "Total Hours Worked" right after monthly ones
      new_order=append(cols[-(last_monthly_pos_hours+1)],"Total Hours Worked",after=last_monthly_pos_hours)
      yearly_report=yearly_report[,new_order,drop=FALSE]
      yearly_report[["Sum of Days in Pay Period"]]=character(0)
      yearly_report[["Min of Pay Period Start Date"]]=character(0)
      yearly_report[["Min of Pay Period End Date"]]=character(0)
      yearly_report[["Max of Pay Period End Date"]]=character(0)
      yearly_report[["Min of Pay Date"]]=character(0)
      yearly_report[["Max of Pay Date"]]=character(0)
      yearly_report[["Count of Pay Date"]]=character(0)
      #Load + filter report periods
      report_periods_file_path=paste0(directory,"Programs/Missouri Works/Missouri Works Report Periods.xlsx")
      report_periods=read_excel(report_periods_file_path,sheet="Report Periods")
      filtered_report_periods=report_periods%>%filter(Client==company)
      #Detect report period columns (flexible matching)
      cols=colnames(filtered_report_periods)
      monthly_start_cols=cols[str_detect(cols,regex("monthly.*start",ignore_case=TRUE))]
      monthly_end_cols=cols[str_detect(cols,regex("monthly.*end",ignore_case=TRUE))]
      quarterly_start_cols=cols[str_detect(cols,regex("quarterly.*start",ignore_case=TRUE))]
      quarterly_end_cols=cols[str_detect(cols,regex("quarterly.*end",ignore_case=TRUE))]
      #Convert all detected columns to Date
      date_cols=unique(c(monthly_start_cols,monthly_end_cols,quarterly_start_cols,quarterly_end_cols))
      filtered_report_periods[date_cols]=lapply(filtered_report_periods[date_cols],convert_to_date)
      #Helper to pair start/end safely
      build_ranges=function(start_cols,end_cols,df,label){
        if(length(start_cols)==0||length(end_cols)==0) return(data.frame())
        #Remove sorting - rely on order from detected columns
        out=do.call(rbind,Map(function(s,e){
          data.frame(type=label,start=df[[s]],end=df[[e]])
        },start_cols,end_cols))
          out=out[complete.cases(out),,drop=FALSE]
          return(out)
      }
      #Convert detected columns safely (column-by-column)
      for(col in monthly_start_cols){
        filtered_report_periods[[col]]=as.Date(filtered_report_periods[[col]])
      }
      for(col in monthly_end_cols){
        filtered_report_periods[[col]]=as.Date(filtered_report_periods[[col]])
      }
      for(col in quarterly_start_cols){
        filtered_report_periods[[col]]=as.Date(filtered_report_periods[[col]])
      }
      for(col in quarterly_end_cols){
        filtered_report_periods[[col]]=as.Date(filtered_report_periods[[col]])
      }
      monthly_ranges=build_ranges(monthly_start_cols,monthly_end_cols,filtered_report_periods,"Monthly")
      quarterly_ranges=build_ranges(quarterly_start_cols,quarterly_end_cols,filtered_report_periods,"Quarterly")
      #Build Start Date columns for selected year
      start_of_year=as.Date(paste0(year,"-01-01"))
      #Build months_seq as Date objects for the first day of each month in the year
      months_seq=seq.Date(from=as.Date(paste0(year,"-01-01")),to=as.Date(paste0(year,"-12-01")),by="month")
      new_cols=character(0)
      for(m in months_seq){
        #Ensure m is Date (usually unnecessary but safe)
        m=as.Date(m)
        #Get last day of the month by taking ceiling_date and subtracting 1 day
        month_end=ceiling_date(m,"month")-days(1)
        #Check if this month is within any monthly_ranges interval
        in_monthly=any(monthly_ranges$start<=month_end & monthly_ranges$end>=m)
        #Check if this month is within any quarterly_ranges interval
        in_quarterly=any(quarterly_ranges$start<=month_end & quarterly_ranges$end>=m)
        if(in_monthly){
          new_cols=c(new_cols,paste0(format(m,"%b-%y")," Start Date"))
        } else if(in_quarterly){
          qtr=quarter(m)
          new_cols=c(new_cols,paste0("Q",qtr," ",year," Start Date"))
        }
      }
      #Remove duplicates if any
      new_cols=unique(new_cols)
      #Add Start Date columns to yearly_report
      for(col in new_cols){
        yearly_report[[col]]=as.Date(character(0))
      }
      yearly_report[["MO Works Start Date"]]=character(0)
      new_cols=character(0)
      for(m in months_seq){
        #Ensure m is Date (usually unnecessary but safe)
        m=as.Date(m)
        #Get last day of the month by taking ceiling_date and subtracting 1 day
        month_end=ceiling_date(m,"month")-days(1)
        #Check if this month is within any monthly_ranges interval
        in_monthly=any(monthly_ranges$start<=month_end & monthly_ranges$end>=m)
        #Check if this month is within any quarterly_ranges interval
        in_quarterly=any(quarterly_ranges$start<=month_end & quarterly_ranges$end>=m)
        if(in_monthly){
          new_cols=c(new_cols,paste0(format(m,"%b-%y")," End Date"))
        } else if(in_quarterly){
          qtr=quarter(m)
          new_cols=c(new_cols,paste0("Q",qtr," ",year," End Date"))
        }
      }
      #Remove duplicates if any
      new_cols=unique(new_cols)
      #Add Start Date columns to yearly_report
      for(col in new_cols){
        yearly_report[[col]]=as.Date(character(0))
      }
      yearly_report[["MO Works End Date"]]=character(0)
      #Build Status columns ONLY for months inside ANY range
      #First day of each month in the selected year
      months_seq=seq.Date(from=as.Date(paste0(year,"-01-01")),to=as.Date(paste0(year,"-12-01")),by="month")
      #Combine both types of ranges
      all_ranges=rbind(monthly_ranges,quarterly_ranges)
      status_cols=character(0)
      for(i in seq_along(months_seq)){
        m=months_seq[i] #keeps Date class
        month_start=m
        month_end=ceiling_date(m,"month")-days(1)
        if(nrow(all_ranges)==0) next
        in_range=any(all_ranges$start<=month_end & all_ranges$end>=month_start)
        if(in_range){
          status_cols=c(status_cols,paste0(format(m,"%b-%y")," Status"))
        }
      }
      status_cols=unique(status_cols)
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      for(col in status_cols){
        if(n==0){
          yearly_report[[col]]=character(0)
        } else{
          yearly_report[[col]]=rep(NA_character_,n)
        }
      }
      col_name=paste0(year," AR Status")
      yearly_report[[col_name]]=character(0)
      #Assuming year is your current year as integer
      year_str=as.character(year)
      #Filter sheets matching pattern "YYYY Annual Report"
      annual_sheets=sheet_names[str_detect(sheet_names,"^\\d{4} Annual Report$")]
      if(length(annual_sheets)==0){
        message("No annual report sheets found. Continuing without importing AR Status columns.")
      } else{
        years_found=as.integer(str_extract(annual_sheets,"^\\d{4}"))
        latest_year=max(years_found)
        latest_sheet=annual_sheets[years_found==latest_year]
        ar_df=read.xlsx(wb,sheet=latest_sheet,colNames=TRUE,detectDates=TRUE)
        #Clean column names (replace dots with spaces)
        names(ar_df)=gsub("\\."," ",names(ar_df))
        status_cols=colnames(ar_df)[str_detect(colnames(ar_df),"^\\d{4} AR Status$")]
        status_cols_to_import=setdiff(status_cols,paste0(year_str," AR Status"))
        for(col in status_cols_to_import){
          if(!(col %in% colnames(yearly_report))){
            yearly_report[[col]]=NA_character_
          }
          yearly_report[[col]]=ar_df[[col]][match(yearly_report$`Employee ID`,ar_df$`Employee ID`)]
        }
      }
      yearly_report[["Works Days Worked"]]=character(0)
      yearly_report[["Gross Hourly Wage"]]=character(0)
      #Initialize vector for the new columns
      works_credit_cols=character(0)
      for(m in months_seq){
        m=as.Date(m)
        month_start=m
        month_end=ceiling_date(m,"month")-days(1)
        #Check if this month overlaps with any of the defined ranges
        in_range=any(all_ranges$start<=month_end & all_ranges$end>=month_start)
        if(in_range){
          works_credit_cols=c(works_credit_cols,paste0(format(m,"%b-%y")," Works Credit (Claimed)"))
        }
      }
      #Ensure unique column names
      works_credit_cols=unique(works_credit_cols)
      #Add these columns to yearly_report with NA_character_ or 0 (numeric) default values
      for(col in works_credit_cols){
        if(n==0){
          yearly_report[[col]]=numeric(0) #or character(0), but probably numeric for credits
        } else{
          yearly_report[[col]]=rep(NA_real_,n) #Use numeric NA if these are numeric credits
        }
      }
      yearly_report[["Works Credit (Claimed)"]]=character(0)
      #We'll track new columns to add in the desired alternating order
      earned_and_delta_cols=character(0)
      for(m in months_seq){
        m=as.Date(m)
        month_start=m
        month_end=ceiling_date(m,"month")-days(1)
        #Check if month is within any defined range
        in_range=any(all_ranges$start<=month_end & all_ranges$end>=month_start)
        if(in_range){
          earned_col=paste0(format(m,"%b-%y")," Works Credit (Earned)")
          delta_col=paste0(format(m,"%b-%y")," Works Credit Delta")
          earned_and_delta_cols=c(earned_and_delta_cols,earned_col,delta_col)
        }
      }
      #Add columns to yearly_report in order
      for(col in earned_and_delta_cols){
        if(n==0){
          yearly_report[[col]]=numeric(0) #No rows, empty numeric column
        } else{
          yearly_report[[col]]=rep(NA_real_,n) #Initialize with numeric NA
        }
      }
      yearly_report[["Works Credit (Earned)"]]=character(0)
      yearly_report[["Credit Claimed vs Credit Earned"]]=character(0)
      #Get the unique Employee IDs for the year
      unique_emp_ids=unique(combined_payroll_data$`Employee ID`[
                            format(as.Date(combined_payroll_data$`Pay Date`),"%Y")==as.character(year)])
      #Number of unique employees
      n_emps=length(unique_emp_ids)
      #If yearly_report has zero rows, add rows with NA for all columns except Employee ID
      if(nrow(yearly_report)==0){
        #Create a data frame with the same columns but n_emps rows
        #Initialize with NA values (or zeros where appropriate)
        #First, create a template row with NA or zeros
        template_row=yearly_report[rep(1,n_emps),,drop=FALSE] #Replicate row
        #Fill with NA (or zeros for numeric columns if you prefer)
        for(col in names(template_row)){
          if(col=="Employee ID") next
          if(is.numeric(template_row[[col]])){
            template_row[[col]]=rep(NA_real_,n_emps)
          } else if(is.character(template_row[[col]])){
            template_row[[col]]=rep(NA_character_,n_emps)
          } else if(inherits(template_row[[col]],"Date")){
            template_row[[col]]=rep(as.Date(NA),n_emps)
          } else{
            #Default to NA for any other types
            template_row[[col]]=rep(NA,n_emps)
          }
        }
        #Assign Employee IDs
        template_row$`Employee ID`=unique_emp_ids
        #Replace yearly_report with this new data frame
        yearly_report=template_row
      } else{
        #If yearly_report already has rows (unlikely), just replace Employee ID values accordingly
        yearly_report$`Employee ID`=unique_emp_ids[1:nrow(yearly_report)]
      }
      #Reset row names to default integers
      rownames(yearly_report)=NULL
      cols_to_update=c("Last Name","First Name","Employee Status","Work Location","Resident State","Hire Date",
                        "Rehire Date","Termination Date","Classification","Wage Type","Pay Rate","Work State")
      #Filter combined_payroll_data to only rows where Pay Date is within the year
      payroll_year=combined_payroll_data%>%filter(year(`Pay Date`)==year)
      #For each Employee ID, find the row with the latest Pay Date in that year
      latest_payroll_info=payroll_year%>%group_by(`Employee ID`)%>%
        filter(`Pay Date`==max(`Pay Date`,na.rm=TRUE))%>%slice_tail(n=1)%>%ungroup()%>%
        select(`Employee ID`,all_of(cols_to_update))
      #Create lookup lists for each column
      lookup_list=lapply(cols_to_update,function(col){
        setNames(latest_payroll_info[[col]],latest_payroll_info$`Employee ID`)
      })
      names(lookup_list)=cols_to_update
      #Update yearly_report columns by matching Employee ID
      for(col in cols_to_update){
        yearly_report[[col]]=lookup_list[[col]][as.character(yearly_report$`Employee ID`)]
      }
      sheet_name=paste0(year," Annual Report")
      if(sheet_name %in% names(wb)){
        removeWorksheet(wb,sheet_name)
      }
      addWorksheet(wb,sheet_name,tabColour="#4F81BD") #Medium Excel-style blue
      yearly_report_start_row=7
      writeData(wb,sheet=sheet_name,x=yearly_report,startRow=yearly_report_start_row,startCol=1,withFilter=TRUE)
      freezePane(wb,sheet=sheet_name,firstActiveRow=yearly_report_start_row+1, #Freeze row 8
                  firstActiveCol=4) #Freeze columns A–C
      sheet_yearly=paste0(year," Annual Report")
      sheet_payroll="Combined Payroll Data"
      add_monthly_sumifs_and_total=function(wb,sheet_yearly,sheet_payroll,yearly_df,payroll_df,metric_name){#e.g. "Gross Wages"
        yr_headers=colnames(yearly_df)
        pay_headers=colnames(payroll_df)
        yr_idx=setNames(seq_along(yr_headers),yr_headers)
        pay_idx=setNames(seq_along(pay_headers),pay_headers)
        n=nrow(yearly_df)
        if(n==0) return(invisible(NULL))
        #Payroll column letters
        sum_letter=int2col(pay_idx[metric_name])
        emp_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"])
        date_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
        #Yearly columns
        monthly_cols=grep(paste0("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} ",metric_name,"$"),yr_headers,value=TRUE)
        total_idx=which(yr_headers==metric_name)
        id_letter_yr=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
        #Monthly SUMIFS
        for(col in monthly_cols){
          month_txt=sub(paste0(" ",metric_name,"$"),"",col)
          m_start=as.Date(paste0(month_txt,"-01"),"%b-%y-%d")
          m_end=lubridate::ceiling_date(m_start,"month")-lubridate::days(1)
          target_idx=yr_idx[col]
          formulas=character(n)
          for(r in seq_len(n)){
            excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
            formulas[r]=sprintf(paste0("=SUMIFS(","'%s'!%s:%s,","'%s'!%s:%s,%s%d,","'%s'!%s:%s,\">=\"&DATE(%d,%d,%d),",
                                        "'%s'!%s:%s,\"<=\"&DATE(%d,%d,%d))"),sheet_payroll,sum_letter,sum_letter,
                                        sheet_payroll,emp_letter,emp_letter,id_letter_yr,excel_row,sheet_payroll,
                                        date_letter,date_letter,lubridate::year(m_start),lubridate::month(m_start),
                                        lubridate::day(m_start),sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,
                                        lubridate::year(m_end),lubridate::month(m_end),lubridate::day(m_end))
          }
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=target_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
        }
        #Row Total Sum
        if(length(monthly_cols)>0 && length(total_idx)==1){
          start_letter=int2col(min(yr_idx[monthly_cols]))
          end_letter=int2col(max(yr_idx[monthly_cols]))
          total_formulas=paste0("=SUM(",start_letter,yearly_report_start_row+1:(n+1),":",
                                end_letter,yearly_report_start_row+1:(n+1),")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=total_formulas,startCol=total_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
        }
      }
      metrics=c("Gross Wages","Work State Wages","Work State SIT","Resident State Wages","Resident State SIT")
      lapply(metrics,function(m) add_monthly_sumifs_and_total(wb,sheet_yearly,sheet_payroll,yearly_report,combined_payroll_data,m))
      sheet_yearly=paste0(year," Annual Report")
      sheet_payroll="Combined Payroll Data"
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      yr_headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      pay_headers=colnames(combined_payroll_data)
      yr_idx=setNames(seq_along(yr_headers),yr_headers)
      pay_idx=setNames(seq_along(pay_headers),pay_headers)
      #Get Excel column letters for key columns in payroll data
      total_hours_letter_payroll=int2col(pay_idx["Total Hours Worked"])
      emp_letter_payroll=int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"])
      date_letter_payroll=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
      #Identify all "MMM-YY Hours Worked" columns in yearly_report
      monthly_hours_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Hours Worked$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      #Get index for "Total Hours Worked" aggregate column in yearly_report
      total_hours_idx=which(yr_headers=="Total Hours Worked")
      #Loop over monthly hours columns to write SUMIFS formulas
      for(col in monthly_hours_cols){
        #Extract month-year from column name, e.g. "Jan-23"
        month_txt=sub(" Hours Worked$","",col)
        m_start=as.Date(paste0(month_txt,"-01"),"%b-%y-%d")
        m_end=ceiling_date(m_start,"month")-days(1)
        target_col_idx=yr_idx[col]
        id_letter_yr=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
        formulas=character(n)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf(paste0("=SUMIFS(","'%s'!%s:%s,","'%s'!%s:%s,%s%d,",
                                      "'%s'!%s:%s,\">=\"&DATE(%d,%d,%d),","'%s'!%s:%s,\"<=\"&DATE(%d,%d,%d))"),
                              sheet_payroll,total_hours_letter_payroll,total_hours_letter_payroll,
                              sheet_payroll,emp_letter_payroll,emp_letter_payroll,id_letter_yr,excel_row,
                              sheet_payroll,date_letter_payroll,date_letter_payroll,year(m_start),month(m_start),
                              day(m_start),sheet_payroll,date_letter_payroll,date_letter_payroll,year(m_end),
                              month(m_end),day(m_end))
        }
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=target_col_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      }
      #Now write the SUM formula to aggregate all monthly hours columns into "Total Hours Worked"
      if(length(monthly_hours_cols)>0 && length(total_hours_idx)==1){
        start_letter=int2col(min(yr_idx[monthly_hours_cols]))
        end_letter=int2col(max(yr_idx[monthly_hours_cols]))
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formula=paste0("=SUM(",start_letter,excel_row,":",end_letter,excel_row,")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=total_hours_idx,startRow=excel_row)
        }
      }
      annualized_col=yr_idx["Annualized Wages"]
      wage_type_col=int2col(yr_idx["Wage Type"])
      pay_rate_col=int2col(yr_idx["Pay Rate"])
      gross_wages_col=int2col(yr_idx["Gross Wages"])
      max_pay_period_col=int2col(yr_idx["Max of Pay Period End Date"])
      min_pay_period_col=int2col(yr_idx["Min of Pay Period End Date"])
      pay_rate_vals=yearly_report[["Pay Rate"]]
      has_low_pay_rate=any(pay_rate_vals<1,na.rm=TRUE)
      formulas=character(n)
      if(!has_low_pay_rate){
        #Formula based on Wage Type and Pay Rate
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf('=IF(%s%d="Salaried", %s%d*24, IF(%s%d="Hourly", %s%d*2080, ""))',
                              wage_type_col,excel_row,pay_rate_col,excel_row,wage_type_col,excel_row,
                              pay_rate_col,excel_row)
        }
      } else{
        #Formula using Max and Min columns, multiplying Gross Wages
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf('=(365/(%s%d-%s%d))*%s%d',max_pay_period_col,excel_row,min_pay_period_col,excel_row,
                              gross_wages_col,excel_row)
        }
      }
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=annualized_col,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      sheet_yearly=paste0(year," Annual Report")
      sheet_payroll="Combined Payroll Data"
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      yr_headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      pay_headers=colnames(combined_payroll_data)
      yr_idx=setNames(seq_along(yr_headers),yr_headers)
      pay_idx=setNames(seq_along(pay_headers),pay_headers)
      #Column letters
      sum_days_col_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Sum of Days in Pay Period"])
      yr_emp_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
      days_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Days in Pay Period"])
      emp_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"])
      date_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
      #Build formulas
      formulas=character(n)
      for(r in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
        formulas[r]=sprintf(
          paste0("=SUMIFS(","'%s'!%s:%s,","'%s'!%s:%s,%s%d,","'%s'!%s:%s,\">=\"&DATE(%d,1,1),",
                  "'%s'!%s:%s,\"<=\"&DATE(%d,12,31))"),sheet_payroll,days_letter,days_letter,
                  sheet_payroll,emp_letter,emp_letter,yr_emp_letter,excel_row,sheet_payroll,date_letter,
                  date_letter,year,sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year)
      }
      #Write to Excel
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=yr_idx["Sum of Days in Pay Period"],
                    startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      min_start_col=yr_idx["Min of Pay Period Start Date"]
      min_end_col=yr_idx["Min of Pay Period End Date"]
      emp_col=yr_idx["Employee ID"]
      cols_pay=colnames(combined_payroll_data)
      has_pay_period_start="Pay Period Start Date" %in% cols_pay
      pay_emp_col_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"])
      pay_pay_date_col_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
      pay_period_start_col_letter=if(has_pay_period_start) int2col(pay_idx["Pay Period Start Date"]) else NULL
      #yearly_report Employee ID column letter (for formula)
      yr_emp_col_letter=int2col(emp_col)
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      formulas=character(n)
      if(has_pay_period_start){
        #Write MINIFS formula:
        #=MINIFS('Combined Payroll Data'!PayPeriodStartDateCol, 'Combined Payroll Data'!EmployeeIDCol, $EmployeeID, 'Combined Payroll Data'!PayDateCol, ">="&DATE(year,1,1), 'Combined Payroll Data'!PayDateCol, "<="&DATE(year,12,31))
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf(
            '=_xlfn.MINIFS(\'Combined Payroll Data\'!%s:%s, \'Combined Payroll Data\'!%s:%s, %s%d, \'Combined Payroll Data\'!%s:%s, ">="&DATE(%d,1,1), \'Combined Payroll Data\'!%s:%s, "<="&DATE(%d,12,31))',
            pay_period_start_col_letter,pay_period_start_col_letter,pay_emp_col_letter,pay_emp_col_letter,
