```{r}
            yr_emp_col_letter,excel_row,pay_pay_date_col_letter,pay_pay_date_col_letter,year,
            pay_pay_date_col_letter,pay_pay_date_col_letter,year)
        }
      } else{
        #Fallback formula: = 'Min of Pay Period End Date' - 13
        min_end_col_letter=int2col(min_end_col)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf("=%s%d-13",min_end_col_letter,excel_row)
        }
      }
      #Write formula to the workbook
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=min_start_col,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      sheet_yearly=paste0(year," Annual Report")
      sheet_payroll="Combined Payroll Data"
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      yr_headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      pay_headers=colnames(combined_payroll_data)
      yr_idx=setNames(seq_along(yr_headers),yr_headers)
      pay_idx=setNames(seq_along(pay_headers),pay_headers)
      #Letters
      yr_emp_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
      date_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
      ppe_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Period End Date"])
      paydate_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
      min_ppe_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Min of Pay Period End Date"])
      min_paydate_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Min of Pay Date"])
      #Min of Pay Period End Date
      formulas_ppe=character(n)
      for(r in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
        formulas_ppe[r]=sprintf(paste0("=_xlfn.MINIFS(","'%s'!%s:%s,","'%s'!%s:%s,%s%d,",
                                        "'%s'!%s:%s,\">=\"&DATE(%d,1,1),","'%s'!%s:%s,\"<=\"&DATE(%d,12,31))"),
          sheet_payroll,ppe_letter,ppe_letter,sheet_payroll,int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"]),
          int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"]),yr_emp_letter,excel_row,sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year,
          sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year)
      }
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas_ppe,startCol=yr_idx["Min of Pay Period End Date"],
                    startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      #Min of Pay Date
      formulas_pd=character(n)
      for(r in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
        formulas_pd[r]=sprintf(paste0("=_xlfn.MINIFS(","'%s'!%s:%s,","'%s'!%s:%s,%s%d,",
                                      "'%s'!%s:%s,\">=\"&DATE(%d,1,1),","'%s'!%s:%s,\"<=\"&DATE(%d,12,31))"),
                                      sheet_payroll,paydate_letter,paydate_letter,sheet_payroll,
                                      int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"]),int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"]),yr_emp_letter,
                                      excel_row,sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year,sheet_payroll,date_letter,
                                      date_letter,year)
      }
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas_pd,startCol=yr_idx["Min of Pay Date"],
                    startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      sheet_yearly=paste0(year," Annual Report")
      sheet_payroll="Combined Payroll Data"
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      yr_headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      pay_headers=colnames(combined_payroll_data)
      yr_idx=setNames(seq_along(yr_headers),yr_headers)
      pay_idx=setNames(seq_along(pay_headers),pay_headers)
      #Letters
      yr_emp_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
      date_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
      ppe_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Period End Date"])
      paydate_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
      max_ppe_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Max of Pay Period End Date"])
      max_paydate_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Max of Pay Date"])
      #Max of Pay Period End Date
      formulas_ppe_max=character(n)
      for(r in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
        formulas_ppe_max[r]=sprintf(paste0("=_xlfn.MAXIFS(","'%s'!%s:%s,","'%s'!%s:%s,%s%d,",
                                            "'%s'!%s:%s,\">=\"&DATE(%d,1,1),","'%s'!%s:%s,\"<=\"&DATE(%d,12,31))"),
                                            sheet_payroll,ppe_letter,ppe_letter,sheet_payroll,
                                            int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"]),int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"]),
                                            yr_emp_letter,excel_row,sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year,
                                            sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year)
      }
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas_ppe_max,startCol=yr_idx["Max of Pay Period End Date"],
                    startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      #Max of Pay Date
      formulas_pd_max=character(n)
      for(r in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
        formulas_pd_max[r]=sprintf(paste0("=_xlfn.MAXIFS(","'%s'!%s:%s,","'%s'!%s:%s,%s%d,",
                                          "'%s'!%s:%s,\">=\"&DATE(%d,1,1),","'%s'!%s:%s,\"<=\"&DATE(%d,12,31))"),
                                          sheet_payroll,paydate_letter,paydate_letter,sheet_payroll,
                                          int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"]),int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"]),
                                          yr_emp_letter,excel_row,sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year,
                                          sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year)
      }
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas_pd_max,startCol=yr_idx["Max of Pay Date"],
                    startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      sheet_yearly=paste0(year," Annual Report")
      sheet_payroll="Combined Payroll Data"
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      yr_headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      pay_headers=colnames(combined_payroll_data)
      yr_idx=setNames(seq_along(yr_headers),yr_headers)
      pay_idx=setNames(seq_along(pay_headers),pay_headers)
      #Letters
      yr_emp_letter=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
      count_col_idx=yr_idx["Count of Pay Date"]
      emp_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Employee ID"])
      date_letter=int2col(pay_idx["Pay Date"])
      formulas=character(n)
      for(r in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
        formulas[r]=sprintf(paste0("=COUNTIFS(","'%s'!%s:%s,%s%d,","'%s'!%s:%s,\">=\"&DATE(%d,1,1),",
                                    "'%s'!%s:%s,\"<=\"&DATE(%d,12,31))"),sheet_payroll,emp_letter,emp_letter,
                                    yr_emp_letter,excel_row,sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year,
                                    sheet_payroll,date_letter,date_letter,year)
      }
      writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=count_col_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      if(file.exists(file_path)){
        #Find most recent "YYYY Yearly Report"
        yearly_sheets=grep("^\\d{4} Yearly Report$",sheet_names,value=TRUE)
        prev_period=NULL
        if(length(yearly_sheets)>0){
          sheet_years=as.integer(sub(" Yearly Report$","",yearly_sheets))
          #Only years strictly before current year
          valid_idx=which(sheet_years<year)
          if(length(valid_idx)>0){
            most_recent_year=max(sheet_years[valid_idx])
            prev_period=paste0(most_recent_year," Yearly Report")
          }
        }
        #If found, load and merge comments
        if(!is.null(prev_period)){
          prev_report=read.xlsx(wb,sheet=prev_period,startRow=yearly_report_start_row,colNames=TRUE,detectDates=TRUE)
          names(prev_report)=gsub("\\."," ",names(prev_report))
          if("Employee ID" %in% colnames(prev_report)){
            prev_report$`Employee ID`=as.character(prev_report$`Employee ID`)
          }
          if("Comments" %in% colnames(prev_report)){
            prev_report$Comments=as.character(prev_report$Comments)
            prev_comments=prev_report%>%select(`Employee ID`,Comments)
            if("New Employee ID" %in% colnames(yearly_report) && !("New Employee ID" %in% colnames(prev_report))){
              yearly_report=yearly_report%>%mutate(`New Employee ID`=as.character(`New Employee ID`),
                                                    Comments=as.character(Comments))%>%
                left_join(prev_comments,by=c("New Employee ID"="New Employee ID"),suffix=c("",".prev"))
            } else{
              yearly_report=yearly_report%>%mutate(`Employee ID`=as.character(`Employee ID`),
                                                    Comments=as.character(Comments))%>%
                                              left_join(prev_comments,by="Employee ID",suffix=c("",".prev"))
            }
            yearly_report=yearly_report%>%mutate(Comments=coalesce(as.character(Comments),""),
              Comments.prev=coalesce(as.character(Comments.prev),""),
              Comments=case_when(Comments.prev!="" & Comments!=""~paste0(Comments,"; ",Comments.prev),
              Comments.prev!="" & Comments==""~Comments.prev,TRUE~Comments))%>%select(-Comments.prev)
          }
        }
      }
      yearly_report$Comments[is.na(yearly_report$Comments)]=""
      #Column letters
      emp_letter_yearly=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
      mw_headers=colnames(missouri_works)
      emp_letter_sheet=int2col(which(mw_headers=="Employee ID"))
      start_letter_sheet=int2col(which(mw_headers=="MO Works Start Date"))
      #Only check sheet names (NOT importing)
      all_sheets=sheets(wb)
      #Find Start Date columns
      start_date_cols=grep("Start Date$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      start_date_cols=setdiff(start_date_cols,"MO Works Start Date")
      #Helper to find sheet match
      find_sheet=function(candidates){
        hit=candidates[candidates %in% all_sheets]
        if(length(hit)) hit[1] else NULL
      }
      #Loop
      for(col_name in start_date_cols){
        sheet_match=NULL
        #Monthly
        if(str_detect(col_name,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}")){
          mon_txt=str_extract(col_name,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}")
          d=my(mon_txt)
          mm=format(d,"%m")
          yyyy=format(d,"%Y")
          sheet_match=find_sheet(c(paste0(mm,".",yyyy),paste0(yyyy,".",mm)))
        }
        #Quarterly
        if(str_detect(col_name,"^Q[1-4]")){
          qtr=str_extract(col_name,"Q[1-4]")
          yyyy=str_extract(col_name,"\\d{4}")
          sheet_match=find_sheet(c(paste0(yyyy,".",qtr),paste0(qtr,".",yyyy)))
        }
        if(is.null(sheet_match)) next
        target_idx=yr_idx[col_name]
        formulas=character(n)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf('=IFERROR(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(%s%d,\'%s\'!%s:%s,\'%s\'!%s:%s,""),"")',emp_letter_yearly,
                              excel_row,sheet_match,emp_letter_sheet,emp_letter_sheet,sheet_match,start_letter_sheet,
                              start_letter_sheet)
        }
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=target_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      }
      cols=colnames(yearly_report)
      #Find ONLY dynamic Start Date cols
      start_idx=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}|Q[1-4] \\d{4}) Start Date$",cols)
      start_idx=setdiff(start_idx,which(cols=="MO Works Start Date"))
      if(length(start_idx)>0){
        first_letter=int2col(min(start_idx))
        last_letter=int2col(max(start_idx))
        target_idx=which(cols=="MO Works Start Date")
        n=nrow(yearly_report)
        for(i in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=i+yearly_report_start_row
          formula=paste0("=IFERROR(MAX(",first_letter,excel_row,":",last_letter, excel_row,"),\"\")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=target_idx,startRow=excel_row)
        }
      }
      #End Date Xlookup
      end_date_cols=grep("End Date$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      end_date_cols=setdiff(end_date_cols,"MO Works End Date")
      end_letter_sheet=int2col(which(mw_headers=="MO Works End Date"))
      for(col_name in end_date_cols){
        sheet_match=NULL
        #Monthly
        if(str_detect(col_name,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}")){
          mon_txt=str_extract(col_name,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}")
          d=my(mon_txt)
          mm=format(d,"%m")
          yyyy=format(d,"%Y")
          sheet_match=find_sheet(c(paste0(mm,".",yyyy),paste0(yyyy,".",mm)))
        }
        #Quarterly
        if(str_detect(col_name,"^Q[1-4]")){
          qtr=str_extract(col_name,"Q[1-4]")
          yyyy=str_extract(col_name,"\\d{4}")
          sheet_match=find_sheet(c(paste0(yyyy,".",qtr),paste0(qtr,".",yyyy)))
        }
        if(is.null(sheet_match)) next
        target_idx=yr_idx[col_name]
        formulas=character(n)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf('=IFERROR(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(%s%d,\'%s\'!%s:%s,\'%s\'!%s:%s,""),"")',emp_letter_yearly,
                              excel_row,sheet_match,emp_letter_sheet,emp_letter_sheet,sheet_match,end_letter_sheet,
                              end_letter_sheet)
        }
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=target_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      }
      #Aggregate latest End Date into MO Works End Date
      cols=colnames(yearly_report)
      end_idx=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}|Q[1-4] \\d{4}) End Date$",cols)
      end_idx=setdiff(end_idx,which(cols=="MO Works End Date"))
      if(length(end_idx)>0){
        first_letter=int2col(min(end_idx))
        last_letter=int2col(max(end_idx))
        target_idx=which(cols=="MO Works End Date")
        for(i in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=i+yearly_report_start_row
          formula=paste0("=IFERROR(IF(MAX(",first_letter,excel_row,":",last_letter,excel_row,")=0,\"\",MAX(",
                          first_letter,excel_row,":",last_letter,excel_row,")),\"\")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=target_idx,startRow=excel_row)
        }
      }
      emp_letter_yearly=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
      #Find all "MMM-YY Status" columns in yearly_report
      status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Status$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      #Determine most recent status columns
      most_recent_cols=c()
      if(!is.null(month) && month!=""){
        #If month is defined, pick the first most recent column (assumes status_cols is sorted oldest → newest)
        most_recent_cols=tail(status_cols,1)
      } else if(!is.null(quarter) && quarter!=""){
        #If quarter is defined, pick the three most recent columns
        most_recent_cols=tail(status_cols,3)
      }
      #Loop each monthly status column
      for(col_name in status_cols){
        mon_txt=stringr::str_extract(col_name,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}")
        d=lubridate::my(mon_txt)
        mm=format(d,"%m")
        yyyy=format(d,"%Y")
        qtr=paste0("Q",lubridate::quarter(d))
        #Determine correct sheet
        sheet_match=find_sheet(c(paste0(yyyy,".",mm),paste0(mm,".",yyyy),paste0(yyyy,".",qtr),paste0(qtr,".",yyyy)))
        if(is.null(sheet_match)) next
        #Check if current column corresponds to a most recent column
        if(col_name %in% most_recent_cols){
          #Use existing missouri_works column names
          header_row=colnames(missouri_works)
        } else{
          #Read only the header row from the workbook object
          header_row=read.xlsx(wb,sheet=sheet_match,rows=report_start_row,colNames=FALSE)
          #Clean column names (replace dots with spaces)
          names(header_row)=gsub("\\."," ",names(header_row))
          #Flatten to a character vector
          header_row=as.character(unlist(header_row))
        }
        header_vals=as.character(unlist(header_row))
        emp_idx_sheet=which(header_vals=="Employee ID")
        status_idx_sheet=which(header_vals==col_name)
        if(length(emp_idx_sheet)==0||length(status_idx_sheet)==0) next
        emp_letter_sheet=int2col(emp_idx_sheet)
        status_letter_sheet=int2col(status_idx_sheet)
        target_idx=yr_idx[col_name]
        formulas=character(n)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf('=IFERROR(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(%s%d,\'%s\'!%s:%s,\'%s\'!%s:%s,""),"")',emp_letter_yearly,
                              excel_row,sheet_match,emp_letter_sheet,emp_letter_sheet,sheet_match,status_letter_sheet,
                              status_letter_sheet)
        }
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=target_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      }
      cols=colnames(yearly_report)
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      #Locate AR Status column
      ar_col_name=paste0(year," AR Status")
      ar_idx=which(cols==ar_col_name)
      if(length(ar_idx)==0) stop("AR Status column not found")
      #Find monthly status columns BEFORE AR
      status_idx=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Status$",cols)
      status_idx=status_idx[status_idx<ar_idx]
      if(length(status_idx)==0) stop("No monthly status columns found before AR Status")
      first_letter=int2col(min(status_idx))
      last_letter=int2col(max(status_idx))
      target_letter=int2col(ar_idx)
      #Write formulas
      for(i in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=i+yearly_report_start_row
        formula=sprintf('=IF(COUNTIF(%s%d:%s%d,"Eligible")>0,"Eligible",IF(COUNTIF(%s%d:%s%d,"Baseline")>0,"Baseline",IFERROR(LOOKUP(2,1/(%s%d:%s%d<>""),%s%d:%s%d),"")))',
                        first_letter,excel_row,last_letter,excel_row,first_letter,excel_row,last_letter,excel_row,
                        first_letter,excel_row,last_letter,excel_row,first_letter,excel_row,last_letter,excel_row)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=ar_idx,startRow=excel_row)
      }
      #Locate needed columns
      start_idx=yr_idx["MO Works Start Date"]
      end_idx=yr_idx["MO Works End Date"]
      worked_idx=yr_idx["Works Days Worked"]
      start_letter=int2col(start_idx)
      end_letter=int2col(end_idx)
      #Find ONLY MMM-YY Status columns
      status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Status$",cols,value=TRUE)
      if(length(status_cols)==0){
        stop("No MMM-YY Status columns found")
      }
      months=my(str_extract(status_cols,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}"))
      period_start_date=floor_date(min(months),"month")
      period_end_date=ceiling_date(max(months),"month")-days(1)
      period_start=sprintf("DATE(%d,%d,%d)",year(period_start_date),month(period_start_date),day(period_start_date))
      period_end=sprintf("DATE(%d,%d,%d)",year(period_end_date),month(period_end_date),day(period_end_date))
      #Write formulas
      for(i in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=i+yearly_report_start_row
        formula=sprintf('=MAX(0,MIN(IF(ISBLANK(%s%d),%s,%s%d),%s)-MAX(%s%d,%s))+1',end_letter,excel_row,period_end,
                        end_letter,excel_row,period_end,start_letter,excel_row,period_start)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=worked_idx,startRow=excel_row)
      }
      #Locate columns
      wage_idx=yr_idx["Gross Hourly Wage"]
      gross_idx=yr_idx["Gross Wages"]
      hours_idx=yr_idx["Total Hours Worked"]
      gross_letter=int2col(gross_idx)
      hours_letter=int2col(hours_idx)
      #Write formulas
      for(i in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=i+yearly_report_start_row
        formula=sprintf("=%s%d/%s%d",gross_letter,excel_row,hours_letter,excel_row)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=wage_idx,startRow=excel_row)
      }
      emp_letter_yearly=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"])
      #Find all "MMM-YY Works Credit (Claimed)" columns in yearly_report
      credit_claimed_cols=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}) Works Credit \\(Claimed\\)$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      #Determine most recent status columns
      most_recent_cols=c()
      if(!is.null(month) && month!=""){
        #If month is defined, pick the first most recent column (assumes credit_claimed_cols is sorted oldest → newest)
        most_recent_cols=tail(credit_claimed_cols,1)
      } else if(!is.null(quarter) && quarter!=""){
        #If quarter is defined, pick the three most recent columns
        most_recent_cols=tail(credit_claimed_cols,3)
      }
      #Loop each monthly status column
      for(col_name in credit_claimed_cols){
        mon_txt=stringr::str_extract(col_name,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}")
        d=lubridate::my(mon_txt)
        mm=format(d,"%m")
        yyyy=format(d,"%Y")
        qtr=paste0("Q",lubridate::quarter(d))
        #Determine correct sheet
        sheet_match=find_sheet(c(paste0(yyyy,".",mm),paste0(mm,".",yyyy),paste0(yyyy,".",qtr),paste0(qtr,".",yyyy)))
        if(is.null(sheet_match)) next
        #Check if current column corresponds to a most recent column
        if(col_name %in% most_recent_cols){
          #Use existing missouri_works column names
          header_row=colnames(missouri_works)
        } else{
          #Read header row from the Excel sheet
          header_row=read.xlsx(wb,sheet=sheet_match,rows=report_start_row,colNames=FALSE)
          #Clean column names (replace dots with spaces)
          names(header_row)=gsub("\\."," ",names(header_row))
          #Flatten to a character vector
          header_row=as.character(unlist(header_row))
        }
        header_vals=as.character(unlist(header_row))
        emp_idx_sheet=which(header_vals=="Employee ID")
        credit_idx_sheet=which(header_vals==sub(" \\(Claimed\\)$","",col_name))
        if(length(emp_idx_sheet)==0||length(credit_idx_sheet)==0) next
        emp_letter_sheet=int2col(emp_idx_sheet)
        status_letter_sheet=int2col(credit_idx_sheet)
        target_idx=yr_idx[col_name]
        formulas=character(n)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf('=IFERROR(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(%s%d,\'%s\'!%s:%s,\'%s\'!%s:%s,""),"")',emp_letter_yearly,
                              excel_row,sheet_match,emp_letter_sheet,emp_letter_sheet,sheet_match,status_letter_sheet,
                              status_letter_sheet)
        }
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=target_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      }
      #Find all "MMM-YY Works Credit (Claimed)" columns
      credit_claimed_cols=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}) Works Credit \\(Claimed\\)$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      if(length(credit_claimed_cols)>0){
        #Get column indices for those columns
        credit_claimed_indices=which(yr_headers %in% credit_claimed_cols)
        #Find the target "Works Credit (Claimed)" column index
        target_idx=yr_idx["Works Credit (Claimed)"]
        #Column letters for credit_claimed columns
        credit_letters=sapply(credit_claimed_indices,int2col)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          #Build the range for sum, e.g. "C5:E5"
          sum_range=paste0(credit_letters[1],excel_row,":",credit_letters[length(credit_letters)],excel_row)
          #Formula: sum of the preceding "MMM-YY Works Credit (Claimed)" columns
          formula=paste0("=SUM(",sum_range,")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=target_idx,startRow=excel_row)
        }
      }
      emp_letter_yearly=int2col(yr_idx["Employee ID"]) #Just in case you want Employee ID later, but not strictly needed here
      #Find all "MMM-YY Works Credit (Earned)" columns
      earned_cols=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}) Works Credit \\(Earned\\)$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      for(col_name in earned_cols){
        #Extract MMM-YY prefix
        mon_yr=str_extract(col_name,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}")
        #Build corresponding Status and Work State SIT column names
        status_col_name=paste0(mon_yr," Status")
        sit_col_name=paste0(mon_yr," Work State SIT")
        #Check these columns exist
        if(!(status_col_name %in% yr_headers && sit_col_name %in% yr_headers)) next
        target_idx=yr_idx[col_name]
        status_idx=yr_idx[status_col_name]
        sit_idx=yr_idx[sit_col_name]
        status_letter=int2col(status_idx)
        sit_letter=int2col(sit_idx)
        #Prepare formulas for each row
        formulas=character(n)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf('=IF(%s%d="Eligible",%s%d,"")',status_letter,excel_row,sit_letter,excel_row)
        }
        #Write formulas into the Excel sheet
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=target_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      }
      #Find all "MMM-YY Delta" columns
      delta_cols=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}) Works Credit Delta$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      for(col_name in delta_cols){
        #Extract MMM-YY prefix
        mon_yr=str_extract(col_name,"^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}")
        earned_col_name=paste0(mon_yr," Works Credit (Earned)")
        claimed_col_name=paste0(mon_yr," Works Credit (Claimed)")
        #Check columns exist
        if(!(earned_col_name %in% yr_headers && claimed_col_name %in% yr_headers)) next
        target_idx=yr_idx[col_name]
        earned_idx=yr_idx[earned_col_name]
        claimed_idx=yr_idx[claimed_col_name]
        earned_letter=int2col(earned_idx)
        claimed_letter=int2col(claimed_idx)
        formulas=character(n)
        for(r in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=r+yearly_report_start_row
          formulas[r]=sprintf('=IFERROR(%s%d-%s%d,"")',earned_letter,excel_row,claimed_letter,excel_row)
        }
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formulas,startCol=target_idx,startRow=yearly_report_start_row+1)
      }
      #Find all "MMM-YY Works Credit (Earned)" columns
      earned_cols=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}) Works Credit \\(Earned\\)$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      if(length(earned_cols)>0){
        #Get their column indexes and letters
        earned_idx=yr_idx[earned_cols]
        earned_letters=sapply(earned_idx,int2col)
        #Construct the SUM formula range for each row
        #It will look like =SUM(B5,D5,F5,...) for the row 5 if those letters correspond to B,D,F etc.
        target_idx=yr_idx["Works Credit (Earned)"]
        target_letter=int2col(target_idx)
        for(i in seq_len(n)){
          excel_row=i+yearly_report_start_row
          #Compose the sum of all earned columns for this row
          sum_parts=paste0(earned_letters,excel_row,collapse=",")
          formula=paste0("=SUM(",sum_parts,")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=target_idx,startRow=excel_row)
        }
      }
      earned_idx=yr_idx["Works Credit (Earned)"]
      claimed_idx=yr_idx["Works Credit (Claimed)"]
      target_idx=yr_idx["Credit Claimed vs Credit Earned"]
      earned_letter=int2col(earned_idx)
      claimed_letter=int2col(claimed_idx)
      for(i in seq_len(n)){
        excel_row=i+yearly_report_start_row
        formula=paste0("=",earned_letter,excel_row,"-",claimed_letter,excel_row)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=target_idx,startRow=excel_row)
      }
      #Find all columns ending with "Date" but exclude "Count of Pay Date"
      date_cols=grep("Date$",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      date_cols=setdiff(date_cols,"Count of Pay Date")
      #Get their column indexes and letters
      date_idx=yr_idx[date_cols]
      date_letters=int2col(date_idx)
      #Apply date format to all rows + header row in those columns
      #Assumption: yearly_report_start_row is the header row number
      start_row=yearly_report_start_row+1 #data rows start after header
      #Determine how many rows to format
      num_rows=nrow(yearly_report)
      for(i in seq_along(date_letters)){
        col_letter=date_letters[i]
        #Format from header row to last data row
        openxlsx::addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly, style=createStyle(numFmt="DATE"),cols=col_letter, 
                            rows=yearly_report_start_row:(yearly_report_start_row+num_rows),
                            gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      sheet_yearly=paste0(year," Annual Report")
      yr_headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      yr_idx=setNames(seq_along(yr_headers),yr_headers)
      #Build regex pattern for matching all required column titles:
      accounting_patterns=c("^Pay Rate$", #Exact "Pay Rate"
                            "Gross Wages", #Contains "Gross Wages"
                            "Annualized Wages", #Contains "Annualized Wages"
                            "Work State Wages", #Contains "Work State Wages"
                            "Work State SIT", #Contains "Work State SIT"
                            "Resident State Wages", #Contains "Resident State Wages"
                            "Resident State SIT", #Contains "Resident State SIT"
                            "^Gross Hourly Wage$", #Exact "Gross Hourly Wage"
                            "Works Credit \\(Claimed\\)", #Contains "Works Credit (Claimed)"
                            "Works Credit \\(Earned\\)", #Contains "Works Credit (Earned)"
                            "Works Credit Delta", #Contains "Works Credit Delta"
                            "Credit Claimed vs Credit Earned") #Exact title
      #Combine into one regex
      pattern=paste(accounting_patterns,collapse="|")
      #Find matching column names
      accounting_cols=grep(pattern,yr_headers,value=TRUE,ignore.case=FALSE)
      #Get column indexes and letters
      accounting_idx=yr_idx[accounting_cols]
      accounting_letters=int2col(accounting_idx)
      start_row=yearly_report_start_row+1
      num_rows=nrow(yearly_report)
      #Apply Accounting format style
      for(i in seq_along(accounting_letters)){
        col_letter=accounting_letters[i]
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING"),cols=col_letter,
                  rows=yearly_report_start_row:(yearly_report_start_row+num_rows),gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Integer (comma, no decimals) formatting
      integer_cols=c("Sum of Days in Pay Period","Count of Pay Date","Works Days Worked")
      #Keep only ones that actually exist
      integer_cols=intersect(integer_cols,yr_headers)
      integer_idx=yr_idx[integer_cols]
      integer_letters=int2col(integer_idx)
      int_style=createStyle(numFmt="#,##0")
      for(col_letter in integer_letters){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=int_style,cols=col_letter,
                  rows=yearly_report_start_row:(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),
                  gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Identify columns with titles "MMM-YY Hours Worked" or "Total Hours Worked"
      hours_worked_cols=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Hours Worked|Total Hours Worked)$",colnames(yearly_report))
      #Create number format style with comma separator and 2 decimals
      style_hours_worked=createStyle(numFmt="#,##0.00")
      #Apply the style to the header and body rows
      for(col_idx in hours_worked_cols){
        #Header row styling (optional, you can skip if no number format needed on header)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_hours_worked,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=col_idx,
                  gridExpand=FALSE)
        #Body rows styling
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_hours_worked,
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),
                  cols=col_idx,gridExpand=TRUE)
      }
      bold_header_style=createStyle(textDecoration="bold")
      addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=bold_header_style,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=1:ncol(yearly_report),
                gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      #Comments column formatting
      comment_cols=grep("Comments",yr_headers,value=TRUE)
      if(length(comment_cols)>0){
        comment_idx=yr_idx[comment_cols]
        comment_letters=int2col(comment_idx)
        header_style=createStyle(fgFill="#BFBFBF",textDecoration="italic")
        body_style=createStyle(fgFill="#EDEDED",textDecoration="italic")
        for(col_letter in comment_letters){
          #Header cell only
          addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=header_style,cols=col_letter,rows=yearly_report_start_row,
                    gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
          #Body rows
          addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=body_style,cols=col_letter,
                    rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),
                    gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
        }
      }
      headers=names(yearly_report)
      payroll_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} (Gross Wages|Work State Wages|Work State SIT|Resident State Wages|Resident State SIT|Hours Worked)$",
                        headers)
      if(length(payroll_cols)>0){
        header_style=createStyle(fgFill="#BFBFBF")
        body_style=createStyle(fgFill="#D9D9D9")
        #Header row
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=header_style,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=payroll_cols,
                  gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
        #Body rows
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=body_style,
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),
                  cols=payroll_cols,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      headers=names(yearly_report)
      suffixes=c("Gross Wages","Work State Wages","Work State SIT","Resident State Wages","Resident State SIT",
                  "Hours Worked","Status","Works Credit \\(Claimed\\)")
      for(sfx in suffixes){
        idx=grep(paste0("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} ",sfx,"$"),headers)
        if(length(idx)==0) next
        first_col=min(idx)
        last_col=max(idx)
        #Make collapsible (outline group)
        groupColumns(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=first_col:last_col,hidden=FALSE) #Set TRUE if you want collapsed by default
      }
      #Find BOTH Earned + Delta columns
      credit_block_idx=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}) Works Credit (\\(Earned\\)|Delta)$",headers)
      if(length(credit_block_idx)>0){
        first_col=min(credit_block_idx)
        last_col=max(credit_block_idx)
        #Collapse entire block
        groupColumns(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=first_col:last_col,hidden=FALSE) #TRUE if you want collapsed by default
      }
      headers=names(yearly_report)
      first_row=yearly_report_start_row
      last_row=yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)
      #Helper: split vector into contiguous runs
      split_runs=function(idx){
        if(length(idx)==0) return(list())
        split(idx,cumsum(c(TRUE,diff(idx)!=1)))
      }
      #Helper: apply border + collapse to each run
      add_group_blocks=function(idx){
        runs=split_runs(sort(idx))
        for(run in runs){
          first_col=min(run)
          last_col=max(run)
          #Collapsible group
          groupColumns(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=first_col:last_col,hidden=FALSE) #TRUE if you want collapsed by default
        }
      }
      #Start Date (handles MMM or Q automatically)
      start_idx=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}|Q[1-4] \\d{4}) Start Date$",headers)
      #End Date (handles MMM or Q automatically)
      end_idx=grep("^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}|Q[1-4] \\d{4}) End Date$",headers)
      add_group_blocks(start_idx)
      add_group_blocks(end_idx)
      #Styles for start_idx columns (Start Date columns)
      style_start_header=createStyle(fgFill="#E1FFEF",textDecoration="bold")
      style_start_body=createStyle(fgFill="#E1FFEF")
      #Styles for end_idx columns (End Date columns)
      style_end_header=createStyle(fgFill="#FFE5E5",textDecoration="bold")
      style_end_body=createStyle(fgFill="#FFE5E5")
      #Styles for MO Works Start Date
      style_mo_start_header=createStyle(fgFill="#00B050",textDecoration="bold")
      style_mo_start_body=createStyle(fgFill="#ABFFD1")
      #Styles for MO Works End Date
      style_mo_end_header=createStyle(fgFill="#FF0000",textDecoration="bold")
      style_mo_end_body=createStyle(fgFill="#FFC5C5")
      #Apply styles for start_idx columns
      for(col_idx in start_idx){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_start_header,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=col_idx,
                  gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_start_body,
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),
                  cols=col_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Apply styles for end_idx columns
      for(col_idx in end_idx){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_end_header,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=col_idx,
                  gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_end_body,
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),
                  cols=col_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Find MO Works Start Date column index
      mo_start_col=which(colnames(yearly_report)=="MO Works Start Date")
      if(length(mo_start_col)==1){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_mo_start_header,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=mo_start_col,
                  gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_mo_start_body,
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),
                  cols=mo_start_col,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Find MO Works End Date column index
      mo_end_col=which(colnames(yearly_report)=="MO Works End Date")
      if(length(mo_end_col)==1){
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_mo_end_header,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=mo_end_col,
                  gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_mo_end_body,
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),
                  cols=mo_end_col,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Get column indexes
      mo_start_col=which(colnames(yearly_report)=="MO Works Start Date")
      mo_end_col=which(colnames(yearly_report)=="MO Works End Date")
      #Create styles for MO Works Start Date and End Date
      mo_start_style=createStyle(fontColour="#00B050",textDecoration="bold")
      mo_end_style=createStyle(fontColour="#FF0000",textDecoration="bold")
      #Define row range for data body (exclude header)
      body_rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report))
      #Conditional formatting for MO Works Start Date in current year
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=mo_start_col,rows=body_rows,
                            rule=paste0('=YEAR(',int2col(mo_start_col),body_rows[1],')=',year),style=mo_start_style)
      #Conditional formatting for MO Works End Date in current year
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=mo_end_col,rows=body_rows,
                            rule=paste0('=YEAR(',int2col(mo_end_col),body_rows[1],')=',year),style=mo_end_style)
      headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      n_rows=nrow(yearly_report)
      #Find columns matching "MMM-YY Status"
      status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Status$",headers,value=TRUE)
      #Find columns matching "YYYY AR Status" (YYYY = any 4 digits)
      ar_status_cols=grep("^\\d{4} AR Status$",headers,value=TRUE)
      #Combine all relevant status columns
      status_cols=c(status_cols,ar_status_cols)
      status_idxs=which(headers %in% status_cols)
      eligible_style=createStyle(fontColour="#00B050",textDecoration="bold")
      ineligible_style=createStyle(fontColour="#FF0000")
      for(col_idx in status_idxs){
        col_letter=int2col(col_idx)
        conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=col_idx,
                              rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),
                              rule='=="Eligible"',style=eligible_style,type="expression")
        conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=col_idx,
                              rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),
                              rule=paste0('ISNUMBER(SEARCH("Ineligible", ',col_letter,(yearly_report_start_row+1),'))'),
                              style=ineligible_style,type="expression")
      }
      headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      n_rows=nrow(yearly_report)
      #Get indexes for all relevant status columns
      status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Status$",headers,value=TRUE)
      ar_status_cols=grep("^\\d{4} AR Status$",headers,value=TRUE)
      all_status_cols=c(status_cols,ar_status_cols)
      all_status_idxs=which(headers %in% all_status_cols)
      #Create styles
      style_header_current_year=createStyle(fgFill="#00B0F0",textDecoration="bold")
      style_body_current_year=createStyle(fgFill="#85DFFF")
      style_header_other_year=createStyle(fgFill="#C1EFFF",textDecoration="bold")
      style_body_other_year=createStyle(fgFill="#C1EFFF")
      sheet=sheet_yearly
      for(col_name in all_status_cols){
        col_idx=which(headers==col_name)
        col_letter=int2col(col_idx)
        #Determine if this is a "YYYY AR Status" column and if year matches current year
        if(grepl("^\\d{4} AR Status$",col_name)){
          #Extract the year from column title
          col_year=as.integer(str_extract(col_name,"^\\d{4}"))
          if(col_year==year){
            #Current year style
            #Header
            addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet,style=style_header_current_year,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=col_idx,
                      gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
            #Body
            addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet,style=style_body_current_year, 
                      rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),cols=col_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,
                      stack=TRUE)
          } else{
            #Other year style for header & body
            addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet,style=style_header_other_year,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=col_idx,
                      gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
            addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet,style=style_body_other_year, 
                      rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),cols=col_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,
                      stack=TRUE)
          }
        } else{
          #This is a MMM-YY Status column, treat as current year style
          addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet,style=style_header_current_year,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=col_idx,
                    gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
          addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet,style=style_body_current_year, 
                    rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),cols=col_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,
                    stack=TRUE)
        }
      }
      #Define styles
      style_header_yellow=createStyle(fgFill="#FFD966",textDecoration="bold")
      style_body_light_yellow=createStyle(fgFill="#FFF2CC")
      #Columns to style
      cols_to_style=c("Works Days Worked","Gross Hourly Wage","Min of Pay Period Start Date")
      for(col_name in cols_to_style){
        col_idx=which(colnames(yearly_report)==col_name)
        if(length(col_idx)==0) next
        #Header style
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_header_yellow,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=col_idx,
                  gridExpand=FALSE,stack=TRUE)
        #Body style
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=style_body_light_yellow, 
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report)),cols=col_idx,
                  gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Styles
      earned_header_style=createStyle(fgFill="#BE91DF",textDecoration="bold")
      earned_body_style=createStyle(fgFill="#DCC5ED")
      delta_header_style=createStyle(fgFill="#FFD9D9",textDecoration="bold")
      delta_body_style=createStyle(fgFill="#FFE5E5")
      #Find columns
      earned_idx=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Works Credit \\(Earned\\)$",headers)
      claimed_idx=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Works Credit \\(Claimed\\)$",headers)
      delta_idx=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Works Credit Delta$",headers)
      #Apply Earned + Claimed together (same style)
      earned_claimed_idx=c(earned_idx,claimed_idx)
      if(length(earned_claimed_idx)>0){
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,earned_header_style,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=earned_claimed_idx,
                  gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,earned_body_style,rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),
                  cols=earned_claimed_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Delta separately (red)
      if(length(delta_idx)>0){
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,delta_header_style,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=delta_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,
                  stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,delta_body_style,
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),cols=delta_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,
                  stack=TRUE)
      }
      headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      n_rows=nrow(yearly_report)
      #Find the two TOTAL columns only
      total_idx=which(headers %in% c("Works Credit (Claimed)","Works Credit (Earned)"))
      if(length(total_idx)>0){
        total_style=createStyle(fgFill="#3F1C5A",fontColour="#FFFFFF",textDecoration="bold")
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=total_style,rows=yearly_report_start_row:(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),
                  cols=total_idx,gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Find column index of "Credit Claimed vs Credit Earned"
      credit_diff_idx=which(headers=="Credit Claimed vs Credit Earned")
      if(length(credit_diff_idx)==1){
        header_style=createStyle(fontColour="#9A0000",textDecoration="bold")
        body_style=createStyle(fontColour="#FF0000")
        #Apply header style (just the header row)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=header_style,rows=yearly_report_start_row,cols=credit_diff_idx,
                  gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
        #Apply body style (all data rows)
        addStyle(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,style=body_style,
                  rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+n_rows),cols=credit_diff_idx,
                  gridExpand=TRUE,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Get column indexes for relevant columns
      classification_col=which(colnames(yearly_report)=="Classification")
      workstate_col=which(colnames(yearly_report)=="Work State")
      min_pay_period_col=which(colnames(yearly_report)=="Min of Pay Period Start Date")
      #Define row range for data body (exclude header)
      body_rows=(yearly_report_start_row+1):(yearly_report_start_row+nrow(yearly_report))
      #Create styles once
      red_text_style=createStyle(fontColour="#FF0000")
      #Conditional formatting: Classification == "Part-Time"
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=classification_col,rows=body_rows,rule='=="Part-Time"',
                            style=red_text_style)
      #Conditional formatting: Work State != "Missouri"
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=workstate_col,rows=body_rows,rule='!="Missouri"',
                            style=red_text_style)
      #Conditional formatting: Min of Pay Period Start Date in current year
      #Apply formula rule for the whole column range at once (if supported)
      date_rule=paste0('=YEAR(',int2col(min_pay_period_col),body_rows[1],')=',year)
      conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,cols=min_pay_period_col,rows=body_rows,rule=date_rule,
                            style=red_text_style)
      headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      #Base references
      workstate_letter=int2col(which(headers=="Work State"))
      combined_headers=colnames(combined_payroll_data)
      work_state_letter_combined=int2col(which(combined_headers=="Work State"))
      pay_date_letter_combined=int2col(which(combined_headers=="Pay Date"))
      data_start_row_combined=2
      data_end_row_combined=nrow(combined_payroll_data)+1
      data_start=yearly_report_start_row+1
      data_end=yearly_report_start_row+n
      col_total_row=yearly_report_start_row-1
      combined_row=yearly_report_start_row-2
      diff_row=yearly_report_start_row-3
      #Column mapping
      suffix_map=c("Gross Wages"="Gross Wages","Work State Wages"="Work State Wages","Work State SIT"="Work State SIT",
                    "Resident State Wages"="Resident State Wages","Resident State SIT"="Resident State SIT",
                    "Hours Worked"="Total Hours Worked")
      #Styles (number formats separate from fonts)
      accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
      hours_style=createStyle(numFmt="#,##0.00")
      bold_style=createStyle(textDecoration="bold")
      italic_gray_style=createStyle(textDecoration="italic",fontColour="#808080")
      #Monthly Columns
      for(suffix in names(suffix_map)){
        combined_name=suffix_map[[suffix]]
        pattern=paste0("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} ",suffix,"$")
        suffix_cols=grep(pattern,headers)
        if(length(suffix_cols)==0) next
        combined_idx=which(combined_headers==combined_name)
        if(length(combined_idx)==0) next
        combined_letter=int2col(combined_idx)
        for(col_idx in suffix_cols){
          col_letter=int2col(col_idx)
          #Yearly SUMIFS
          formula_yearly=sprintf('=SUMIFS(%1$s%2$d:%1$s%4$d,%3$s%2$d:%3$s%4$d,"Missouri")',
                                  col_letter,data_start,workstate_letter,data_end)
          writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,formula_yearly,col_idx,col_total_row)
          #Month boundaries
          col_name=headers[col_idx]
          mon_yr=sub(paste0(" ",suffix,"$"),"",col_name)
          month_start=as.Date(paste0("01-",mon_yr),"%d-%b-%y")
          month_end=seq(month_start,length=2,by="month")[2]-1
          sy=format(month_start,"%Y")
          sm=format(month_start,"%m")
          sd=format(month_start,"%d")
          ey=format(month_end,"%Y")
          em=format(month_end,"%m")
          ed=format(month_end,"%d")
          #Combined SUMIFS
          formula_combined=paste0("=SUMIFS(","'Combined Payroll Data'!",combined_letter,data_start_row_combined,":",
                                  combined_letter,data_end_row_combined,",","'Combined Payroll Data'!",
                                  work_state_letter_combined,data_start_row_combined,":",work_state_letter_combined,
                                  data_end_row_combined,",\"Missouri\",","'Combined Payroll Data'!",
                                  pay_date_letter_combined,data_start_row_combined,":",pay_date_letter_combined,
                                  data_end_row_combined,",\">=\"&DATE(",sy,",",sm,",",sd,"),","'Combined Payroll Data'!",
                                  pay_date_letter_combined,data_start_row_combined,":",pay_date_letter_combined,
                                  data_end_row_combined,",\"<=\"&DATE(",ey,",",em,",",ed,")",")")
          writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,formula_combined,col_idx,combined_row)
          #Difference
          writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,sprintf("=%s%d-%s%d",col_letter,combined_row,col_letter,col_total_row),
                        col_idx,diff_row)
          #Styling
          is_hours=grepl("Hours Worked$",suffix)
          num_style=if(is_hours) hours_style else accounting_style
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,num_style,rows=c(col_total_row,combined_row,diff_row),cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,italic_gray_style,rows=diff_row,cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
        }
      }
      #Aggregated Columns
      for(col_name in unique(suffix_map)){
        col_idx=which(headers==col_name)
        if(length(col_idx)==0) next
        col_letter=int2col(col_idx)
        #Vertical SUMIF
        formula_down=sprintf('=SUMIF(%1$s%2$d:%1$s%3$d,"Missouri",%4$s%2$d:%4$s%3$d)',
                              workstate_letter,data_start,data_end,col_letter)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,formula_down,col_idx,col_total_row)
        #Horizontal SUM
        suffix_name=names(suffix_map)[suffix_map==col_name]
        pattern=paste0("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} ",suffix_name,"$")
        monthly_cols=grep(pattern,headers)
        if(length(monthly_cols)>0){
          letters=int2col(monthly_cols)
          formula_horizontal=paste0("=SUM(",paste0(letters,combined_row,collapse=","),")")
        } else{
          formula_horizontal="=0"
        }
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,formula_horizontal,col_idx,combined_row)
        #Difference
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,sprintf("=%s%d-%s%d",col_letter,col_total_row,col_letter,combined_row),
                      col_idx,diff_row)
        #Styling
        is_hours=col_name=="Total Hours Worked"
        num_style=if(is_hours) hours_style else accounting_style
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,num_style,rows=c(col_total_row,combined_row,diff_row),cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,bold_style,rows=c(col_total_row,combined_row),cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,italic_gray_style,rows=diff_row,cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
      }
      headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      n=nrow(yearly_report)
      data_start=yearly_report_start_row+1
      data_end=yearly_report_start_row+n
      summary_row=yearly_report_start_row-1
      #Column → Excel function mapping
      summary_map=c(#MAX
                    "Sum of Days in Pay Period"="MAX","Max of Pay Period End Date"="MAX","Max of Pay Date"="MAX",
                    "Count of Pay Date"="MAX",
                    #MIN
                    "Min of Pay Period Start Date"="MIN","Min of Pay Period End Date"="MIN","Min of Pay Date"="MIN")
      #Styles
      date_style=createStyle(numFmt="DATE")
      comma_style=createStyle(numFmt="#,##0")
      #Write formulas
      for(col_name in names(summary_map)){
        col_idx=which(headers==col_name)
        if(length(col_idx)==0) next
        fn=summary_map[[col_name]]
        col_letter=int2col(col_idx)
        formula=sprintf("=%s(%s%d:%s%d)",fn,col_letter,data_start,col_letter,data_end)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet=sheet_yearly,x=formula,startCol=col_idx,startRow=summary_row)
        #Formatting rules
        if(col_name %in% c("Count of Pay Date","Sum of Days in Pay Period")){
          #Whole numbers with commas
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,comma_style,rows=summary_row,cols=col_idx)
        } else if(grepl("Date",col_name)){
          #Real date columns only
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,date_style,rows=summary_row,cols=col_idx)
        }
      }
      headers=colnames(yearly_report)
      header_row=yearly_report_start_row
      data_start=header_row+1
      data_end=header_row+n
      #Status Summary Rows (All Status Columns)
      #Find ALL status columns
      monthly_status_cols=grep("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Status$",headers)
      ar_status_cols=which(headers==paste0(year," AR Status"))
      status_cols_idx=sort(unique(c(monthly_status_cols,ar_status_cols)))
      if(length(status_cols_idx)>0){
        if(length(baseline_number)==0||is.na(baseline_number)) baseline_number=0
        baseline_text=paste0("Baseline (Required): ",baseline_number)
        #Rows
        eligible_count_row=header_row-1
        baseline_required_row=header_row-2
        baseline_actual_row=header_row-3
        for(col in status_cols_idx){
          col_letter=int2col(col)
          #Baseline Actual (Count Baseline)
          formula_actual=sprintf('="Baseline (Actual): " & COUNTIF(%s%d:%s%d,"Baseline")',col_letter,data_start,
                                  col_letter,data_end)
          writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,formula_actual,col,baseline_actual_row)
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,baseline_actual_style,rows=baseline_actual_row,cols=col,stack=TRUE)
          #Baseline Required (text only)
          writeData(wb,sheet_yearly,baseline_text,startCol=col,startRow=baseline_required_row)
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,baseline_required_style,rows=baseline_required_row,cols=col,stack=TRUE)
          #Eligible count
          formula_eligible=sprintf('="Eligible: " & COUNTIF(%s%d:%s%d,"Eligible")',col_letter,data_start,
                                    col_letter,data_end)
          writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,formula_eligible,col,eligible_count_row)
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,green_text_style,rows=eligible_count_row,cols=col,stack=TRUE)
        }
      }
      #Rows
      sum_row=yearly_report_start_row-1
      data_start=yearly_report_start_row+1
      data_end=yearly_report_start_row+n
      #Patterns for the MMM-YY Works Credit columns
      credit_patterns=c("^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Works Credit \\(Claimed\\)$",
                        "^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Works Credit \\(Earned\\)$","^[A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2} Works Credit Delta$")
      #Explicit exact column names to process
      explicit_cols=c("Works Credit (Claimed)","Works Credit (Earned)","Credit Claimed vs Credit Earned")
      #Process the monthly patterned columns
      for(pattern in credit_patterns){
        credit_cols=grep(pattern,headers)
        if(length(credit_cols)==0) next
        for(col_idx in credit_cols){
          col_letter=int2col(col_idx)
          formula_sum=sprintf("=SUM(%s%d:%s%d)",col_letter,data_start,col_letter,data_end)
          writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,formula_sum,col_idx,sum_row) 
          if(grepl("Works Credit Delta$",headers[col_idx])){
            delta_style=createStyle(fontColour="#C00000",numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
            addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,delta_style,rows=sum_row,cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
          } else{
            default_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
            addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,default_style,rows=sum_row,cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
          }
        }
      }
      #Process the explicit exact column names
      for(col_name in explicit_cols){
        col_idx=which(headers==col_name)
        if(length(col_idx)==0) next
        col_letter=int2col(col_idx)
        formula_sum=sprintf("=SUM(%s%d:%s%d)",col_letter,data_start,col_letter,data_end)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,formula_sum,col_idx,sum_row)
        #For "Credit Claimed vs Credit Earned" column, set red color text
        if(col_name=="Credit Claimed vs Credit Earned"){
          red_style=createStyle(fontColour="#C00000",numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,red_style,rows=sum_row,cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
        } else{
          default_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
          addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,default_style,rows=sum_row,cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
        }
      }
      #Define rows relative to header row
      sum_formula_row=yearly_report_start_row-3
      ref_formula_row=yearly_report_start_row-4
      diff_formula_row=yearly_report_start_row-2
      data_sum_row=yearly_report_start_row-1
      #Create reusable styles
      accounting_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
      diff_text_style=createStyle(fontColour="#A6A6A6",numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
      conditional_match_style=createStyle(fontColour="#006100",bgFill="#C6EFCE")
      conditional_mismatch_style=createStyle(fontColour="#9C0006",bgFill="#FFC7CE")
      #Build current period string
      if(!is.null(quarter) && !is.na(quarter)){
        current_period=paste0("Q",quarter, " ",year)
      } else if(!is.null(month) && !is.na(month)){
        current_period=paste0(month," ",year)
      } else{
        stop("Neither month nor quarter defined.")
      }
      #Get periods from period_col and filter to selected year
      periods=period_col$Period
      periods=periods[substr(periods,nchar(periods)-3,nchar(periods))==year]
      #Add current period
      periods=unique(c(periods,current_period))
      #Sort periods chronologically
      period_dates=sapply(periods,function(p){
        if(grepl("^Q",p)){
          q=as.numeric(substr(p,2,2))
          month_end=c(3,6,9,12)[q]
          as.Date(paste0(year,"-",month_end,"-01"))
        } else{
          as.Date(paste0("01 ",p),format="%d %B %Y")
        }
      })
      periods=periods[order(period_dates)]
      #Function to map period to column name
      get_column_for_period=function(period,year){
        if(grepl("^Q",period)){
          q=as.numeric(substr(period,2,2))
          month_end=c("Mar","Jun","Sep","Dec")[q]
        } else{
          month_end=format(as.Date(paste0("01 ",period),"%d %B %Y"),"%b")
        }
        yy=substr(as.character(year),3,4)
        paste0(month_end,"-",yy," Works Credit (Claimed)")
      }
      #Find column number for Form Table reference column
      form_table_col=which(colnames(form_table)=="Earned MO Works Withholding Tax Credit")
      if(length(form_table_col)==0) stop("Could not find Form Table column")
      #Loop through periods
      for(period in periods){
        col_name=get_column_for_period(period,year)
        col_idx=which(headers==col_name)
        if(length(col_idx)==0){
          warning(paste("Column not found for period:",period))
          next
        }
        col_letter=int2col(col_idx)
        #Quarter vs Month logic
        if(grepl("^Q",period)){
          #Quarter -> SUM previous 3 months
          month_index=match(col_name,headers)
          prev_cols=headers[(month_index-2):month_index]
          col_letters=sapply(prev_cols,function(c) int2col(which(headers==c)))
          sum_formula=paste0("=SUM(",paste0(col_letters,data_sum_row,collapse=","),")")
        } else{
          #Month -> reference cell above header
          sum_formula=sprintf("=%s%d",col_letter,data_sum_row)
        }
        #Write SUM / reference formula
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,sum_formula,startCol=col_idx,startRow=sum_formula_row)
        #Find matching period row in FULL period_col (not filtered)
        period_row=which(trimws(period_col$Period)==trimws(period))
        if(length(period_row)==0){
          #If period not found, assume it should be the next row after last entry
          period_row=nrow(period_col)+2
        } else{
          period_row=period_row[1]+1
        }
        #Write Form Table reference formula
        ref_formula=sprintf("='Form Table'!%s%d",int2col(form_table_col),period_row)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,ref_formula,startCol=col_idx,startRow=ref_formula_row)
        #Write difference formula
        diff_formula=sprintf("=IFERROR(%s%d-%s%d,\"\")",col_letter,sum_formula_row,col_letter,ref_formula_row)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,diff_formula,startCol=col_idx,startRow=diff_formula_row)
        #Apply styles
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,accounting_style,rows=c(sum_formula_row,ref_formula_row,diff_formula_row),
                  cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,diff_text_style,rows=diff_formula_row,cols=col_idx,stack=TRUE)
        #Conditional formatting
        for(r in c(sum_formula_row,ref_formula_row)){
          conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet_yearly,cols=col_idx,rows=r,rule=sprintf("ROUND(%s%d,2)=ROUND(%s%d,2)",
                                                                                  col_letter,sum_formula_row,
                                                                                  col_letter,ref_formula_row),
                                style=conditional_match_style)
          conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet_yearly,cols=col_idx,rows=r,rule=sprintf("ROUND(%s%d,2)<>ROUND(%s%d,2)",
                                                                                  col_letter,sum_formula_row,
                                                                                  col_letter,ref_formula_row),
                                style=conditional_mismatch_style)
        }
      }
      #Year total for "Works Credit (Claimed)" column
      claimed_total_col_idx=which(headers=="Works Credit (Claimed)")
      if(length(claimed_total_col_idx)==1){
        period_col_idx=which(colnames(form_table)=="Period")
        credit_col_idx=form_table_col #Already computed earlier
        period_letter=int2col(period_col_idx)
        credit_letter=int2col(credit_col_idx)
        year_string=as.character(year)
        year_sum_formula=sprintf("=SUMIF('Form Table'!%s:%s,\"*%s*\",'Form Table'!%s:%s)",period_letter,period_letter,
                                  year_string,credit_letter,credit_letter)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,year_sum_formula,startCol=claimed_total_col_idx,startRow=diff_formula_row) #2 rows above header
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,accounting_style,rows=diff_formula_row,cols=claimed_total_col_idx,stack=TRUE)
      }
      #Conditional formatting for "Works Credit (Claimed)" column
      claimed_total_col_idx=which(headers=="Works Credit (Claimed)")
      if(length(claimed_total_col_idx)==1){
        col_letter=int2col(claimed_total_col_idx)
        row_month_sum=header_row-1 #Monthly total
        row_year_total=header_row-2 #Form Table total
        #Styles
        green_style=createStyle(fontColour="#006100",bgFill="#C6EFCE")
        red_style=createStyle(fontColour="#9C0006",bgFill="#FFC7CE")
        #Rules
        rule_equal=sprintf("ROUND(%s%d,2)=ROUND(%s%d,2)",col_letter,row_month_sum,col_letter,row_year_total)
        rule_not_equal=sprintf("ROUND(%s%d,2)<>ROUND(%s%d,2)",col_letter,row_month_sum,col_letter,row_year_total)
        #Apply BOTH rules
        conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet_yearly,cols=claimed_total_col_idx,rows=c(row_month_sum,row_year_total),
                              type="expression",rule=rule_equal,style=green_style)
        conditionalFormatting(wb,sheet_yearly,cols=claimed_total_col_idx,rows=c(row_month_sum,row_year_total),
                              type="expression",rule=rule_not_equal,style=red_style)
      }
      #Earned vs Claimed reconciliation rows
      earned_pattern="^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}) Works Credit \\(Earned\\)$"
      claimed_pattern="^([A-Za-z]{3}-\\d{2}) Works Credit \\(Claimed\\)$"
      earned_cols=grep(earned_pattern,headers,value=TRUE)
      claimed_cols=grep(claimed_pattern,headers,value=TRUE)
      #Map month → claimed column index
      claimed_map=setNames(which(headers %in% claimed_cols),sub(claimed_pattern,"\\1",claimed_cols))
      acct_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING")
      acct_red_style=createStyle(numFmt="ACCOUNTING",fontColour="#C00000")
      for(col_name in earned_cols){
        month_key=sub(earned_pattern,"\\1",col_name)
        if(!(month_key %in% names(claimed_map))) next
        earned_idx=which(headers==col_name)
        claimed_idx=claimed_map[[month_key]]
        earned_letter=int2col(earned_idx)
        claimed_letter=int2col(claimed_idx)
        row_sum=header_row-1 #Existing SUM row
        row_ref=header_row-3 #Claimed reference
        row_delta=header_row-2 #Difference
        #Row -3 : reference claimed
        ref_formula=sprintf("=%s%d",claimed_letter,row_sum)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,x=ref_formula,startCol=earned_idx,startRow=row_ref)
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,acct_style,rows=row_ref,cols=earned_idx,stack=TRUE)
        #Row -2 : earned minus claimed
        delta_formula=sprintf("=%s%d-%s%d",earned_letter,row_sum,earned_letter,row_ref)
        writeFormula(wb,sheet_yearly,x=delta_formula,startCol=earned_idx,startRow=row_delta)
        addStyle(wb,sheet_yearly,acct_red_style,rows=row_delta,cols=earned_idx,stack=TRUE)
      }
      end_time_2=Sys.time()
    }
    #Helper: extract year/type/period info from sheet names
    extract_sheet_info=function(name){
      info=list(year=NA,type="other",period=NA)
      if(grepl("^[0-9]{4} Yearly Report$",name)){
        info$year=as.integer(sub(" Yearly Report","",name))
        info$type="yearly"
        info$period=12 #Treat yearly report as month 12
      } else if(grepl("^Q[1-4]\\.[0-9]{4}$",name)){
        parts=unlist(strsplit(name,"\\."))
        info$type="quarterly"
        info$year=as.integer(parts[2])
        info$period=as.integer(sub("Q","",parts[1]))*3 #Q1=3, Q2=6, etc.
      } else if(grepl("^(0[1-9]|1[0-2])\\.[0-9]{4}$",name)){
        parts=unlist(strsplit(name,"\\."))
        info$type="monthly"
        info$year=as.integer(parts[2])
        info$period=as.integer(parts[1])
      } else{
        info$year=1900
        info$period=0
      }
      return(info)
    }
    existing_sheets=names(wb)
    #Priority sheets
    priority=c("Job Tracking","Form Table","Combined Payroll Data","Combined SIT Data")
    priority_present=intersect(priority,existing_sheets)
    remaining=setdiff(existing_sheets,priority_present)
    #Updated parsing function for sheet info
    extract_sheet_info=function(sheet){
      sheet=str_trim(sheet)
      year=NA_integer_
      type="other"
      period=NA_integer_
      #Yearly: "YYYY Yearly Report"
      if(str_detect(sheet,"^\\d{4} Yearly Report$")){
        year=as.integer(str_extract(sheet,"^\\d{4}"))
        type="yearly"
        period=0
        return(list(year=year,type=type,period=period))
      }
      #MM.YYYY
      if(str_detect(sheet,"^\\d{1,2}\\.\\d{4}$")){
        parts=str_split(sheet,"\\.",simplify=TRUE)
        month=as.integer(parts[1])
        year=as.integer(parts[2])
        if(!is.na(month) && month>=1 && month<=12){
          type="monthly"
          period=month
          return(list(year=year,type=type,period=period))
        }
      }
      #YYYY.MM
      if(str_detect(sheet,"^\\d{4}\\.\\d{1,2}$")){
        parts=str_split(sheet,"\\.",simplify=TRUE)
        year=as.integer(parts[1])
        month=as.integer(parts[2])
        if(!is.na(month) && month>=1 && month<=12){
          type="monthly"
          period=month
          return(list(year=year,type=type,period=period))
        }
      }
      #YYYY.QX
      if(str_detect(sheet,"^\\d{4}\\.Q[1-4]$")){
        parts=str_split(sheet,"\\.",simplify=TRUE)
        year=as.integer(parts[1])
        quarter=as.integer(str_remove(parts[2],"Q"))
        type="quarterly"
        period=quarter*3 #Convert quarter to month equivalent
        return(list(year=year,type=type,period=period))
      }
      #QX.YYYY
      if(str_detect(sheet,"^Q[1-4]\\.\\d{4}$")){
        parts=str_split(sheet,"\\.",simplify=TRUE)
        quarter=as.integer(str_remove(parts[1],"Q"))
        year=as.integer(parts[2])
        type="quarterly"
        period=quarter*3
        return(list(year=year,type=type,period=period))
      }
      #If any year found inside sheet name, treat as yearly with period 0
      if(str_detect(sheet,"\\d{4}")){
        year_match=str_extract(sheet,"\\d{4}")
        year=as.integer(year_match)
        type="yearly"
        period=0
        return(list(year=year,type=type,period=period))
      }
      #Fallback: unknown type
      list(year=NA_integer_,type="other",period=NA_integer_)
    }
    #Extract info from remaining sheets
    sheet_info=lapply(remaining,extract_sheet_info)
    sheet_df=data.frame(name=remaining,year=sapply(sheet_info,`[[`,"year"),type=sapply(sheet_info,`[[`,"type"),
                        period=sapply(sheet_info,`[[`,"period"),stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
    #Define type order: yearly > quarterly > monthly > other
    type_levels=c("yearly","quarterly","monthly","other")
    sheet_df$type=factor(sheet_df$type,levels=type_levels)
    #Sort by year descending, then type, then period descending (months/quarters mixed)
    remaining_sorted=sheet_df%>%arrange(desc(year),type,desc(period))%>%pull(name)
    #Final ordered list
    ordered=c(priority_present,remaining_sorted)
    #Keep only existing sheets
    ordered=ordered[ordered %in% existing_sheets]
    #Map to workbook indices
    idx=match(ordered,existing_sheets)
    idx=idx[!is.na(idx)] #Remove any NA
    #Reorder workbook sheets
    worksheetOrder(wb)=idx
    wb$ActiveSheet=1L
    #Save workbook
    saveWorkbook(wb,file_path,overwrite=TRUE)
    cat("Workbook sheet order updated:\n",paste(ordered,collapse=", "),"\n")
    end_time_1=Sys.time()
    time_elapsed_1=as.numeric(difftime(end_time_1,start_time_1,units="secs"))
    if(exists("time_elapsed_2") && !is.null(time_elapsed_2)){
      time_elapsed_1=time_elapsed_1-time_elapsed_2
    }
    format_elapsed=function(elapsed){
      elapsed=as.numeric(elapsed,units="secs") #convert to numeric seconds
      hrs=floor(elapsed/3600)
      mins=floor((elapsed %% 3600)/60)
      secs=round(elapsed %% 60,2)
      parts=c()
      if(hrs>0){
        parts=c(parts,sprintf("%d %s",hrs,ifelse(hrs==1,"hour","hours")))
      }
      if(mins>0){
        parts=c(parts,sprintf("%d %s",mins,ifelse(mins==1,"minute","minutes")))
      }
      #Always show seconds
      parts=c(parts,sprintf("%.2f %s",secs,ifelse(secs==1,"second","seconds")))
      paste(parts,collapse=" ")
    }
    #Build report label
    if(!is.null(month)){
      report_type="monthly"
      month_upper=paste0(toupper(substr(month,1,1)),tolower(substr(month,2,nchar(month))))
      report_label=paste0(month_upper," ",year)
    } else if(!is.null(quarter)){
      report_type="quarterly"
      report_label=paste0("Q",quarter," ",year)
    } else{
      report_type="unspecified"
      report_label=year
    }
    #Using paste0 to avoid extra spaces
    cat(paste0("It took ",format_elapsed(time_elapsed_1)," to complete the ",report_type," report for ",report_label,".\n"))
    #If time_elapsed_2 exists, print for yearly report
    if(exists("time_elapsed_2") && !is.null(time_elapsed_2)){
      cat(paste0("It took ",format_elapsed(time_elapsed_2)," to complete the yearly report for ",year,".\n"))
    }
  }
  #Run reports
  if(!is.null(start_month) && !is.null(end_month)){
    #Convert month names to numbers
    start_month_num=match(tolower(start_month),tolower(month.name))
    end_month_num=match(tolower(end_month),tolower(month.name))
    #Generate continuous sequence of months
    all_months=seq(from=(start_year-1)*12+start_month_num,to=(end_year-1)*12+end_month_num)
    #Convert back to months and years
    months=month.name[((all_months-1) %% 12)+1]
    years=((all_months-1) %/% 12)+1
    #Build periods data frame
    periods=data.frame(Month=months,Year=years)
    #Run the model
    for(i in seq_len(nrow(periods))){
      report_function(company=company,month=periods$Month[i],quarter=NULL,year=periods$Year[i])
    }
  } else if(!is.null(start_quarter) && !is.null(end_quarter)){
    #Generate continuous sequence of quarters
    all_quarters=seq(from=(start_year-1)*4+start_quarter,to=(end_year-1)*4+end_quarter)
    #Convert back to quarters and years
    quarters=((all_quarters-1) %% 4)+1
    years=((all_quarters-1) %/% 4)+1
    #Build periods data frame
    periods=data.frame(Quarter=quarters,Year=years)
    #Run the model
    for(i in seq_len(nrow(periods))){
      report_function(company=company,month=NULL,quarter=periods$Quarter[i],year=periods$Year[i])
    }
  } else{
    stop("You must provide either start/end months or start/end quarters.")
  }
}
```

```{r}
data_frames=missouri_works_model(company="Demo",
                                 start_month="November",
                                 end_month="November",
                                 start_quarter=NULL,
                                 end_quarter=NULL,
                                 start_year=2025,
                                 end_year=2025)
```
